name: =?utf-8?Q?James=20P.=20Bradley?=
subject: Adam Schiff's Opponent
body:
| | | | | [](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=ae333e4ef2&e=84ee529f47)
---
Peter,
Adam Schiff is going to be expelled from Congress if the House Republicans keep their word.
Schiff is a liar, a thief, a crook and just the worst of the worst. He’s Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked agent of chaos.
It just came out in the Durham Report that nearly **EVERYTHING** he said from 2016-2020 about Russian Collusion was a **BALD FACE LIE.**
Nancy Pelosi now has her daughter running around playing crypt-keeper for Dianne Feinstein to make sure that she hangs on for another year in the Senate so Gov. Newsom doesn’t appoint Barbara Lee and give her the competitive advantage in the CA Senate race.
I’m here to tell you: The CA Senate race on that side doesn’t matter because CA has another path forward - James P. Bradley.
That would be me. I am a veteran running for the US Senate to **STOP ADAM SCHIFF** and **SAVE CALIFORNIA.**
| [STOP ADAM SCHIFF! SAVE CALIFORNIA!](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=c7c25bd653&e=84ee529f47)
---
Adam Schiff is absolutely detested in California but Democrats are going full-steam ahead with his candidacy for the Senate. The entire machine is behind him. THEY OWE HIM ONE!
He carried their water peddling CRIMINAL LIES on the Russia investigation. No one is interested in his representation - I can guarantee you that much.
Now, here’s the issue with this race. Running a campaign in California simply costs more because of the amount of people that live here, so our early fundraising is especially important.
Two of the country's six most expensive TV media markets are in California—and even as we'll be reaching voters through lower cost means like digital ads and door knocking, TV is still a major part of any big campaign.
Rep. Anna Paulina Luna just introduced a resolution to remove Adam Schiff from Congress for lying to the American people about the Trump-Russia hoax.
**EVERY CALIFORNIAN NEEDS TO UNDERSTAND THEY HAVE A CONSERVATIVE OPTION WHO WILL NOT DISGRACE OUR STATE LIKE SCHIFF HAS DONE!**
| [LET’S GET THE WORD OUT TO EVERY CALIFORNIAN!](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=3859ac7ed8&e=84ee529f47)
---
This is where you come in. As a truly grassroots powered campaign, we’re not accepting a dime from sleazy PACs and we won’t be taking money from federal lobbyists.
My campaign is funded entirely by folks like you and I want to keep it that way.
Donating EARLY will allow your dollars to help my campaign ensure we get the best rates and time slots to run TV ads, which show voters voters why I am the warrior that we need in Washington.
I can win this race. I am going to win this race. Will you make history with me?
| [DONATE $5.00](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=df110b2e52&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [DONATE $20.00](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=a335342fec&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [DONATE $40.00](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=80c5a07bdf&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [DONATE $100.00](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=dedf637afc&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [DONATE $10 RIGHT NOW!](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=5b2e615f97&e=84ee529f47)
---
Sincerely,
James P. BradleyCandidate for US Senate, California

name: Jim Jordan
subject: He was right. There was NO COLLUSION.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Entrenched bureaucrats have been caught red-handed lying to the American people for self-aggrandizement -- and now, they don’t want to face any consequences for their lies.

## Legislative Update for Week Ending May 19, 2023
---
| It was a monumental week for conservative values in the state of Nebraska. It is a new day. The old tactics that usually work for the left over the years have not been successful in 2023. We have Republicans that are firm in their convictions. Republicans have a vision, a plan, and a strategy of where this state needs to go to improve the lives of Nebraskans. Restoring foundational pillars that made this state great over the generations is yielding fruit.

Media, which is far left and out of bounds, no longer carry the day. The modern day conservative knows they are not presenting the news...they are pushing a narrative. The next step of yelling at conservatives has not worked as well either. Most of the Senators are staying true to their convictions and will not be intimidated. They will listen to counter arguments but unruly behavior is actually a signal to keep pushing. The real question is, are Republican citizens succumbing to intimidation? We need all our citizens to stand up at the local level with courage as our Senators did this week. Your communities struggling with leftist indoctrinated leaders in school boards and other offices can be defeated when local leaders stand with courage as did our Senators this week.

As you have seen, the left is very frustrated. We could play clip after clip of outlandish speeches, but we are too busy executing our plan. The Democrats haven’t had to compromise too much the last 3 decades as Republicans usually folded when one of their strategies they would deploy usually worked. Select Business leaders selling principles for money (becoming more prevalent by the day), politicians intimidated by the media/pr, and frankly an overall slide of the ‘courage factor’ has led us to this point. This week, the legal direction shifted in our state after the winds of change began to blow last summer. Courage to stand for right is coming back.

It has been their way or the highway for Democrats. Many of the Democrats refuse to work with Republicans (to be fair..a few have this year). This time the left is losing by employing the same tactics. Why? Because they will not compromise. The angry mob, that is their base, was on full display this week trying to create havoc to get their way. We even saw a failed Democrat candidate trying to point the mob to the cars of Senators to create damage to intimidate the body to fold. This mob and their radical actions has many of their politicians in fear of trying to work together with the other side. Many of their leaders have succumbed to the mob. You can read our twitter feed to learn more about the mob attacks. With that said, we are rolling forward with a positive agenda to continue to improve the everyday life of Nebraskans. We cannot let a mob run our country. If you listen to the traditional media and mob (which unfortunately too many conservatives still do), you will draw the conclusion that Republicans are obsessed with a culture war. This is not true. The truth of the matter is we are working a balanced but significant agenda that balances platform issues around children (both health and education), tax cuts for our people (both business and labor), addressing infrastructure, preserving natural resources, bolstering our commitment to law and order, looking at the problems in education, and working on making our government more transparent, accountable, and secure. If you focus too much on the issues that sell media time, you will miss the balanced but firm agenda we are advancing in state institutions that help Nebraskans.

This week was a new week. We took a big step to correct the ills plaguing this state and country the last 50 years. We are far from the finish line. We are just working to change the trajectory of the next 50 years for our future.
---
|
## Preserving our Children
---
| As we mentioned in the intro, the game has changed. 32 Senators took a punch when LB626 failed. In the past, they went home and moved on. 2023 is different. We are so proud of Republicans who took a punch, got back on the horse, and went right back at it and put together an amendment that would pass. They combined abortion restrictions with another bill to protect children to keep the legal subject matter the same (smart).

We understand many Republicans remain frustrated at an inferior standard of time for abortions that are less stringent than the timeframe in LB626. However, citizens need to realize 31 of our Republican Senators and Senator McDonnell were committed to the issue from the start. They were not going to walk away from the battle in 2023 and wanted to achieve SOMETHING. This batch of Senators never gave up and showed some real grit that would make our ‘94 Husker offensive line jealous. As you might recall, Senator Aguilar (who was the victim of character assassination this week by the left), was wheeled into the chamber in excruciating pain to cast a historical vote earlier in the session.Yesterday, Senator Slama, who publicly disclosed she was in the hospital for hyperemesis gravidarum, used what energy she had left to get to the chamber from the hospital to make the 33rd vote. This is why I call this team the ‘94 Husker line...they have grit. They were going to push for a vote on the record so more kids would not be lost by another year of inaction. Literal physical health issues didn’t stop this crew. They play hurt.

With that said, we don’t believe these topics are finished over the next several years. We do believe the overwhelming majority of Senators worked hard to achieve the best standard possible in 2023. We must pray for our Attorney General who will deal with lawsuits to try and halt this bill.

We want to congratulate Senator Hansen for working on an exceptional amendment, Senator Kauth for allowing this amendment to her landmark bill, and Senator McDonnell (Democrat) for voting for this bill to protect our children.

For clarity in understanding the bill, the 12 week standard that was adopted was cited as “Gestational Age”. Gestational age on average happens two weeks before actual pregnancy (you can google to learn more). In rough terms, this makes the ban roughly a 10 week standard from actual conception. This is why many people are confused when they read some Senators referring to this as a 10 week ban while other commentators have mentioned a 12 week ban. I wanted to clear that issue up as it was a common question I have received.

Finally, time is critical to save more lives. Senator Hansen’s (and his amazing staff) excellent legal work will lead to more children being saved. The emergency clause wisely allows this bill to immediately become law upon the Governor’s signature to save lives. To be clear, the abortion clause will go into immediate effect. The “Let Them Grow” clauses will go into effect in the fall. In the end, it was a joyous day. We give praise.

PS. Please forgive my grammar error that went out via email yesterday. My edits in the balcony on my phone during the chaos in the Rotunda did not go well. This will not be my last grammar/spelling mistake...but I had an extra cringe moment when that email first came out...my fault.
---
|
---
|
## The Government Spending Money
---
| LB 727 was a combination of 30 bills and was heard on Tuesday. At play on a philosophical level is; should the government be DIRECTLY involved in spurring the economy and fund specific projects that in turn will yield more tax dollars. Or...is this not the government’s job to get involved in projects of this size? Of primary consideration was large state expenditures to expand the Nebraska Crossing area outside Gretna. The votes were overwhelming FOR this idea by this batch of Senators. Proponents are arguing that the Return on Investment in future tax revenue will more than pay for the investment by the state.

As usual in 2023, there were 30 bills combined into this one bill and many projects are being funded. Of interest to us were key planks in our legislative plan...infrastructure. In this new bill, sales taxes garnered from the sales of aircraft will be diverted to improve runways. We see taxes garnered from items that directly use the infrastructure on infrastructure items being consumed as good tax policy. We believe this philosophy should be followed more extensively in the future.

Of little discussion (that deserves more), is Senator Moser’s bill to allow bonding for highway projects. He will need an amendment to get around the prohibition of the state taking on debt. We think this precedent that will trigger state debt needs significant debate. The party has no formal position on this as our SCC has not had a chance to meet and vote on state debt issues. We support infrastructure, but we are a fiscal party as well. We are very weary of debt occurring at the state level. Obviously, we have two conflicting goals at odds with one another. We are just calling for a respectful and robust debate on this topic as this will set a precedent in the future.

Finally, on a minor note regarding our agricultural plank...measures were added in this bill that benefit the livestock industry in the form of tax credits or sales tax exemptions on input materials commonly used.
---
|

|
## The Democrats Attempting to Overhaul the Supreme Court
---
| The Democrats proposed a bill to move the Supreme Court from 9 to 13. The purpose? To make the supreme court ‘left’ again. This can’t happen. This will not happen with the House of Representatives controlled by the Republicans. With that said, we cannot take this move for granted. We know the Democrats are actively working to control our entire country. We must work together to continue to preserve our Constitutional institutions as created. Please help us preserve this Constitutional Republic from the attempted Mob Rule Democracy (on display on Tuesday and Friday) they would like to create by controlling the interpretation of the law and Constitution.
---
|
---
|
## Education Changes Show a Shift in Policy at the Governor Level
---
| Governor Pillen announced a repeal of Rule 23. This was a divestiture from former Governor Ricketts who refused to repeal the rule. Rule 23 prescribes a basic skills assessment of an individual looking to be a teacher. Proponents of the repeal cited a severe workforce shortage as well as unnecessary cost and time when other requirements were more than sufficient to screen for qualified teachers. Opponents cite a basic skills test should be administered before one is allowed to teach kids. The state party has no formal position on the repeal of this rule as the Governing body has taken no formal position.
---
|
---
|
## The Budget
---
| On Thursday, the budget was approved by the State legislature. Total expenditures look to be around $5.3 billion.

On the whole, this would represent an increase of a low 2% number. Significant expenditures of note were the Perkins Canal, the new state prison, tax cuts (both income and property), and finally a per pupil education fund.

Opponents have cited big concerns on the spending levels being doled out in education. A lot of this spending was a concession to get a growth lid/property tax reduction to keep property taxes in line. With that said, a 2% growth in expenditures in a high inflationary environment is more than reasonable of a budget.

Our bigger concern in education remains the results, the rights of parents, and a solid curriculum. In summary, we are more concerned with the direction of education as reflected in our legislative plan. The planks on education in the Pillen Plan drafted in the campaign were very good. We are more concerned that much of that policy advances in education over time as we didn’t see many of those planks come into play in 2023. We will continue to monitor where policy goes in education in the coming years to continue our commitment to children having the best start possible in life. Opportunity Scholarships are a great start to implementing change into education to create improved outcomes (especially in urban areas with poor scores). We will be focusing on that battle in the coming weeks.
---
|
---
|
## Protecting Women’s Rights
---
| Attorney General Hilgers and Governor Pillen have signed onto a letter with other Republicans around the county to oppose the Department of Education’s proposed regulation happening under the watch of Joe Biden and the Democrats. The regulation aims to make it easier for biological males to compete in women’s sports. In August of 2022 the NEGOP adopted a formal position at the SCC meeting:
* Defend female athletes and preserve fairness in women’s sports

These actions by our Governor and Attorney General support this goal. We are happy to see this action and applaud their efforts. Women’s rights are quickly being abandoned by the Democrat Party in support of all things radical. We believe protecting women’s sports for biological women is critical to preserve opportunities, scholarships, and to level the competitive playing field for women in our state.
---
|
---
|
## Are YOU engaging your county party?
---
| As you can see in this letter, we rely STRONGLY on our Central Committee members to set the direction of where this party stands. My job is to work the will of our governing body into law. The governing body IS elected at the local level. Your involvement in the County Party ensures you have a voice at what happens at the state level. Get involved. Support your county and the state party with your donations to achieve more victories and set the direction of this party.

Second, I’m in real time discussions with the leadership of our counties on who the next candidates to lead our state will be. We believe these people should come with the approval of locals...not elites who traditionally like to pick the winners who advance their personal agenda. Being involved in your county party and engaging local leadership is the best way to help identify the best people to send to the state to steer the direction of this government for the Nebraska people. While our opponents want Soros, Newsome, and California approval....we would like local county approval of new leaders. The original party Constitution was designed with local control in mind. We are restoring local control to ensure our positions bubble up from the people.
---
|
---
|
## Voter ID Problems
---
| Although we would like to bask in the good news of the week, Voter ID has taken a severe turn for the worse. This is the long form topic of the week. This issue is taking center stage Monday. **WE STRONGLY ENCOURAGE YOU TO MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD BEFORE THEN.**

Last November, the voters spoke and approved the constitutional amendment that requires every voter to present Photo ID before casting a ballot. The exact language of the constitution now says, "Before casting a ballot in any election, a qualified voter shall present valid photographic identification in a manner specified by the Legislature". The legislature is struggling to determine how to implement this new structure, and so far it’s coming up short!!!

This week Senator Slama and Secretary of State Evnen publicly sparred over where Voter ID is going. Senator Slama’s original bill was gutted. Provisions were then added with heavy influence by the Secretary of State. While the Attorney General made it his mission to steer clear of drafting legislation or being part of policy, that was not the case with the Secretary of State and Deputy Secretary of State, Wayne Bena, who took a very active role in steering the legislation. As a Constitutional party, we believe legislation belongs in the hands of legislators, with heavy influence by the people, as evidenced by the Constitutional amendment. Senator Slama was so unsatisfied with the direction of where the Secretary was taking this bill that she killed her bill on the floor that contained the Secretary of States influenced version of Voter ID. Both sides are pointing at the other side in citing Constitutional problems with their respective proposals. For the policy nerds, a lot of friction is around the Indiana Voter ID case. They both want to draft a law that upholds the Constitutional citations of the Supreme Court. Both parties feel the other side is missing the mark. We feel it is our job at the party to remind everyone that the Supreme Court upheld the Indiana law and cited that the state’s interest in preventing fraud overrode the plaintiffs' claims of burdens on being able to vote. Observing exceptions should not be done at the peril of preventing fraud.

As I discussed last week, I offered the Secretary a chance to explain his side of the story of early voting in Lincoln unedited. I did not receive that paper this week. Senator Slama and I talked Thursday about her side of the story, but understandably, she went to the hospital shortly after we talked and did not have a chance to tackle a written description of this issue. I will try and obtain her talking points (health permitting) from her advisors unedited this next week for your benefit.

The basic issues with this new bill (that Slama killed) are the many times that the intent and actual language of the amendment are being completely ignored. We anticipate these clauses to transfer to the new bill. The ‘when to verify citizenship’ issue is the primary disagreement between the two parties. Senator Slama wants citizenship to be verified at time of voting (show a vetted citizenship ID). The Secretary already believes citizenship has been verified when they were put on the voter roles to be eligible to vote. More on this later...

As a party, we are more fearful that many of these other poor clauses in LB514 will resurrect themselves in new legislation. The law is CLEAR! The legal definition of **before** is “ _prior to; preceding_ ”, **casting** means “ _to vote; to place one's ballot in the ballot box_ ”, a **qualified voter** is “ _someone that is entitled; as an elector to vote_ ,” and **present** is “ _the act of setting forth or the act of offering at the proper time and place_.” All of these words make it crystal clear that when a qualified voter (United States citizen, Nebraska resident, eighteen years of age) wants to deposit their ballot into ANY election, they, and only they, must present a VALID form of Photo identification to individuals responsible for our elections that shows they are qualified to vote that ballot. _**LB514 does NOT require these actions of every citizen.**_

The issues start on page 1 of the bill. Instead of only allowing for identification, such as a driver’s license or passport, the current bill will let our liberal post-secondary institutions’ student IDs be acceptable forms of identification. Medical institutions such as hospitals and nursing homes would be allowed to use any photo they have on file to validate a qualified voter. Furthermore, expired licenses being allowed to be used makes a mockery of the word valid. What qualifies these to be “valid” as described in the constitution? Legally, valid means having legal force, effective. There is nothing “legal” in a student ID, and absolutely nothing with legal force in a medical institution’s photographic documentation of a patient, or an expired license that law enforcement would not use to justify the right to drive. A valid photo ID must have legal force and be incredibly difficult to replicate. Senator Slama is adamant that the only photo ID’s that can be used should have a citizenship requirement behind their access. We agree with her on this issue. When we have dangerous and loose ways to sign up to register, it is critical we only use ID’s that have confirmed citizenship requirements to acquire.

The most critical element of a qualified voter per the US and Nebraska Constitution is that they are a citizen of this country. With the flood of illegal immigrants pouring into our country, it is CRITICAL that every ballot inserted into our elections is vetted to ensure that only legitimate voters cast a ballot. LB514 gave the Secretary of State unchecked authority and power to determine whether or not citizenship has been verified. There is no clear requirement of how and to what extent this will be accomplished. This is for the legislature to determine to ensure that it happens. It is not acceptable to delegate their powers in a manner that provides a loophole and creates an opportunity for this requirement to not be fully achieved. The state legislature has US Constitutional authority to outline state elections...not the state executive branch. The tone that is being set is the Secretary of State’s office is defining the legislation that they feel they can, and should administer. In reality, it should be the opposite. The Secretary of State’s office needs to find a way to administer what the citizens of Nebraska prescribed as they are the 2nd house with the ability to write and pass Constitutional law. We need our executive branch to execute the legislative law...not define it.

The 514 bill requires a voter to present a photo ID or just the number of the identification card when obtaining an Early ballot, but when Early Ballots are returned, nothing is required to prove the legitimate voter is casting the ballot. Again, this does not match the language in our Constitution.

Another clear violation of the Constitution is allowing voters to simply write down the number on the driver’s license or similar identification as “presenting valid photographic identification”. Several times in this bill, exemptions to the Photo ID requirement set a lesser standard for different voters. This is absolutely not following the letter of the law!

Nebraskans want to trust our elections. They want to know that their vote is not being circumvented and impeded by illegitimate ballots being inserted into our elections. It does not matter if the illegal ballot is injected in person or via absentee voting, either way their vote would be violated and destroyed.

The correct language and process to meet the constitutional requirements is clear. The party invested heavily into Sen Erdman’s LB230 to accomplish the intent and letter of this law. At this time, we are backing away from supporting any of the proposed Voter ID measures as it appears the Constitutional intent of the people is not being met. We clearly have different interpretations of “Before Casting”. “Before” can mean when they are registered to vote for the Secretary of State and other Senators. “Before” to the party means at the time of deposit of the ballot into the box. We believe the word is tied directly to “Casting”. We simply disagree.

We have offered to help in the past and we still have a strong framework in LB230 to refer to. Like the Secretary of State, we have no power to write legislation. However, we do have the power to lobby those who can and we have. However, it was clear who was allowed to drive the ship forward the last 3 weeks on this legislation. It was not the party whose members around the state invested HEAVILY into this issue.

Updating the language in the LB230 bill to ensure the exceptions in the Indiana case should not be a difficult hurdle. Again, we stress that the Supreme Court recognized the plaintiffs did not achieve a burden to vote that overcame the interests of the state in preventing fraud. The fact that LB230 has not even been considered to accomplish this goal is a disservice. At this point, no bill is better than a bad bill. This bill may need to be moved to the beginning of 2024 to make sure Nebraska gets this right. We will provide immediate updates on this issue should we find legislation that passes the will of the people AND observes Constitutional law as drafted. Only clearing one of those hurdles is not a standard we support. Trying to get something passed to get this done is not a posture we are willing to take understanding the consequences this may have over the next 20 years. We completely understand compromise is necessary in legislation but we will refuse to compromise Constitutional law that is a bedrock of our Republic.

Until next week....celebrate the wins of the week but carry forward the focus of change until the end of the session. We have big issues remaining. Voter ID, taxes, and opportunity scholarships to name a few. We are happy but not content. Please continue to pray for energy and rest at the Capitol. People are exhausted from the battles, but big work remains.

Carry on...
---
| Todd Watson
Political Director
NEGOP
---

Voter ID Problems | | Legislative Update for Week Ending May 19, 2023 | It was a monumental week for conservative values in the state of Nebraska. It is a new day. The old tactics that usually work for the left over the years have not been successful in 2023. We have Republicans that are firm in their convictions. Republicans have a vision, a plan, and a strategy of where this state needs to go to improve the lives of Nebraskans. Restoring foundational pillars that made this state great over the generations is yielding fruit. Media, which is far left and out of bounds, no longer carry the day. The modern day conservative knows they are not presenting the news...they are pushing a narrative. The next step of yelling at conservatives has not worked as well either. Most of the Senators are staying true to their convictions and will not be intimidated. They will listen to counter arguments but unruly behavior is actually a signal to keep pushing. The real question is, are Republican citizens succumbing to intimidation? We need all our citizens to stand up at the local level with courage as our Senators did this week. Your communities struggling with leftist indoctrinated leaders in school boards and other offices can be defeated when local leaders stand with courage as did our Senators this week. As you have seen, the left is very frustrated. We could play clip after clip of outlandish speeches, but we are too busy executing our plan. The Democrats haven’t had to compromise too much the last 3 decades as Republicans usually folded when one of their strategies they would deploy usually worked. Select Business leaders selling principles for money (becoming more prevalent by the day), politicians intimidated by the media/pr, and frankly an overall slide of the ‘courage factor’ has led us to this point. This week, the legal direction shifted in our state after the winds of change began to blow last summer. Courage to stand for right is coming back. It has been their way or the highway for Democrats. Many of the Democrats refuse to work with Republicans (to be fair..a few have this year). This time the left is losing by employing the same tactics. Why? Because they will not compromise. The angry mob, that is their base, was on full display this week trying to create havoc to get their way. We even saw a failed Democrat candidate trying to point the mob to the cars of Senators to create damage to intimidate the body to fold. This mob and their radical actions has many of their politicians in fear of trying to work together with the other side. Many of their leaders have succumbed to the mob. You can read our twitter feed to learn more about the mob attacks. With that said, we are rolling forward with a positive agenda to continue to improve the everyday life of Nebraskans. We cannot let a mob run our country. If you listen to the traditional media and mob (which unfortunately too many conservatives still do), you will draw the conclusion that Republicans are obsessed with a culture war. This is not true. The truth of the matter is we are working a balanced but significant agenda that balances platform issues around children (both health and education), tax cuts for our people (both business and labor), addressing infrastructure, preserving natural resources, bolstering our commitment to law and order, looking at the problems in education, and working on making our government more transparent, accountable, and secure. If you focus too much on the issues that sell media time, you will miss the balanced but firm agenda we are advancing in state institutions that help Nebraskans. This week was a new week. We took a big step to correct the ills plaguing this state and country the last 50 years. We are far from the finish line. We are just working to change the trajectory of the next 50 years for our future. | Preserving our Children | As we mentioned in the intro, the game has changed. 32 Senators took a punch when LB626 failed. In the past, they went home and moved on. 2023 is different. We are so proud of Republicans who took a punch, got back on the horse, and went right back at it and put together an amendment that would pass. They combined abortion restrictions with another bill to protect children to keep the legal subject matter the same (smart). We understand many Republicans remain frustrated at an inferior standard of time for abortions that are less stringent than the timeframe in LB626. However, citizens need to realize 31 of our Republican Senators and Senator McDonnell were committed to the issue from the start. They were not going to walk away from the battle in 2023 and wanted to achieve SOMETHING. This batch of Senators never gave up and showed some real grit that would make our ‘94 Husker offensive line jealous. As you might recall, Senator Aguilar (who was the victim of character assassination this week by the left), was wheeled into the chamber in excruciating pain to cast a historical vote earlier in the session.Yesterday, Senator Slama, who publicly disclosed she was in the hospital for hyperemesis gravidarum, used what energy she had left to get to the chamber from the hospital to make the 33rd vote. This is why I call this team the ‘94 Husker line...they have grit. They were going to push for a vote on the record so more kids would not be lost by another year of inaction. Literal physical health issues didn’t stop this crew. They play hurt. With that said, we don’t believe these topics are finished over the next several years. We do believe the overwhelming majority of Senators worked hard to achieve the best standard possible in 2023. We must pray for our Attorney General who will deal with lawsuits to try and halt this bill. We want to congratulate Senator Hansen for working on an exceptional amendment, Senator Kauth for allowing this amendment to her landmark bill, and Senator McDonnell (Democrat) for voting for this bill to protect our children. For clarity in understanding the bill, the 12 week standard that was adopted was cited as “Gestational Age”. Gestational age on average happens two weeks before actual pregnancy (you can google to learn more). In rough terms, this makes the ban roughly a 10 week standard from actual conception. This is why many people are confused when they read some Senators referring to this as a 10 week ban while other commentators have mentioned a 12 week ban. I wanted to clear that issue up as it was a common question I have received. Finally, time is critical to save more lives. Senator Hansen’s (and his amazing staff) excellent legal work will lead to more children being saved. The emergency clause wisely allows this bill to immediately become law upon the Governor’s signature to save lives. To be clear, the abortion clause will go into immediate effect. The “Let Them Grow” clauses will go into effect in the fall. In the end, it was a joyous day. We give praise. PS. Please forgive my grammar error that went out via email yesterday. My edits in the balcony on my phone during the chaos in the Rotunda did not go well. This will not be my last grammar/spelling mistake...but I had an extra cringe moment when that email first came out...my fault. | | The Government Spending Money | LB 727 was a combination of 30 bills and was heard on Tuesday. At play on a philosophical level is; should the government be DIRECTLY involved in spurring the economy and fund specific projects that in turn will yield more tax dollars. Or...is this not the government’s job to get involved in projects of this size? Of primary consideration was large state expenditures to expand the Nebraska Crossing area outside Gretna. The votes were overwhelming FOR this idea by this batch of Senators. Proponents are arguing that the Return on Investment in future tax revenue will more than pay for the investment by the state. As usual in 2023, there were 30 bills combined into this one bill and many projects are being funded. Of interest to us were key planks in our legislative plan...infrastructure. In this new bill, sales taxes garnered from the sales of aircraft will be diverted to improve runways. We see taxes garnered from items that directly use the infrastructure on infrastructure items being consumed as good tax policy. We believe this philosophy should be followed more extensively in the future. Of little discussion (that deserves more), is Senator Moser’s bill to allow bonding for highway projects. He will need an amendment to get around the prohibition of the state taking on debt. We think this precedent that will trigger state debt needs significant debate. The party has no formal position on this as our SCC has not had a chance to meet and vote on state debt issues. We support infrastructure, but we are a fiscal party as well. We are very weary of debt occurring at the state level. Obviously, we have two conflicting goals at odds with one another. We are just calling for a respectful and robust debate on this topic as this will set a precedent in the future. Finally, on a minor note regarding our agricultural plank...measures were added in this bill that benefit the livestock industry in the form of tax credits or sales tax exemptions on input materials commonly used. | | The Democrats Attempting to Overhaul the Supreme Court | The Democrats proposed a bill to move the Supreme Court from 9 to 13. The purpose? To make the supreme court ‘left’ again. This can’t happen. This will not happen with the House of Representatives controlled by the Republicans. With that said, we cannot take this move for granted. We know the Democrats are actively working to control our entire country. We must work together to continue to preserve our Constitutional institutions as created. LB514 gave the Secretary of State unchecked authority and power to determine whether or not citizenship has been verified. There is no clear requirement of how and to what extent this will be accomplished. This is for the legislature to determine to ensure that it happens. It is not acceptable to delegate their powers in a manner that provides a loophole and creates an opportunity for this requirement to not be fully achieved. The state legislature has US Constitutional authority to outline state elections...not the state executive branch. The tone that is being set is the Secretary of State’s office is defining the legislation that they feel they can, and should administer. In reality, it should be the opposite. The Secretary of State’s office needs to find a way to administer what the citizens of Nebraska prescribed as they are the 2nd house with the ability to write and pass Constitutional law. We need our executive branch to execute the legislative law...not define it. The 514 bill requires a voter to present a photo ID or just the number of the identification card when obtaining an Early ballot, but when Early Ballots are returned, nothing is required to prove the legitimate voter is casting the ballot. Again, this does not match the language in our Constitution. Another clear violation of the Constitution is allowing voters to simply write down the number on the driver’s license or similar identification as “presenting valid photographic identification”. Several times in this bill, exemptions to the Photo ID requirement set a lesser standard for different voters. This is absolutely not following the letter of the law! Nebraskans want to trust our elections. They want to know that their vote is not being circumvented and impeded by illegitimate ballots being inserted into our elections. It does not matter if the illegal ballot is injected in person or via absentee voting, either way their vote would be violated and destroyed. The correct language and process to meet the constitutional requirements is clear. The party invested heavily into Sen Erdman’s LB230 to accomplish the intent and letter of this law. At this time, we are backing away from supporting any of the proposed Voter ID measures as it appears the Constitutional intent of the people is not being met. We clearly have different interpretations of “Before Casting”. “Before” can mean when they are registered to vote for the Secretary of State and other Senators. “Before” to the party means at the time of deposit of the ballot into the box. We believe the word is tied directly to “Casting”. We simply disagree. We have offered to help in the past and we still have a strong framework in LB230 to refer to. Like the Secretary of State, we have no power to write legislation. However, we do have the power to lobby those who can and we have. However, it was clear who was allowed to drive the ship forward the last 3 weeks on this legislation. It was not the party whose members around the state invested HEAVILY into this issue. Updating the language in the LB230 bill to ensure the exceptions in the Indiana case should not be a difficult hurdle. Again, we stress that the Supreme Court recognized the plaintiffs did not achieve a burden to vote that overcame the interests of the state in preventing fraud. The fact that LB230 has not even been considered to accomplish this goal is a disservice. At this point, no bill is better than a bad bill. This bill may need to be moved to the beginning of 2024 to make sure Nebraska gets this right. We will provide immediate updates on this issue should we find legislation that passes the will of the people AND observes Constitutional law as drafted. Only clearing one of those hurdles is not a standard we support. Trying to get something passed to get this done is not a posture we are willing to take understanding the consequences this may have over the next 20 years. We completely understand compromise is necessary in legislation but we will refuse to compromise Constitutional law that is a bedrock of our Republic. Until next week....celebrate the wins of the week but carry forward the focus of change until the end of the session. We have big issues remaining. Voter ID, taxes, and opportunity scholarships to name a few. We are happy but not content. Please continue to pray for energy and rest at the Capitol. People are exhausted from the battles, but big work remains. Carry on... | Todd Watson Political Director NEGOP | | | | | | | | | | | | "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY" | | Copyright © 2023 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf5cl3qk78p51g4tobiu05f6vqsh8bj9dcbrn0qo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhmcoj3cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo776grasunhph8162q00mnkifoto9dp45oou3v0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhmcoj3cph2bs)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

clean_body: I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians. | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear Friend, I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians. I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes. But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below: I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Ted Cruz
subject: URGENT: Here is the situation we’re facing…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
Urgent message from Ted Cruz to all supporters and staff...

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoamlu1ohcaguh8h5gfcum6p0mpkcsqd2jec49d0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhmcoj2c9h2bs)
---
Fellow Conservative, **Here is the situation:** As you have heard, Rep. Colin Allred, a hardcore liberal, has just announced he is running against me in my United States Senate race in Texas. Who is he? He is a far-left Democrat. As a member of Congress, he has voted with Nancy Pelosi an astonishing 100% of the time. What that means is on every issue Texans care about, **he's voted wrong**. So he's voted for open borders over and over again. He's voted for higher taxes over and over again. He's voted for 87,000 new IRS agents. He's voted for massive new regulations. He's voted for the Biden administration's assault on oil, gas and energy production here in Texas and all over the United States. **This race is going to be one hell of a fight...** My last Senate reelection was in 2018. In 2018, it was the most expensive Senate race in the history of our nation in terms of hard money. We were outspent three to one. They absolutely flooded the zone with money and media. **And let me tell you what Democrats did in 2018--** They increased Democrat turnout in the state of Texas, from 1.8 million, all the way up to 4 million, where they more than doubled Democrat turnout in Texas. Now, we saw that coming and we leaned in hard. We increased Republican turnout from 2.8 million, all the way up to 4.2 million. But point two was the whole margin we had- we won by 200,000 votes out of more than 8 million votes cast- that shows the kind of battle it's going to be... Texas is the single biggest prize for Democrats in the country. It's not rocket science, if you're a Democrat, after Donald Trump, there is no Republican in the country you want to beat more than me. _They're going to_ __flood the state with cash__ _trying_ to flip Texas blue- and it has already begun... It's just been a few days since Allred announced he's running against me in 2024. **But he 's already raised $2 MILLION, setting a new 2024 fundraising record.** Democrats are all in. **I need your strong and generous support to fight back- just like we did in 2018. I need your help more than ever before. And I 'm asking you to please step up right now >>**
---
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY DONATION TO TED CRUZ >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2tof9f30agk4qplkhef0a9olerm4vb650fbchn8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhmcoj2c9h2bs)
---
Thanks for your help at this crucial moment. For Liberty,

body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9uebkg013e8qp273ph9cbo24fni8sre8tritc50_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhmcoj5cjh2bs)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z58065s28jodmjg951kfc00tp6giufmp611bqmq8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhmcoj5cjh2bs)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk42uqat8bnv8nqs92qg94ff73g0uqhbucdloeqo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhmcoj5cjh2bs)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. clean_body: I never thought that my own government would spy on me. Hello Friend, I never thought that my own government would spy on me. I have always loved my country. That's why I've dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, good or bad , it had to be published. When I started my investigation, I hadn't even met President Trump. But this investigation changed my life forever ... Trump did NOT collude with Russia. My investigation discovered the FBI 's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionall y to get rid of President Trump. It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news. Once I found the truth, that's when the spying began... Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees. As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters. I set a goal to raise $45,000 by the end of the week, and we're behind in reaching that goal. Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are innocent until proven guilty must join together in this fight. Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system. This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution. Due process has been destroyed. We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots. Whether you're a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that's what Kash Foundation is doing. Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below. Thank you, Kash Patel P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles. I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots. The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Deroy Murdock 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo7i495eg9b954tjlccemhvp6n9lp369lgaqitvo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhmcoj5c3h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zijn2mc4jpvq0nenbj68ldglq6tmjvou17brceuo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhmcoj5c3h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zngll6lfeouuifloao40djs7ihnr102n6n7qbbto_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhmcoj5c3h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z81s084vf2c4ct7dkdvsjsql1to1070mvs94v3ug_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhmcoj5c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

Date: 05/21/2023 RE: New coalition announced, Nikki’s latest stop totals Hi Peter, it’s Betsy, Nikki Haley’s campaign manager. As one of Nikki Haley’s most trusted supporters, I want to make sure you’re up to date on what’s taking place on the campaign trail and give you some insight on our campaign strategy. After you finish reading this update, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f9906efb3648ccfde4fa6050bd4412611d453e3aeecc00d74664abffc801008097bb9176105cbcb89e1c756c14250602fd9e6725f1a254b504b2ab80d0b3e96a please consider pitching in a donation to help us continue to build key infrastructure and get Nikki’s message out to every American. CAMPAIGN STRATEGY UPDATE AS OF 5/21/2023: Nikki’s continuing to build her grassroots operations with back-to-back swings and the launch and expansion of her coalitions. Nikki just wrapped up her fourth swing in Iowa. She hosted standing-room-only town halls and meet and greets in Ankeny, Waterloo, Dubuque, Davenport, and more. Throughout the week, Nikki met and shook hands with hundreds of voters, answered questions, and talked with every Iowan she could. Next week, she’ll be back in New Hampshire for events in https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f9906efb3648ccfd52a0e4d978cefcc92c78e1697a9834977f1453b4e413a594a3ae06632140208af346a97ddac2384c7c93a25cc48c1df3d745600893a206fd Bedford , https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f9906efb3648ccfd9dbf0cd855da8e6f8535622bbe7b2a645ac1c7656e451a8ad75e47e8f99f4e3370e787b896790d8b651ca9343905edcfb4ab2a0fd0dc4cb5 Concord , https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f9906efb3648ccfd02d893b62ace6e668927fa609bc59df482b3cbf49a8023a26296e4863f9a1ea354d9aced7cff62f8018d63fd77f9d4430436ef3915dc2f69 Rye , and more. Just Announced! Next week, Nikki will launch her https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f9906efb3648ccfdbf669396077e7831af042c0e3ab103e9c192b7701d0127f51a9eca92601e570072adeff5038d98dd3e05491dfa65d1111ed04d4517e9911f Veterans for Nikki coalition. Along with the launch of her new coalition, she’ll be holding her FIRST New Hampshire https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f9906efb3648ccfdaeb01ad8ea841bebfb06f8d27747bfb8472e9aef88927e2dbdc3804e1aa6c6107eacf4e327f60983d5ec011ea2ff30dc2c3e8dc74aabc3f3 Women for Nikki event. → Read more: Haley to launch Veterans for Nikki coalition during NH stop next week ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f9906efb3648ccfdd61e9299c7369f57a3b380b002b3cf83e9aff9bf24bf8f89dd9522a782a1a2e0e3f695fb3189888fc1a6b4dc550bef79a6692858203f4af0 Fox News ) Latest Stop Totals: Nikki’s been all over the country with a jam-packed schedule. She’s had 22 stops in Iowa, and after next week’s New Hampshire swing, she’ll be up to 28 stops in the Granite State. Iowa is the FIRST caucus and New Hampshire is the FIRST primary, followed by South Carolina. Election Day is going to be here before we know it, which is why coalition building across the country and early investments in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina will be KEY to victory in 2024. Join our coalitions today or share with your friends:→ https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f9906efb3648ccfdaeb01ad8ea841bebfb06f8d27747bfb8472e9aef88927e2dbdc3804e1aa6c6107eacf4e327f60983d5ec011ea2ff30dc2c3e8dc74aabc3f3 Join Women for Nikki! → https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f9906efb3648ccfdbf669396077e7831af042c0e3ab103e9c192b7701d0127f51a9eca92601e570072adeff5038d98dd3e05491dfa65d1111ed04d4517e9911f Join Veterans for Nikki! UPDATE ON OUR GRASSROOTS MOVEMENT: Nikki is working every single hour of the day to talk with voters, put on events, build field teams, and set up a strong infrastructure in these early states. But she can’t do it alone. That’s where you come in, Peter. Nikki needs her grassroots supporters more than ever before in order to travel to battleground states like Iowa and New Hampshire, host town halls, and reach every American with her conservative message. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f9906efb3648ccfde4fa6050bd4412611d453e3aeecc00d74664abffc801008097bb9176105cbcb89e1c756c14250602fd9e6725f1a254b504b2ab80d0b3e96a Will you chip in to fuel Nikki’s campaign and her upcoming events? name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Red, White, and Blue
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsBSxi3DtN

Pro-Life Statement

Are you worried about what kids are learning in school
today? I know I am.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osBSxi3DtN

Hello,
Are you
worried about what kids are learning in school today? I know I
am.

That's
why I wanted to do something about it by creating the Little
Patriots Program.

The
Little Patriots Program provides a curriculum for grades K-5 that
teaches the REAL history of America.

We
provide this curriculum free of charge for parents, grandparents,
guardians, homeschoolers, and teachers.

We are
also working with conservative Hollywood producers to create a
tremendous cartoon series called "Star Spangled Adventures" that
helps explain each lesson in a fun and entertaining way.

We have
big plans for more lessons and more cartoons, but we need your
help to keep them free for those who need them.

That's
why I am emailing you today.

I have
written a brand-new children's book, Red, White, and Blue: Our
Flag Matters to Me and You, to teach kids why we stand for our
American flag and the freedoms it represents.

I wanted
to send it to you for a gift of $25 or more.

All the
proceeds from the book will go directly back to supporting our
Little Patriots Program so we can keep making curricula and
cartoons that show the history of America.

This is
the easiest way to help us make sure we are giving our children
the best possible resources.

Your gift
of $25 or more today will help us reach more children and you'll
also receive a copy of Red, White, and Blue: Our Flag Matters to
Me and You with my compliments.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder
and Chairman, American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isBSxi3DtN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osBSxi3DtN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8edoi88o8og8i7bqf5njslonoveq1aapa28g130_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhm6o74cdh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1tcq6cktm851gt2chnme2jq2ijhukppn3lptbto_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhm6o74cdh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zero8krr8ukpoacbdmo6r4vn0j1nuv29uddnmms8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhm6o74cdh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

body:
The FBI launched the investigation with ZERO justification.

Hello Friend,

The Durham Report reveals what we knew all along - **Russiagate is a political crime syndicate, the FBI rigged our elections, and they unlawfully targeted President Trump.**

_The FBI launched the investigation with**ZERO justification**._ Even CNN has to report that on their fake news website.

It was 5 years ago that I led the House investigation into Russiagate with Devin Nunes. Our report from then says the exact same thing as the Durham Report. The FBI had ZERO justification for going after President Trump. But for 5 years, the fake news media lied to the American public.

**Make no mistake:** The DOJ and FBI conspired with the fake news media to bury the truth.

America cannot let this happen again.

After serving under President Trump, I created the Kash Foundation. **The Kash Foundation provides legal aid to veterans, American-first patriots, and whistle-blowers fighting to expose the Deep State corruption.** We fund litigation grants for individuals who have been wronged, release documentation exposing government corruption, and call out each government operator that betrayed their oath of office.

I am on a mission to _**defeat**_ the Government Gangsters who robbed the American people of justice.

Now more than ever, I am counting on your support.

The investigation is the punishment. It allows the media to coordinate with government gangsters to smear your reputation and rig elections. The DOJ has unlimited resources while you have to fight in court for potentially years. It bankrupts America.

It has to stop. We are going to put an end to it.

[Please rush your support to the Kash Foundation and help us defeat the government gangsters weaponizing our DOJ >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zssied9d3tg221eua8v1jc765uvfddnpl92fqnbg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhm6o74cdh2bs)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7cksdb4907h0bfcndsfc7d28iu66p7trp82aoio_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhm6o74cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj4t4vatqkfuctvu9bd2si2auu9e1ooeirfqc598_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdhm6o74cth2bs)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3q559iu572f1aoehqj7ti5u6p6a7493amhnsch0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdjm0ob2clh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpcpdr585r0fcu8e38uuf5c5onkc0qjuge7ru4i0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdjm0ob2clh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6468ievic9206m08tslvj0urvfvd0s1c6eshb58_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdjm0ob2clh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

Goal: **1,000 Donors

[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z45kuog3jd9qv3jkrcdand64u8gnusgtvgia38f8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdjm0ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8figccr0fa34n8gcb2ca2ri2hclokme422dqndg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdjm0ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zspu3qr584sdhvf81lofrgmr1v2kcb8fj2dci50o_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdjm0ob2clh2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztuvt80rrc4ehiv9f9tjitkfeu4449fuieqnglv8_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdjm0ob2clh2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zirk4dtu7vlsltb9nacejj1kp19lh47u1nnjrp08_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdjm0ob2clh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs4klti8mfb9b6e3uk0hjpklv4o3q3urv7hcbl8g_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdjm0ob2clh2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpcfh8pqn2cpargrkmt6kaa69d63fbp1nm5a2beg_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdjm0ob2clh2bs)

Kash Patel

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
{{md5_hash}}
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z96eskrcf4e0r7upk3gppb8l9bgs6836irccsq68_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdjm2o34c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za6pj7hmjonb0m318q0e8cmjj38fn89dqe9spjgo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdjm2o34c3h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zoklvljjt6rn5hk78l8ks9bp9c66s607d4ks1u30_rp22sh2s8i66o71cdjm2o34c3h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: AMERICAN FREEDOM DIES IN JULY 2023?!
body:
It is nothing less than the gravest threat to personal freedom I've seen

| | | | | | | **AMERICAN FREEDOM DIES IN JULY 2023?!**
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89c1eaa1de7040958a6b9e6c853a3ea5&_e=5xeSrHZw0scIibQJLNonpxsK8OgNzwZeRoRhAG_Sho2yyVnb3nV8K5RFQ2vw2LorMFD5GGBdSz8xzlXzr43PbtCgIsaajYk6wD2qRoT9uxAjrABSNwSkX-GVRJbh0et-O1iMHseJqPGETa1SbRj796rXEb4XI3UrRb5zYYePBenLZNQuU9R2rmj2kQjoPehd17jboW2Pn4H-fZly3ENTHMgVpbBkxJ77BhsDyN4ZZ3JojPpvP3qp5C-khj_iSfhVMlcX42i0cOoF6ElnkJucJg%3D%3D)
**This 93-page federal document outlines one of the most horrifying things I 've uncovered in my 51 years of bank analysis and market forecasting. It goes into effect just months from now. [Click to see the details and how to protect yourself while you still can](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89c1eaa1de7040958a6b9e6c853a3ea5&_e=5xeSrHZw0scIibQJLNonpxsK8OgNzwZeRoRhAG_Sho2yyVnb3nV8K5RFQ2vw2LorMFD5GGBdSz8xzlXzr43PbtCgIsaajYk6wD2qRoT9uxAjrABSNwSkX-GVRJbh0et-Cq5jRnGeMYQ2FfaPTREtPme_UxIuRpwZdt0VwKRQBQECOE_9s_PuThjqhX2PQ8HrLptuj4MpTTy58fah8fGkew6Neq5XDOf4M4KOOFy4JnVtBunSfiF8t2psoqqYEHtB7W54FId3p8JnYE1_QlhCJg%3D%3D).**
Dear Subscriber,
Imagine a government agent gets assigned to snoop through your bank account ...
To see if your transactions are considered a "threat" to their agenda.
If that idea sickens you ... or you don't think it could happen in this country ... then pay very close attention:
---
Because according to the document I'm holding here, starting as soon as July 2023, you could log in to your bank account and see a flashing red alert that ...
Your account has been frozen.
Your ability to access your own money -- frozen.
Sending and receiving funds -- frozen.
Your crime?
You didn't commit one.
Instead, it's because of the U.S. government's new program that gives unelected officials the power to monitor and even freeze your account based on your behavior, and potentially, even your political views.
**It is nothing less than the gravest threat to personal freedom I 've seen in my 51 years as a bank analyst and market forecaster.**
[Today, I'm revealing the details of this plan,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89c1eaa1de7040958a6b9e6c853a3ea5&_e=5xeSrHZw0scIibQJLNonpxsK8OgNzwZeRoRhAG_Sho2yyVnb3nV8K5RFQ2vw2LorMFD5GGBdSz8xzlXzr43PbtCgIsaajYk6wD2qRoT9uxAjrABSNwSkX-GVRJbh0et-yVI54gEanzBYFlvaz-WBY_emRGKV3V0_D_8Y33Lf9WQhA58q1_oSb5j7iICT0VXzmNPjbjGXK2tCMkHrjLC31VLnAAsK_6QONlwwIlNpC3JJqUYbi29HUG7JCFkDMpQJlMbojhgdwVlWp7JOHCXeCw%3D%3D) along with specific steps you must take to safeguard your wealth before this program becomes active.
This is no "Chicken Little, sky-is-falling" moment. This is real.
If you ignore this threat, you do so at great risk to your financial security and everything you've ever worked for.
[Secure access to my time-sensitive warning video](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89c1eaa1de7040958a6b9e6c853a3ea5&_e=5xeSrHZw0scIibQJLNonpxsK8OgNzwZeRoRhAG_Sho2yyVnb3nV8K5RFQ2vw2LorMFD5GGBdSz8xzlXzr43PbtCgIsaajYk6wD2qRoT9uxAjrABSNwSkX-GVRJbh0et-ao3o1wwJ1ve-FlRAfmb8464npleoOinyGzpwtcZo0Ix6Y5fAqwWwMw1u62unU8W7sWzPGSiL5YhmKkiEiSqrxOf0dOckzIW-uQYz7Ne_ZLIJTWXkhTvUPJyHJAPpnuvfx8zSVOo77kaVmbBEeci_rw%3D%3D) and protect yourself while there is still time.
Good luck and God bless!
---
Martin D. Weiss, PhD
Founder of Weiss Ratings

Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33408-3080
