name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15763ca524324f3eb9c236457913a8c6&_e=Kt2gRX0_DPxoZGQH4SoBcApt-MrUL6JtrwmJ7aDQXZY219aUpe80pXFozAvF212lfVRsUN9mUQRKV6LnXqzzqT1iYAqepA9h3AN2qosUdajRhySa9QLPbJMNfaqg1b4T3AaQy3wzJTw3Xr5V9h-uwaotu3ZVz5NGgFDyAcUinkotI6eAhnM3uuCEDtPb-4XksuJ1Xl2_vaaVaLgE_IooB-4ewgAXJgvWuufD721NQv5z_UnTX5M6CMEf_B0-58PIYUoVTifaIJ8mvcEyPbH1k6SQG5-sTZDUL0RuHmbSec212vKG-tOQd4EluzYIFyDZR9hDi-jopyCWS-UR7-T2spdnsmnoz7LM8nYuB1XpsIk0a-VU2hUUsCS2P7aMI2QGLdsX1LRRIDpM534yLxka35tW_Vay5iWHywd4GSsZlto%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15763ca524324f3eb9c236457913a8c6&_e=Kt2gRX0_DPxoZGQH4SoBcApt-MrUL6JtrwmJ7aDQXZY219aUpe80pXFozAvF212lfVRsUN9mUQRKV6LnXqzzqT1iYAqepA9h3AN2qosUdajRhySa9QLPbJMNfaqg1b4T3AaQy3wzJTw3Xr5V9h-uwaotu3ZVz5NGgFDyAcUinkotI6eAhnM3uuCEDtPb-4XksuJ1Xl2_vaaVaLgE_IooB-4ewgAXJgvWuufD721NQv5z_UnTX5M6CMEf_B0-58PI_0lcpiwiQVrBhxBgl4aE_X5P7KbGrzQ6DxK71VBSw39zJpCe6irmS8zth5AnoeecSy8k_A6G3HLlDuWgDh_zkKlLqXXviZ0hNpjft9EzVBmp0u5rumYWtVO0_HcXYL-K8HHzlgMMe7Wnwj0Z3EmBB8OJdWdItNhWhpK0SlW6JRE%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15763ca524324f3eb9c236457913a8c6&_e=Kt2gRX0_DPxoZGQH4SoBcApt-MrUL6JtrwmJ7aDQXZY219aUpe80pXFozAvF212lfVRsUN9mUQRKV6LnXqzzqT1iYAqepA9h3AN2qosUdajRhySa9QLPbJMNfaqg1b4T3AaQy3wzJTw3Xr5V9h-uwaotu3ZVz5NGgFDyAcUinkotI6eAhnM3uuCEDtPb-4XksuJ1Xl2_vaaVaLgE_IooB-4ewgAXJgvWuufD721NQv5z_UnTX5M6CMEf_B0-58PIqqqu_w8_XI-sqhM4bJyKONRYo0148VHKXCI9wZdCmsN4Ug9Wxct5qtv8EUOdtN7odeaEWQcM-6IgwxSauzooSCfP3WhjrkEFPqG50NI4g0zrd743t897TYop-ajFCRJ5WP0Zv_J2OzrmTDTWu7V-lOnwNSjnbiYUjxxsMc8eYvk%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a60479289134a8184587fceb66c6904&_e=IBgL6O-jzr2-Co98s-2yPaVCcLGK-eKK0S1KR49iq06JMnf8_S572xoDsgX-vWYCI39w0QhyRmYTXPPqzki16qNWmjGm60Q7XhFJzefuHx7Y89GJ1mrZgDD4gDn2cx9O4IRGkQ83Ol33nJK7KkEi42k-7Y2KXJPiZ2-jGbHJg9iHNzPUakK4c56N-nVKtMb6p9ZeBNBRq-pREEqjJx8LDZw1AukQ-hYg5l2kyUHlxSb62oEqCnrz87IaexTMJa0X_KfRbxt0rMFDlf7k6rvdQA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a60479289134a8184587fceb66c6904&_e=IBgL6O-jzr2-Co98s-2yPaVCcLGK-eKK0S1KR49iq06JMnf8_S572xoDsgX-vWYCI39w0QhyRmYTXPPqzki16qNWmjGm60Q7XhFJzefuHx7Y89GJ1mrZgDD4gDn2cx9OCOXGSphfqb9KYo74QoSdniZXB0Pfu_CHMKEXsKfPUQndM5oaByXcyowMGiA1kP3L3KCfMFoQ4lUZGAnhQ8COcqoqlXuOGzHUqrYzwQQ25BQPbgTEgKiUUIILBKlsd2apE-B-_3xNVVA09m-H_3xyww%3D%3D)

body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1910b1945aab4ad2b4f8d792876d382e&_e=DAaX82Vdm9WLZ9DNy0nzW7OxTwEzsJ958yBVtco9iXVlCpF7msVgOh6GxRfRUjb82c9kbMNpbLqis2xy3MWqoZ95kfR9xN8kTwDZEWus-4JCVaTTGPewjF_tygQft_HgXX0BwrmnulcKuKzt7bIwr7LNJfs3jPa-2Mp-JD2aFQqcXjr0C3gWKpjX5nXnZH_Dr7PNwlJfEgpBVzZTzaZpfTRLGsxB0Me8F3wMkfeNqvqkUk7SoE43eKihw2v40ptbHW1P3GJma_yU0CLWe3frGmXYs6gO6Q7giQiz8LFK34w1yY8PytYh-Ud0E5XaB-UPs1NwgMAravG44wWnLe_bEU5X3PWeuVEqxFfAU00J8xV_bxrdH_HEi_cA-xYHqinzZKfBrj2QGyEKPlSK8Q7ySzWisp4D759Ujpn4-F-6VRE%3D)

| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1910b1945aab4ad2b4f8d792876d382e&_e=DAaX82Vdm9WLZ9DNy0nzW7OxTwEzsJ958yBVtco9iXVlCpF7msVgOh6GxRfRUjb82c9kbMNpbLqis2xy3MWqoZ95kfR9xN8kTwDZEWus-4JCVaTTGPewjF_tygQft_HgXX0BwrmnulcKuKzt7bIwr7LNJfs3jPa-2Mp-JD2aFQqcXjr0C3gWKpjX5nXnZH_Dr7PNwlJfEgpBVzZTzaZpfTRLGsxB0Me8F3wMkfeNqvqkUk7SoE43eKihw2v40ptbHW1P3GJma_yU0CLWe3frGv2y8eBXLTllzMT_hXx3fnGqCaMUmPEwzzp75dixjXjCMVWR6XNmNPCEhnwHnCL8leQAxmR9ia3MOcB0sD_UWpajN_TgJdAXyT9BS1QDcdpIXKQXKHkk_2MWKYLzNydxhxiQc2Ql8Vm1zv3hPFmgb9w%3D)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine. To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23. In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below: I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

subject: VIRGINIA IS FOR LOVERS, NOT RINOS!

body:
Dems get involved in my race
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b3KTEfQew6S5A2M73-YufMftlVmF8AgpuYxb9Nl2GbmLkaNMutbdodt9bG-zfNkH0IT04cowTSt0kP4x9ioC674AUVbORaQMXlsuedXZenrU2NNb7xE6JXg7xCjBlWAoXwNjR1DZTq-0a_1Xf1MwuQNrHzNkXvpYaJ135Vrdjiw=&c=FGsI63JHg1rvDo1P2VDwWijSH_cVbZdBbjIiDULkRr2iR3jxpYv5oA==&ch=ErGZh-AlspRyTABDWN6nONKjBQjdes5_D7w2-NDbclbZf3b_DDFU1Q==)

I talk to you a lot about how the Democrats are trying to stop me because I am a true Conservative. But the Left isn't the only one crusading to take me down. My name is Senator Amanda Chase, and I have been a patriot since day one. I don't just talk the talk, I walk the walk. I have made good on every campaign promise I have made and I'm not going to stop fighting for the people of Virginia's 12th District. Maybe we don't talk about it enough because, at a time when our country is more fractured than ever, we NEED party unity. But we aren't united. We haven't been for a long time. [Our party needs to take control of the Virginia Senate once and for all, but we can't do that with RINOs coming for solid Red seats. That is why I NEED you to join my team today!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b3KTEfQew6S5A2M73-YufMftlVmF8AgpuYxb9Nl2GbmLkaNMutbdodt9bG-zfNkH0IT04cowTSt0kP4x9ioC674AUVbORaQMXlsuedXZenrU2NNb7xE6JXg7xCjBlWAoXwNjR1DZTq-0a_1Xf1MwuQNrHzNkXvpYaJ135Vrdjiw=&c=FGsI63JHg1rvDo1P2VDwWijSH_cVbZdBbjIiDULkRr2iR3jxpYv5oA==&ch=ErGZh-AlspRyTABDWN6nONKjBQjdes5_D7w2-NDbclbZf3b_DDFU1Q==) Being Conservative used to mean something. We fought for low taxes. We fount for personal freedoms. We fought for the Constitution. We fought for life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. And most importantly, we fought for the only thing God truly gave us: free will. So I think it is only fitting we look to him to tell us what we have known all along:
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b3KTEfQew6S5A2M73-YufMftlVmF8AgpuYxb9Nl2GbmLkaNMutbdodt9bG-zfNkH0IT04cowTSt0kP4x9ioC674AUVbORaQMXlsuedXZenrU2NNb7xE6JXg7xCjBlWAoXwNjR1DZTq-0a_1Xf1MwuQNrHzNkXvpYaJ135Vrdjiw=&c=FGsI63JHg1rvDo1P2VDwWijSH_cVbZdBbjIiDULkRr2iR3jxpYv5oA==&ch=ErGZh-AlspRyTABDWN6nONKjBQjdes5_D7w2-NDbclbZf3b_DDFU1Q==)
---
| Right now, ravenous wolves are taking over our party, and we are sitting idly by while they pick us off one by one. I, for one can't sit quietly by while they blatantly betray my district. I have stayed silent for too long about the attacks from my own party. My opponent, Glen Sturtevant, was voted OUT of office because he was a RINO! It seems retirement didn't serve Glen well because not only has he primaried me but he hasn't learned a thing. [Put your faith in someone who has been a strong Conservative from the start! Someone who proves it with every vote!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b3KTEfQew6S5A2M73-YufMftlVmF8AgpuYxb9Nl2GbmLkaNMutbdodt9bG-zfNkH0IT04cowTSt0kP4x9ioC674AUVbORaQMXlsuedXZenrU2NNb7xE6JXg7xCjBlWAoXwNjR1DZTq-0a_1Xf1MwuQNrHzNkXvpYaJ135Vrdjiw=&c=FGsI63JHg1rvDo1P2VDwWijSH_cVbZdBbjIiDULkRr2iR3jxpYv5oA==&ch=ErGZh-AlspRyTABDWN6nONKjBQjdes5_D7w2-NDbclbZf3b_DDFU1Q==) Glen didn't take his time to reflect and realize that now more than ever we NEED Conservative Patriots in Virginia. Instead, he thinks he can take advantage of the new district lines and get MY constituents to vote me out on his woke platform. Even worse than that is Glen's big endorsement!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b3KTEfQew6S5A2M73-YufMftlVmF8AgpuYxb9Nl2GbmLkaNMutbdodt9bG-zfNkH0IT04cowTSt0kP4x9ioC674AUVbORaQMXlsuedXZenrU2NNb7xE6JXg7xCjBlWAoXwNjR1DZTq-0a_1Xf1MwuQNrHzNkXvpYaJ135Vrdjiw=&c=FGsI63JHg1rvDo1P2VDwWijSH_cVbZdBbjIiDULkRr2iR3jxpYv5oA==&ch=ErGZh-AlspRyTABDWN6nONKjBQjdes5_D7w2-NDbclbZf3b_DDFU1Q==)
---
| In case you aren't familiar with Terry McAuliffe, he ran he is a former Leftist Governor of Virginia that once again ran for election against Glen Youngkin, and LOST! Meanwhile, Terry McAuliffe leaned into the woke mob and told parents across Virginia that they had no place in their children's education. I wonder if Glen Sturtevant feels the same way. He and Terry probably see eye to eye on that issue since they seem to agree on all the others. They both supported gun control, they both support abortion, and they both opposed school choice. Let me ask you, does Glen even sound like a Republican to you? I guess that's why they are RINOs. But the worst part is that my party has betrayed their sitting Senator, and the Establishment wants to see me gone. Why? Because I don't answer to them! I only answer to YOU! They don't like that I can't be controlled. They don't like that I vote the way our principles and our God tells us to, not the way the lobbyists want me to. That is why it is more important than ever that I get your support today! Early voting is already underway, and my opponents are outspending and outraising me. [That is because I would rather spend time legislating or fundraising, but this is a necessary evil. With just a few weeks left before the election, I am asking you to dig deep and help us get across the finish line! Donate $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000, or more today!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b3KTEfQew6S5A2M73-YufMftlVmF8AgpuYxb9Nl2GbmLkaNMutbdodt9bG-zfNkH0IT04cowTSt0kP4x9ioC674AUVbORaQMXlsuedXZenrU2NNb7xE6JXg7xCjBlWAoXwNjR1DZTq-0a_1Xf1MwuQNrHzNkXvpYaJ135Vrdjiw=&c=FGsI63JHg1rvDo1P2VDwWijSH_cVbZdBbjIiDULkRr2iR3jxpYv5oA==&ch=ErGZh-AlspRyTABDWN6nONKjBQjdes5_D7w2-NDbclbZf3b_DDFU1Q==) We need to show these RINOs that we can, and we will win as patriots, not by betraying what this party stands for!
---

body:
See what the AG and Team have been doing this week in the Commonwealth!
---
| | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=caed460209dfb711bd8bc7c14c4b1dd86021700e40889a35c9435b4811acdff580c6d2c254cd8bbd7d6d4d537fbf1afdf946182b2ed3f45c)
---
| | **National Police Week**
---
**_Law enforcement 's ability to protect and serve _****_is dependent on strong judicial systems. _**
---
| | [READ AG MIYARES' OP-ED](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=caed460209dfb7117e3a96960f8b1a800e76a17456ff10961d9255334575ad91bf4a6d07afcd1c2196816db1630e36d347af1dfdfd831401)
---
This National Police Week, we honor our law enforcement heroes and continue to advocate for prosecutors who will enforce the law instead of deliberately circumventing or disregarding it.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=caed460209dfb711a551401d6665963b2d203f8ab2663589f266d05c268bcdbd6dafdb71ff0ab46cc0c8a40beb495a93e823fc05189f2fd3)

---
|
---
| **Honoring Our Heroes**
---
|
---
Attorney General Miyares joined in delivering remarks at the Commonwealth Public Safety Memorial in honor of National Police Week.
---
|
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=caed460209dfb7116b5ee06d2b2437afc40e4297118d3b2a77066c84e9597ba01bfc1ef9db6d1c9f7da1de5c43524c12197c92bd2a088722)
---
Attorney General Miyares joined nearly two dozen state attorneys general in urging the Biden Administration to uphold Title IX protections for women and girls. The federal government is once again overstepping Congress and the States by proposing a rule that would force every public school to allow biological boys to play on girls' teams. **_The proposed rule places Title IX - and the future of women's sports - in jeopardy. _** _" Biological men and women have genetic differences - that's just a scientific fact. Many of those biological differences often lead to men being taller, stronger, and faster - therefore putting them at an athletic advantage. That's exactly why we have women's sports, and why Title IX exists - to create an environment where our female athletes can thrive, be competitive, and be celebrated." _ **- Attorney General Miyares**
---
| | [READ MORE HERE](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=caed460209dfb7116b5ee06d2b2437afc40e4297118d3b2a77066c84e9597ba01bfc1ef9db6d1c9f7da1de5c43524c12197c92bd2a088722)

Delegate Rob Bloxom, Attorney General Miyares, Reverend Bill McClung, Holly Westergren, and ESCBA President John Fiege at the ESCBA Prayer Breakfast.

**In response to a surge of overdose deaths nationwide related to xylazine, Attorney General Miyares is urging Congress to pass the Combating Illicit Xylazine Act, which would provide critical measures to combat the widespread illicit use and trafficking of xylazine and help prevent xylazine-related deaths. ** **Xylazine is a potent veterinary medication used to sedate and relieve pain in large animals. However, it is not an opioid, thus existing medications like naloxone are not effective in reversing the drug 's effects even if mixed with opioids. ** _" Xylazine will decimate our country if Congress fails to take quick action to combat this emerging threat and save invaluable lives. Recently, the DEA noted that a kilogram of powdered xylazine can be easily purchased online from Chinese suppliers for only $6-$20. This provides traffickers and Cartels with a cheap mechanism to increase their profits and retain dependent customers."_ **- Attorney General Miyares**

clean_body: See what the AG and Team have been doing this week in the Commonwealth! | | | | | | | | | National Police Week Law enforcement 's ability to protect and serve is dependent on strong judicial systems. | | This National Police Week, we honor our law enforcement heroes and continue to advocate for prosecutors who will enforce the law instead of deliberately circumventing or disregarding it. | | | | | Honoring Our Heroes | Attorney General Miyares joined in delivering remarks at the Commonwealth Public Safety Memorial in honor of National Police Week. | | | | Attorney General Miyares joined nearly two dozen state attorneys general in urging the Biden Administration to uphold Title IX protections for women and girls. The federal government is once again overstepping Congress and the States by proposing a rule that would force every public school to allow biological boys to play on girls' teams. The proposed rule places Title IX - and the future of women's sports - in jeopardy. " Biological men and women have genetic differences - that's just a scientific fact. Many of those biological differences often lead to men being taller, stronger, and faster - therefore putting them at an athletic advantage. That's exactly why we have women's sports, and why Title IX exists - to create an environment where our female athletes can thrive, be competitive, and be celebrated." - Attorney General Miyares | | | | | AG Miyares enjoyed getting out to the Eastern Shore this week and got to see some great folks at the Eastern Shore Christian Businessmen's Association's annual prayer breakfast! | Delegate Rob Bloxom, Attorney General Miyares, Reverend Bill McClung, Holly Westergren, and ESCBA President John Fiege at the ESCBA Prayer Breakfast. | Attorney General Miyares with Broadwater Academy students. | Delegate Rob Bloxom, Chief Deputy Chad Kellam, Attorney General Miyares, Chief Deputy Christopher Childress, and Sheriff David Doughty on Monday holding. | Attorney General Miyares and Delegate Bloxom speaking to constituents. | | The Diamond Anniversary | | Attorney General Miyares was honored to speak at the International Christian Embassy Jerusalem's celebration of Israel's 75th Anniversary. | | | | Human Trafficking Roundtable | | On Thursday, AG Miyares hosted a human trafficking roundtable with law enforcement, experts, and public leaders from around the Spotsylvania, Stafford, and Orange County region to discuss gaps they face in supporting trafficking survivors and bringing traffickers to justice. | | | In response to a surge of overdose deaths nationwide related to xylazine, Attorney General Miyares is urging Congress to pass the Combating Illicit Xylazine Act, which would provide critical measures to combat the widespread illicit use and trafficking of xylazine and help prevent xylazine-related deaths. name: Weiss Ratings
subject: AMERICAN FREEDOM DIES IN JULY 2023?!
body:
It is nothing less than the gravest threat to personal freedom I've seen

| | | | | | | **AMERICAN FREEDOM DIES IN JULY 2023?!**
---
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2cfddb3629148c8938ba5bab9251ed8&_e=gT7JcsOt9-ZnFLnwBbAyH7hTVISNZa6osUO-vGftR7lBsPaZAebufkEnhbk67VXTVHT1jTIPa8WwMQpzgKoSRgBcbiJwFQqL6CIMctt4O-O7Vd21vd5xDC2Re-tTkT_B14E1wcR5mFxXLewyUy2DW-6t8Diy2etC0TIFZb1_E7kB3mmxtwF9TsfFsW7t-pzMe68QhOpx9tk5hwA9m_q8z3rnPSf-FXM1g4Kx7z4unwRwflOdwZV6MgVLYdxwyPeANWfm5co-UrJkYv1kcLpu-A%3D%3D)
**This 93-page federal document outlines one of the most horrifying things I 've uncovered in my 51 years of bank analysis and market forecasting. It goes into effect just months from now. [Click to see the details and how to protect yourself while you still can](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2cfddb3629148c8938ba5bab9251ed8&_e=gT7JcsOt9-ZnFLnwBbAyH7hTVISNZa6osUO-vGftR7lBsPaZAebufkEnhbk67VXTVHT1jTIPa8WwMQpzgKoSRgBcbiJwFQqL6CIMctt4O-O7Vd21vd5xDC2Re-tTkT_BAVSn9OUDJN9zTftyH6Vr9ZRrkeEbJQeuY07_zUYbJMrKFjKSLV6WbDQ3QdIROtOSyy-yILj_7yghsOlI03TGBvjP4WJChyxwcS7riRMpl6cRjbungsl3lz_hYpKApouHen8QEsrd3wvLdwE9EaGFpA%3D%3D).**
Dear Subscriber,
Imagine a government agent gets assigned to snoop through your bank account ...
To see if your transactions are considered a "threat" to their agenda.
If that idea sickens you ... or you don't think it could happen in this country ... then pay very close attention:
---
Because according to the document I'm holding here, starting as soon as July 2023, you could log in to your bank account and see a flashing red alert that ...
Your account has been frozen.
Your ability to access your own money -- frozen.
Sending and receiving funds -- frozen.
Your crime?
You didn't commit one.
Instead, it's because of the U.S. government's new program that gives unelected officials the power to monitor and even freeze your account based on your behavior, and potentially, even your political views.
**It is nothing less than the gravest threat to personal freedom I 've seen in my 51 years as a bank analyst and market forecaster.**
[Today, I'm revealing the details of this plan,](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2cfddb3629148c8938ba5bab9251ed8&_e=gT7JcsOt9-ZnFLnwBbAyH7hTVISNZa6osUO-vGftR7lBsPaZAebufkEnhbk67VXTVHT1jTIPa8WwMQpzgKoSRgBcbiJwFQqL6CIMctt4O-O7Vd21vd5xDC2Re-tTkT_B6rYKSRq6NcLIFcpnA2FjR0BhweY4aehE-NdSN7ok84et1oU4RXwNbwr2U64EWG0BTDZ1woClx6A7wCK5SAMvDuUuz15DbU9hdSB6q1RGIHPU1sd4hfMt6cP22vN3aBe_PDVDY7SOjPbHYkrS_vZFLw%3D%3D) along with specific steps you must take to safeguard your wealth before this program becomes active.
This is no "Chicken Little, sky-is-falling" moment. This is real.
If you ignore this threat, you do so at great risk to your financial security and everything you've ever worked for.
[Secure access to my time-sensitive warning video](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2cfddb3629148c8938ba5bab9251ed8&_e=gT7JcsOt9-ZnFLnwBbAyH7hTVISNZa6osUO-vGftR7lBsPaZAebufkEnhbk67VXTVHT1jTIPa8WwMQpzgKoSRgBcbiJwFQqL6CIMctt4O-O7Vd21vd5xDC2Re-tTkT_Bdv0HVBnL5Sn4W7z9zj4DjhqXlm9k6Nlq_FMiXhEoh0-obSaNZEc923xGIo8vYH2VhjmU3C62XD_CUeScGdfiOc5Nlcn0WfoehPJ7USnW2UXwrlaVCY2JJzBI7PHlmWl8Jc75lSlk6EH6vyRdM3Xy6g%3D%3D) and protect yourself while there is still time.
Good luck and God bless!
---
Martin D. Weiss, PhD
Founder of Weiss Ratings

Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33408-3080

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=650636a4983742e3bd254fd65ccd35e3&_e=q6-Gt85Srf-nPfPfWEnxrgTGChXQg6ySmUTfnFrnmknM442lrjhMs_IDkIU2lNFmzMQktEfrZhY8B4Lhinix6Qrp-dELdEiGm9Amuo0lqnU04R02OpCAKzyZ3Bw3fYabUM-Bu1YYEwK_225ZhMnS4BJkA1ZvdtBtWXnI6M56LRWJTf7D44J8z55jMm-NbqjMMdfcY84YwABo9Di0GGqgb_3hMNXg7vaUF8s3rXOStdmn-a-JnNWItwFuPXZbWgbIi-AB0uO2WGzVkbHOXQkeTrxcz6UhYcFRQoEXC3CYe-abhhGo625BLrP1DsMpXVKcNbA46wPYMvlKWFtlh6I3ZCnABFNIoi1QsZk8b-qRiGb99xyhYXYqqJrvu-CEYXivv5CFlxrQIfJNLgQpMxqzKb_nPYBjPPeDn0No6OfkQIo%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=650636a4983742e3bd254fd65ccd35e3&_e=q6-Gt85Srf-nPfPfWEnxrgTGChXQg6ySmUTfnFrnmknM442lrjhMs_IDkIU2lNFmzMQktEfrZhY8B4Lhinix6Qrp-dELdEiGm9Amuo0lqnU04R02OpCAKzyZ3Bw3fYabUM-Bu1YYEwK_225ZhMnS4BJkA1ZvdtBtWXnI6M56LRWJTf7D44J8z55jMm-NbqjMMdfcY84YwABo9Di0GGqgb_3hMNXg7vaUF8s3rXOStdmn-a-JnNWItwFuPXZbWgbIi-AB0uO2WGzVkbHOXQkeTqHrYDbuCulGbyhjoMYPDkkUE6q5L-D5GhSKn7TyKi594rek1Y_4ZBzxGGmK4IHJ4jNQR3gS8jXjrDr2jmt2Vv65VIuSW33ibsyiOZCaPlcbulcLVSALsmqU7fHvhxzwx5s2I027GHbd0rp_ATenLJU%3D)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: Public schools vs. Christians
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.-5PZUIpCmkQ)
---
Fellow American I gave my life to Christ when I was in fifth grade. But fifth graders today are facing a cultural, political, and social climate that is stacked against Christians. Public schools are teaching sex education to fourth graders, telling kindergarteners to choose their gender, and writing curriculum based on critical race theory. As Christians, we have a strong sense of right and wrong, good and bad, true and false. Yet, our nation's children are being shaped by an education system that vehemently disagrees with our beliefs. **_America needs Christians who have the Holy Spirit working in their lives to stand up for what they believe and let the light of truth into our schools, communities, and culture._** That's exactly why **TPUSA Faith** launched **Kingdom to the Capitol** \- a series of live worship events in **_ALL FIFTY state capitals_** to ignite the flame of REVIVAL all across our country. **As a fellow believer in Christ, I want to invite you to attend Kingdom to the Capitol when we're in your state capital.** [**But whether or not you're able to attend, I hope you'll support TPUSA Faith with your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100 to enable us to bring hundreds more people to each of our FIFTY worship events.**](http://trk.libertyledger._UbKMFkghQA)
---
[Support Kingdom to the Capitol](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
Our educational system should illuminate the world around us, helping us to see things as they truly are... revealing what's right, good, true, and beautiful. TPUSA Faith is on a mission to empower Christians who care about our nation's children and public education to go to school boards, classrooms, and city councils to boldly ask our leaders to do what is right. Right now, we have **Kingdom to the Capitol** events scheduled in Texas, Wisconsin, Virginia, and more, and we are planning future events in additional state capitals. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. [**Will you please pray for the success of our REVIVAL tour and support this mission for the glory of God, for the good of our nation's children, and the future of our nation?**](http://trk.libertyledger.) I believe this is a season for revival for our nation. These are desperate times in America. Whether we're talking about public education, the spread of socialism, gender ideology, or abortion, you don't have to look far to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. With the generous partnership of followers of Jesus - like you - TPUSA Faith will promote these powerful worship events far and wide, fill local church buildings with worshipers, and send an army of believers back into their communities. I pray that by coming together as believers in Christ, we will renew the hope of Christians and bring much-needed revival to our nation. [**As Christians, it often feels like we are being ganged up upon, which is why it's critical that we come together in powerful worship and prayer in EVERY state capital. But we can't do that without you. Will you please make a much-needed gift right now?**](http://trk.libertyledger.) Our educational system should be filled with the Spirit as it teaches our children how to discern God's will, how to live in society, and how to be wise. But you and I both know that our current public education system has strayed as far as possible from this purpose. TPUSA Faith is working to engage, equip, and empower Christians to change the trajectory of public education - and our nation - for the future of our children. **Kingdom to the Capitol** is our most ambitious and historic revival tour yet, visiting every single state capital in America with the hope of restoring American Biblical values in schools and communities across our nation. [**Whether the Lord leads you to give $35, $50, $100, or some other amount, I hope you can support our FIFTY worship events during a desperate - and dark - time for America. In order to reach EVERY state capital, and save our nation, it's critical that we have your support today.**](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
[Support Kingdom to the Capitol](http://trk.libertyledger._vCGurZmGo2w)
---
Together, Fellow American, we can spark REVIVAL in our beloved nation. God bless you,
---
Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-ysohB1TdJ8r00FBw)
---
[Support TPUSA Faith](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTQxLTJhNzYxOTQxYzllOTQ1NjdhNTQwZmZlOTliNjA3YjMxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/kWXzSBGaQoA_FcV2mEw3hQ) to unsubscribe.

subject: AMERICAN FREEDOM DIES IN JULY 2023?!
body:
It is nothing less than the gravest threat to personal freedom I've seen

| | | | | | | **AMERICAN FREEDOM DIES IN JULY 2023?!**
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d98f8a7eb7974211842fdacfc25f1886&_e=ZvNbiZv1ZCweUsiDXoewe2oyz-7lWd4RzyOBFxN2oBckeLE9wasaAIU4n6uyH_yAEd8T2fKzq39bnCdCjJCyDwQw1EdMxshalCV1mxWxChC3t-mNEE5Zyh2ijMH6XlYOGJHuLEnLvlmah4xTXDZynvVDiKJFo0U6-L_XXoAoYCZtd1b1NrK2xN53A6xRcu-LYXusj2aBa-3Mc4h6nDOIfpMAfozOgl94N24BqeYnyRcXr3FGOzHrrBrdmPwle3Kj-8zAJLON0rjUIxjTI1DZEA%3D%3D)
**This 93-page federal document outlines one of the most horrifying things I 've uncovered in my 51 years of bank analysis and market forecasting. It goes into effect just months from now. [Click to see the details and how to protect yourself while you still can](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d98f8a7eb7974211842fdacfc25f1886&_e=ZvNbiZv1ZCweUsiDXoewe2oyz-7lWd4RzyOBFxN2oBckeLE9wasaAIU4n6uyH_yAEd8T2fKzq39bnCdCjJCyDwQw1EdMxshalCV1mxWxChC3t-mNEE5Zyh2ijMH6XlYO7KvyIllR1ibwIXP35YtPb8YLCDeNShQ8YYgUELopulXeTjjVa0sqZoiynKWkeqxmMWp3iewbtfu8ixiNEg4txwTG7FPqsIZBduqExVwartP0bWJl4_BGK1W059-ssU4d4dSskF_w0fQmsRsLg0elnQ%3D%3D).**
Dear Subscriber,
Imagine a government agent gets assigned to snoop through your bank account ...
To see if your transactions are considered a "threat" to their agenda.
If that idea sickens you ... or you don't think it could happen in this country ... then pay very close attention:
---
Because according to the document I'm holding here, starting as soon as July 2023, you could log in to your bank account and see a flashing red alert that ...
Your account has been frozen.
Your ability to access your own money -- frozen.
Sending and receiving funds -- frozen.
Your crime?
You didn't commit one.
Instead, it's because of the U.S. government's new program that gives unelected officials the power to monitor and even freeze your account based on your behavior, and potentially, even your political views.
**It is nothing less than the gravest threat to personal freedom I 've seen in my 51 years as a bank analyst and market forecaster.**

body:
These are steps we can take at this very moment to solve this problem.
---
| | | | | | | Peter, We've seen chaos unfold at the southern border since the Biden administration allowed Title 42 to expire. **As Mike has said, this problem needs to be fixed before more people are hurt and more lethal drugs flow into the United States.** Here's how we do it: ✔️ Finish the Border Wall ✔️ Hire more Border Patrol agents and provide bonus pay ✔️ Purchase necessary equipment for agents at both the northern and southern borders ✔️ Force DHS to be transparent with accurate data about illegal crossings ✔️ End the catch-and-release policy ✔️ Streamline the asylum process
---
| | | [PROTECT AMERICAN SOVEREIGNTY](https://click.act.mikeforwisconsin.com/?qs=040d054bd6f8b558fe836f60f2ed094e14d4552f8ac26938091c630a303e480b966bfc0d0a3f062dcee7c8f38571f57205b85715ce8b5a6a)

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Free eBook from Victor Davis Hanson: Dueling Populisms
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWTaE33DMN

Dear Friend, Populism is nothing new to world history. While it
can be
easy to think about American politics as being divided between
the Left and the Right, the reality is much different.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWTaE33DMN

Dear
Friend,
Populism
is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to think
about American politics as being divided between the Left and the
Right, the reality is much different. What we've really been
seeing is two sets of populist backlash against both the Democrat
and Republican establishment.

And
believe it or not, these tensions actually trace their roots back
to Roman times.

That's
why I'm sending you this email today.

I want to
make sure you get a free copy of one of our popular eBooks:
Dueling Populisms by Victor Davis Hanson.

Hanson is
a Hoover Senior Fellow and world-renowned historian, and I think
you'll get a lot out of his insights. Inside this important
eBook, you'll learn more about:

What
we can expect from a political climate ruled by movements that
rebel against both the establishment-and each other.
The
important parallels between these ancient movements and their
modern counterparts in both progressive and conservative
populism.
What
lies ahead for America as we revive these ancient tensions in our
culture.

You can
get your free copy of Dueling Populisms using this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/dueling-populisms-signup/.

And
please feel free to share this with your family and friends. It's
important that we recall the voices of experience and apply them
to contemporary conflicts and challenges.

You can
use this link to get access to your free eBook right now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bd587857e25e4b95b3da263c2bfba63c&_e=4D25SaiIqK608mOvVwrAysqxe-Hl0x98Mub9XhSEEAN7GSqodVQ_m1-s5y5AoxufuwvvWTdKBcw7ViWNMeaNgcCZyy81XVE63jC7UmFGN067_OOFltcY5RSotWwp1Av3CR83yvyHvB0YQitXaUquxK27EgKLmCRiULLhKjbxQMJDqqBPEQ1-VZAZ1qH2qGymJnFjPMbr3gKWg_3jUJxCyag7zQeTxI1FtHMfdhduFnog4zT0eNfXIl_4fRmdwVWNtBEUkZIjMJteu0Bbx2wE8YKvpulL7zfmIk7cfAZjoKJ5O6mBUSDDqlkAQMIa1AWGk4jaJOGk51_a4s9-un5Hp3MIfsoaNFGtBEuyQHlijEwA9XA2DduhDHQxmGczDMuRFMjxewF5BJh4qHXSb-z_t43yK4revPjUDMC32xN95jA%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bd587857e25e4b95b3da263c2bfba63c&_e=4D25SaiIqK608mOvVwrAysqxe-Hl0x98Mub9XhSEEAN7GSqodVQ_m1-s5y5AoxufuwvvWTdKBcw7ViWNMeaNgcCZyy81XVE63jC7UmFGN067_OOFltcY5RSotWwp1Av3CR83yvyHvB0YQitXaUquxK27EgKLmCRiULLhKjbxQMJDqqBPEQ1-VZAZ1qH2qGymJnFjPMbr3gKWg_3jUJxCyag7zQeTxI1FtHMfdhduFnog4zT0eNfXIl_4fRmdwVWNtBEUkZIjMJteu0Bbx2wE8QcwrnsNQbaXDm4T1txoKDzoHc-kz08bN2qFp2ALrVGRq3gxjsrq91tVQgKKs4xIQKt8PkZKBQ_ppwOnTjr4pzVEltXESrGW2vIT6Es7A4rDdjsnQ7PjB2mjG_iOTRupqxkcvEx8yJxo9SbWLrW3ndY%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bd587857e25e4b95b3da263c2bfba63c&_e=4D25SaiIqK608mOvVwrAysqxe-Hl0x98Mub9XhSEEAN7GSqodVQ_m1-s5y5AoxufuwvvWTdKBcw7ViWNMeaNgcCZyy81XVE63jC7UmFGN067_OOFltcY5RSotWwp1Av3CR83yvyHvB0YQitXaUquxK27EgKLmCRiULLhKjbxQMJDqqBPEQ1-VZAZ1qH2qGymJnFjPMbr3gKWg_3jUJxCyag7zQeTxI1FtHMfdhduFnog4zT0eNfXIl_4fRmdwVWNtBEUkZIjMJteu0Bbx2wE8QmgJRg3cEo0FC3kS8twViHewtcwIpyFUm7oPsh2xh02P_3iWbEBLBa0-b16NvNRhQVzwma_tC14Gw889rme-_W5_0_uQYOkC-shTv0Pe9Vf6MESGe-pOW1aCguL3QQF-jsZNonwlXQPzuKzuPMsyTU%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

... and they will succeed if everyone sits out.

My team tells me that I can count on you, but I need to know for myself.

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00d593c476034c74a425154a79958a35&_e=ujanuVILHO_3Z1vgWrISEQyDUl8Y1K0iIXVb2em8zpr0iOTI6jIZC1MRdsqgEQ97l5aKwILWsziWw-2L9PRAzU94tY_sV3Zb8LI4Bu94l4Y7FuunUxVrNd48bLio3OItWdP3NmFhXBikI822QsTa_G6kLnWB5CPgxfcAS9hpHQXs30q4Ls_xnltB4GvmEoouMM74JY04Zs7fcPmhbGbRVbbq13G-X0iN-EdAqPY83lX8nSMfLUI_aK-XdZv4nYPSwVFdl-3WI72jpKg4oEJpmg%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00d593c476034c74a425154a79958a35&_e=ujanuVILHO_3Z1vgWrISEQyDUl8Y1K0iIXVb2em8zpr0iOTI6jIZC1MRdsqgEQ97l5aKwILWsziWw-2L9PRAzU94tY_sV3Zb8LI4Bu94l4Y7FuunUxVrNd48bLio3OItLNZy2OOm_QBsf3QR62lYRvoPV1JVKapvNJjLPQclZ5h5TtFGrAIgWz9I21-DdQZmQPZJO9V3j0ZjPsUckBL9aNbfuhX87zFyCKWK8pL8CrPZ4wM3w14_9Bi--HKWrHsNXRv6qiZJQyowtaGfSbcLHQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, **Here is the situation:** As you have heard, Rep. Colin Allred, a hardcore liberal, has just announced he is running against me in my United States Senate race in Texas. Who is he? He is a far-left Democrat. As a member of Congress, he has voted with Nancy Pelosi an astonishing 100% of the time. What that means is on every issue Texans care about, **he's voted wrong**. So he's voted for open borders over and over again. He's voted for higher taxes over and over again. He's voted for 87,000 new IRS agents. He's voted for massive new regulations. He's voted for the Biden administration's assault on oil, gas and energy production here in Texas and all over the United States. **This race is going to be one hell of a fight...** My last Senate reelection was in 2018. In 2018, it was the most expensive Senate race in the history of our nation in terms of hard money. We were outspent three to one. They absolutely flooded the zone with money and media. **And let me tell you what Democrats did in 2018--** They increased Democrat turnout in the state of Texas, from 1.8 million, all the way up to 4 million, where they more than doubled Democrat turnout in Texas. Now, we saw that coming and we leaned in hard. We increased Republican turnout from 2.8 million, all the way up to 4.2 million. But point two was the whole margin we had- we won by 200,000 votes out of more than 8 million votes cast- that shows the kind of battle it's going to be... Texas is the single biggest prize for Democrats in the country. It's not rocket science, if you're a Democrat, after Donald Trump, there is no Republican in the country you want to beat more than me. _They're going to_ __flood the state with cash__ _trying_ to flip Texas blue- and it has already begun... It's just been a few days since Allred announced he's running against me in 2024. **But he 's already raised $2 MILLION, setting a new 2024 fundraising record.** Democrats are all in. **I need your strong and generous support to fight back- just like we did in 2018. I need your help more than ever before. And I 'm asking you to please step up right now >>**

clean_body: Urgent message from Ted Cruz to all supporters and staff... | | | Fellow Conservative, Here is the situation: As you have heard, Rep. Colin Allred, a hardcore liberal, has just announced he is running against me in my United States Senate race in Texas. Who is he? He is a far-left Democrat. As a member of Congress, he has voted with Nancy Pelosi an astonishing 100% of the time. What that means is on every issue Texans care about, he's voted wrong. So he's voted for open borders over and over again. He's voted for higher taxes over and over again. He's voted for 87,000 new IRS agents. He's voted for massive new regulations. He's voted for the Biden administration's assault on oil, gas and energy production here in Texas and all over the United States. This race is going to be one hell of a fight... My last Senate reelection was in 2018. In 2018, it was the most expensive Senate race in the history of our nation in terms of hard money. We were outspent three to one. They absolutely flooded the zone with money and media. And let me tell you what Democrats did in 2018-- They increased Democrat turnout in the state of Texas, from 1.8 million, all the way up to 4 million, where they more than doubled Democrat turnout in Texas. Now, we saw that coming and we leaned in hard. We increased Republican turnout from 2.8 million, all the way up to 4.2 million. But point two was the whole margin we had- we won by 200,000 votes out of more than 8 million votes cast- that shows the kind of battle it's going to be... Texas is the single biggest prize for Democrats in the country. It's not rocket science, if you're a Democrat, after Donald Trump, there is no Republican in the country you want to beat more than me. They're going to flood the state with cash trying to flip Texas blue- and it has already begun... It's just been a few days since Allred announced he's running against me in 2024. But he 's already raised $2 MILLION, setting a new 2024 fundraising record. Democrats are all in. I need your strong and generous support to fight back- just like we did in 2018. I need your help more than ever before. And I 'm asking you to please step up right now >> Thanks for your help at this crucial moment. For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | id:2023-05-08-11:23:00:568t | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Let's be clear, friend: Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has FAILED the American people.
* **FIRST, **delivery times slowed.

* **THEN, **HUNDREDS of offices were closed and 50,000 jobs were shed.

* **And NOW** , DeJoy has USPS prices skyrocketing!

**This is urgent, friend: The Postal Service could collapse if it continues on this path and with the GOP controlling the House, this is a real possibility. **

We can't let that happen. Families rely on the USPS for lifesaving medications and critical deliveries. AND many Americans use vote-by-mail to exercise their right to vote.
**That's why we're calling on Democrats like you. We're running an official poll, and we NEED 83 more responses from your area to reach statistical significance. Please, let us know ASAP:**

I'm forwarding along the last email from our team to make sure you don't miss your chance to join the fun! Our community fundraiser is tomorrow at 6 pm, and [**you still have time to RSVP.**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=94604ce287&e=2de202398d)

| [COUNT ME IN](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=9fed6bf232&e=2de202398d "COUNT ME IN")

| On Monday, we can show the strength of our community and give our re-election campaign a huge boost. But in order to do it all, we need every one of you to join us.

subject: Sign: Tell Kevin McCarthy: “Grow a spine, and pass a clean debt limit increase NOW!"
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Kevin McCarthy: “Raise the Debt Limit NOW!”](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf83c2a77-3988-41dd-8275-ca93348de314/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Time is up. Republican extremists are on the verge of throwing America into default, and sending us into a deep recession.

[**It's time for Kevin McCarthy to act like an adult, stop listening to the lunatics in his party, and raise the debt limit NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T094515fd-8d4d-494e-be55-9b5bb4c739f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

We're just days away from default, and we don't have time for these ridiculous games. The debt limit needs to be raised, and McCarthy needs to grow a spine, and join with Democrats to pass a clean increase as soon as possible.

[**Tell Kevin McCarthy: "Raise the Debt Limit NOW!"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62df70d4-5532-46d7-a769-9d52d14a04fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Friend,

body:
[_**Peter, it’s Priya Krishnamoorthi. Today, I wanted to share why I’m so proud of and thankful for my husband, Raja. I hope you’ll read until the very end, but if you’re short on time, could you chip in $14 to his campaign before you log off? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63601607/407364311/-1810142053?source=20230521_em_fr_b1_priya_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjlmNDljYS1kZmY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DxIzkR0Zbbupx7pWOHK5LT-H0C-bfUPxtwNNSiCHPjg=) Peter, I’ve never met someone who works harder than Raja. He’s going after the Chinese Communist Party for their apps that violate the privacy of young kids like ours. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63601608/407364312/-1810142053?source=20230521_em_fr_b1_priya_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjlmNDljYS1kZmY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DxIzkR0Zbbupx7pWOHK5LT-H0C-bfUPxtwNNSiCHPjg=)

_Raja and our boys!_
He took on baby food manufacturers that expose babies to dangerous toxins.

_Raja and our youngest!_
And he fought tirelessly for PPE for frontline healthcare workers like me.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63601610/407364337/-1810142053?source=20230521_em_fr_b1_priya_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjlmNDljYS1kZmY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DxIzkR0Zbbupx7pWOHK5LT-H0C-bfUPxtwNNSiCHPjg=)

_Me at the start of the pandemic in a welding facemask_
[_**I’m so proud of my husband, who fights every day for our families. We need more people like him in Congress. I know he doesn’t like asking for money, so I hope you’ll consider my request today: Will you chip in $5, $25, or $50 to support Raja? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63601611/407364357/-1810142053?source=20230521_em_fr_b1_priya_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjlmNDljYS1kZmY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DxIzkR0Zbbupx7pWOHK5LT-H0C-bfUPxtwNNSiCHPjg=)
Peter, this is the thing that I am proudest of:
For Raja, this job simply isn’t about politics.
He wants to make the country better, and I’m thankful that we have a relentless fighter like him.
And at the end of every day, I’m thankful that he still finds time to be a dedicated husband and father.

subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWnpSJ3DjN

What strange times we live in.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWnpSJ3DjN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

What
strange times we live in. Strange...and disturbing.

Would you
have ever imagined seeing headlines about churches and ministries
being vandalized and, in some instances, set on fire-all while
authorities seem to turn a blind eye to the violence?

Or
stories about how the FBI opened investigations into Catholic
parishes in the United States?

How about
the significant decrease in church attendance, which dropped by
up to 15 million people per week, due to COVID lockdowns that
forced many houses of worship to close?

These
news stories demonstrate the mounting pressure Christians
encounter in our increasingly secular society. In many ways, it
seems like faith in America is under siege.

That's
one reason we're releasing our latest free online course,
"Ancient Christianity," this month. I hope you'll enroll today
using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61821873:WnpSJ3DjN:m:3:2532013465:A4C757BFD2A9AF3150310EE9FA3B76CD:r

The
course delves into the hardships and courage of early Christians
who endured terrible persecution for their faith. At the same
time, they shaped the Christian church and established the
foundations of the Western world, including the United States.

Their
examples of "faith that overcomes" can inspire us today.

For
instance, the course covers the Roman Emperor Nero's persecution
of Christians and introduces Tertullian, the first Latin
Christian theologian. Many historians believe Tertullian was a
lawyer who defended Christians from legal persecution, and he
wrote against Rome's treatment of women, abortion, and
immorality.

That's
why, after enrolling, I hope you'll join us in promoting "Ancient
Christianity" to millions of your fellow citizens.

To
achieve this objective, we've set a goal to raise $500,000 by
midnight on May 22 to share this important free online course
with as many people as possible.

The
faithful backing of supporters like you makes our free online
courses possible. You also allow us to reach and teach millions
through other educational outreach efforts, like Imprimis and our
K-12 education programs.

And every
supporter like you really matters to us because we refuse EVERY
PENNY of taxpayer funding-even indirectly in the form of federal
or state student loans and grants.

We must
educate ourselves. Looking back at the Christians of the past, we
can see how they faced the overpowering might of an empire and
set an example for us to follow.

So, will
you help us reach and teach people just like you-urging them to
enroll in "Ancient Christianity"?

Using
this secure link, you can enroll and chip in to offset our
development and promotional costs with a tax-deductible gift of
$25, $50, or any amount.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61821873:WnpSJ3DjN:m:3:2532013465:A4C757BFD2A9AF3150310EE9FA3B76CD:r

Together,
we can secure the blessings of civil and religious liberty for
the next generation of Americans-so they don't have to live
through even stranger times than the ones we live in today.

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

body:

In case you missed it, there's been a bunch of local and national coverage of Senator Sinema's campaign spending.
According to FEC reports she is taking the donations from hedge fund managers and spending it lavishly on luxury cars, hotels and private jets for herself.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230522&t=1&akid=647%2E734936%2Ee69Pxp)
To us, that is hilarious.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230522&t=2&akid=647%2E734936%2Ee69Pxp)
The idea that rich people are giving her money hand-over-fist to win re-election and instead she's spending it frivolously is funny.
**But what is no laughing matter is this May fundraising deadline of ours.**
We are almost a week away and are short of our goals.

name: Fair Fight
subject: Republicans’ Board of Elections takeovers in Georgia: Explained
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
Brian Kemp just signed extremists’ Board of Elections takeover bills into law in three counties this month. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63603706/407372255/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230521_f_boetakeovers_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDZmMjIwMS1lM2Y3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMGeGWAb3DTcGt3r7ZOUxEKT1GOZbahBxN3yQMPD_t4=&emci=4eb9fe09-79f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0d6f2201-e3f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | We want to talk about Governor Brian Kemp’s most recent anti-voter actions in Georgia and what Fair Fight is doing to mitigate their impact. **First, here’s the problem: Brian Kemp just signed extremists’ Board of Elections takeover bills into law in three counties this month — which would remove lawfully appointed Black members and Democrats from their ranks.** Among these laws is HB 422, which allowed the Republican-led Ware County Commission to remove Shawn Taylor, a Black Democrat, from the Board of Elections and replace her with a conservative board member. And this is part of a larger trend — in recent years, anti-voter Republicans in Georgia have introduced more than 18 bills aimed at dramatically altering the composition of local Boards of Elections. Following record-breaking turnout by Black, brown, and young voters since the 2020 presidential and 2021 runoff elections, these laws continue a string of coordinated efforts by Republicans nationwide to deny voters a voice and overturn the results of democratically held elections. As we gear up for the 2024 elections, where all eyes will be on Georgia once again, it’s clear that Republicans are laying the foundation NOW to maintain — and gain — their power through anti-democratic tactics. **Here’s how we’re fighting back: We’re reaching voters to educate them about their rights and mobilize them to push back against Republicans’ attempts to subvert elections.** It’s essential that voters in counties affected by Republican Board of Elections takeovers know how to get involved in the decisions that impact how they vote, when they vote, and how to ensure their votes count. Just this week, our efforts to advocate for pro-voter, diverse Board of Elections leadership paid off when Fulton County appointed Patrise Perkins-Hooker, a Black woman, as their Chair — after county commissioners attempted to rush the nomination process without any community input. Additionally, we’re continuing to train our Democracy Watch volunteers to advocate for voting access in County Board of Elections meetings, push back on anti-voter efforts, and monitor voter suppression efforts. **And here’s how you can help:** [_**In order to continue Fair Fight’s work to protect our democracy in Georgia, we rely on your support from emails just like this one. clean_body: Brian Kemp just signed extremists’ Board of Elections takeover bills into law in three counties this month. | | | We want to talk about Governor Brian Kemp’s most recent anti-voter actions in Georgia and what Fair Fight is doing to mitigate their impact. First, here’s the problem: Brian Kemp just signed extremists’ Board of Elections takeover bills into law in three counties this month — which would remove lawfully appointed Black members and Democrats from their ranks. Among these laws is HB 422, which allowed the Republican-led Ware County Commission to remove Shawn Taylor, a Black Democrat, from the Board of Elections and replace her with a conservative board member. And this is part of a larger trend — in recent years, anti-voter Republicans in Georgia have introduced more than 18 bills aimed at dramatically altering the composition of local Boards of Elections. Following record-breaking turnout by Black, brown, and young voters since the 2020 presidential and 2021 runoff elections, these laws continue a string of coordinated efforts by Republicans nationwide to deny voters a voice and overturn the results of democratically held elections. As we gear up for the 2024 elections, where all eyes will be on Georgia once again, it’s clear that Republicans are laying the foundation NOW to maintain — and gain — their power through anti-democratic tactics. Here’s how we’re fighting back: We’re reaching voters to educate them about their rights and mobilize them to push back against Republicans’ attempts to subvert elections. It’s essential that voters in counties affected by Republican Board of Elections takeovers know how to get involved in the decisions that impact how they vote, when they vote, and how to ensure their votes count. Just this week, our efforts to advocate for pro-voter, diverse Board of Elections leadership paid off when Fulton County appointed Patrise Perkins-Hooker, a Black woman, as their Chair — after county commissioners attempted to rush the nomination process without any community input. Additionally, we’re continuing to train our Democracy Watch volunteers to advocate for voting access in County Board of Elections meetings, push back on anti-voter efforts, and monitor voter suppression efforts. name: Team Pramila
subject: It's time for Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Add your name to urge Congress to pass the Medicare for All Act of 2023 and finally bring universal health care to our country in a time when we need it the most.
#
Peter,
Health care is a human right and it must be guaranteed for all — not just the wealthy few. And passing the Medicare for All Act of 2023 is the strongest step forward in building the future we deserve.
That's why Pramila is standing with Rep. Debbie Dingell, Sen. Bernie Sanders, and National Nurses United in a collective action to urge Congress to support the Medicare for All Act of 2023.
Will you join us in the fight to finally bring true universal health care to everyone in this country? [**If so, please add your name to our action to call on Congress to pass the Medicare for All Act of 2023 and finally ensure that every person is guaranteed quality health care, regardless of their ability to pay.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42177?t=1&akid=2503%2E420207%2EqsI03m)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42177?t=2&akid=2503%2E420207%2EqsI03m)**
Pramila said it best: **It's time to put people over profits and care over corporations.** And our country's lack of universal health care has proven to be an issue of gender justice, racial justice, and economic justice.
By passing the Medicare for All Act of 2023, we will ensure that:
* **Everyone will have health care,** including dental, vision, hearing, and long term care.
* Expensive premiums, deductibles, co-pays, and other out of pocket costs **will be eliminated completely.**
* Roughly **95% of all U.S. households would save money** on health care costs.
* The **U.S. would save over $450 billion** on health expenses annually.

As a progressive movement dedicated to building a democracy rooted in love, compassion, and equality, we have a moral and ethical obligation to show up and root for solutions that meet the urgency of our needs.
**We need as many supporters on our side if we want to ensure that this momentous bill can come to fruition.**[**Add your name to urge Congress to pass the Medicare for All Act of 2023 and finally bring universal health care to our country in a time when we need it the most.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42177?t=3&akid=2503%2E420207%2EqsI03m)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42177?t=4&akid=2503%2E420207%2EqsI03m)**
Together,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230521-2503-footer&t=5&refcode2=2503_420207_qsI03m&akid=2503%2E420207%2EqsI03m)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Protect Lauren Boebert’s divorce rights … and just say no to theocracy by making sure Adam Frisch gets the 600 more votes he needs to send her home from Congress.
body:
Just say no to theocracy
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a9e2e6e-1858-473d-890b-ba8a262d33e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **" I'm Tired Of This Separation Of Church And State Junk"** _That's what Lauren Boebert said in a speech to the Cornerstone Christian Church in CO. Attacking our Constitution, which provides for separation of church & state, while looking to Saudi Arabia as a governing model._ **_Boebert's a self-proclaimed Christian Nationalist who believes her Bible should determine how we live. And Cornerstone believes the Bible's the written word of God, and must be followed as written._** _So it must have been a bummer for the church when the hypocrite, Boebert, filed for divorce from her husband this past week. It_ _wouldn't seem to fit the part where Matthew quotes Jesus saying divorce makes one an "adultress._" _To be clear: I think divorce is a healthy part of a free society where we all have choices. _**_But, _****_Boebert's tired of that "junk." She wants to tell us who to marry, when to marry and how we must remain married. Except Boebert doesn't count, because she's special. Her theocracy's only for us._** [**_Boebert's a moral abomination & hypocrite. Adam Frisch only lost to her by 546 votes in '22. Since then, she's grown more unhinged, he's gotten stronger: With a real presence on the trail and great fundraising. Will you join us in giving Frisch $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can, NOW, because freedom of (and from) religion is not, and has never been, negotiable._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf694c427-996f-45da-bf7d-0d3171ba0164/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your dedication to freedom for all Americans. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T12771950-6c0a-432b-bc47-036fab896b2a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
On MSNBC: “The GOP has a bad candidate in Senator Hawley. He's underwater in his favorables. Democrats have a good candidate in Lucas. We need to be organizing and investing in that state.”
#
Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
Congressman Jake Auchincloss and I went on MSNBC to discuss our response to Josh Hawley’s new book, _Manhood_ — and why Missouri is Democrats’ best chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat in 2024.
**You don’t want to miss it.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33354?refcode=em20230521-3152&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3152%2E614464%2EDhX0YK)

_**"Democrats can win in Missouri... The GOP has a bad candidate in Senator Hawley. He's underwater in his favorables. Democrats have a good candidate in Lucas. We need to be organizing and investing in that state."**_
Missourians don’t need a creep like Josh Hawley lecturing everyone about manhood in the U.S. Senate. They deserve a real warrior for working people — someone who will fight to invest in the people and communities that make our country strong.
**That’s why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate — and it’s why I need your help today, Peter.**

(But if you are doing poorly right now, please don’t even think about donating. Take care of yourself right now!) Thank you, | Donald J. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I know we ask a lot of you, but one of the main ways we are able to fund our work is when people like you chip in to emails like these.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230521-1-15&refcode2=5700.3935704.1pUXuE&t=1&akid=5700%2E3935704%2E1pUXuE)
---
Hi there, it’s Gabby Giffords.
I hope that you’ll allow me to take a few minutes out of your Sunday to explain why I’m asking for your support today.
It’s hard to believe, but we’re rapidly approaching the end of May. And right now, we’re unfortunately pacing behind where we need to be to reach our online fundraising goals.
The goals we set are very important. They are real benchmarks we’ve set to ensure we have the resources to keep up our work to elect gun safety champions, help pass lifesaving legislation, and stand up to gun lobby and their dangerous “guns everywhere” agenda.
I know we ask a lot of you, but one of the main ways we are able to fund our work is when people like you chip in to emails like these.
[**So what do you say? Can I count on you to chip in $3 or any amount that makes sense for you to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us close the gap and reach our May fundraising goals?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230521-1-15&t=2&akid=5700%2E3935704%2E1pUXuE)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-may23.hLCBBa&refcode=em230521-1-15&t=21&akid=5700%2E3935704%2E1pUXuE)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-may23.9ZfwpO&refcode=em230521-1-15&t=22&akid=5700%2E3935704%2E1pUXuE)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-may23.VbphPI&refcode=em230521-1-15&t=23&akid=5700%2E3935704%2E1pUXuE)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-may23.xompaR&refcode=em230521-1-15&t=24&akid=5700%2E3935704%2E1pUXuE)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-may23.mzg3uU&refcode=em230521-1-15&t=25&akid=5700%2E3935704%2E1pUXuE)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-may23.NkeOir&refcode=em230521-1-15&t=26&akid=5700%2E3935704%2E1pUXuE)**
---
****
Just this month alone, we’ve experienced the horror of multiple gun violence-related tragedies across our nation—including the mall shooting in Allen, TX. In just a few days, it will have been one year since last year’s unfathomable mass shooting at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, TX.
While we’ve made undeniable progress in the movement to end gun violence in our country, there are still far too many innocent lives stolen every day from preventable violence. We must continue our work together to create a safer future.
[**Please, make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC to help fuel our work and close our fundraising gap as we rapidly approach the end of the month.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230521-1-15&t=27&akid=5700%2E3935704%2E1pUXuE)
Thank you for your continued support.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may23.Jtluwk&refcode=em230521-1-15&t=28&akid=5700%2E3935704%2E1pUXuE)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=5700%2E3935704%2E1pUXuE) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

clean_body: | | Team, just last week, alongside a citizen-led coalition of local, state, and national partners, we announced the launch of a campaign — Vote No in August: One Person One Vote — to fight back against Ohio extremists’ latest attack. We have less than 4 months to ensure this attack fails at the ballot box — so we need to gear up FAST.= = An extremist-packed Ohio state legislature has called for a special election and referred a measure to the ballot that if passed, would require ALL future ballot measures in the state to pass with at least a 60% supermajority. These same extremists are terrified a ballot measure — like the ones we helped win in Michigan and Vermont last November that permanently protected abortion access in each state — could make its way in front of Ohio voters as soon as this November. So, they are wasting $20 million in taxpayer dollars to try and put this anti-democratic restriction in place before an abortion measure could make its way to the ballot. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your support, FP Campaigns Team Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63607370/407386208/1378948325?amount=10&refcode=MTFC_20230521_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGQ3NmEyYi1lZWY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pw5GwFKqraaPudXH5v4XQnk18DLg7hF82oh5tPQxFE8=) Hey Peter, it’s Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear:

In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me.

**Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.** It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.”

Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs – which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw.

This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change.

[**We must ALL continue to speak truth to power, and I’ll keep standing up to right-wing extremists.
