clean_body: Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters. | = Hey Peter, it’s Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear: In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me. Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters. It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.” Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs – which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw. This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jamaal Bowman and Mark Takano will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you for being on our side in this fight. Peace and love, Jamaal Bowman | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Democrats' big problem
body:
The State Legislature reconvened this week to fix a problem that Democrats had failed on during the regular session - the legalization of hard drugs across our state. Democrats' incompetence on this issue - and others - is truly astonishing. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61828844:sMuPa3DoN:m:1:2610672541:BCF2C672C35CB30927572AC223262B82:r "Shift
Washington")
---
|
Friends, The State Legislature reconvened this week to fix a problem that Democrats had failed on during the regular session - the legalization of hard drugs across our state. Democrats' incompetence on this issue - and others - is truly astonishing. Read on... ** ** **This week 's Newsmaker Interview...** Our Newsmaker Interview was with AIM's Senior Internal Wholesaler, Mike Anderson. With a 30-year career in the insurance business, Anderson discussed the Democrats' bungled and expensive Long-Term Care payroll tax and plan (WA Cares). The revised start date of the plan is now July 1st. Anderson pointed out the many serious flaws that remain with WA Cares and encouraged the state to have another 'Exemption Period" where consumers could again purchase private Long-Term Care coverage to avoid the soon-to-be-insolvent state plan. [Read more.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61828845:sMuPa3DoN:m:1:2610672541:BCF2C672C35CB30927572AC223262B82:r) **This week 's top story...** Marc Dones recently announced plans to resign as CEO of King County Regional Homelessness Authority (KCRHA). It's just the latest sign of the organizational dysfunction that has permeated the two-year-old bureaucratic agency. But can anyone who has followed the saga that is the KCRHA really be surprised? KCRHA's problems stem from its poor organizational structure, which lacks public accountability and leads to major decisions being made by a small group of local politicians who only spend a few hours a month working on KCRHA issues. Not surprisingly, this Democrat-preferred organizational structure is very similar to the one which governs Sound Transit, another flailing public agency. [Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61828846:sMuPa3DoN:m:1:2610672541:BCF2C672C35CB30927572AC223262B82:r). **In case you missed it ...** Vulnerable State House and Senate Democrats in swing districts are hoping that the headlines coming out of the special session -- that they made drugs illegal again -- are all they will need to survive their next election. Fortunately for them, the mainstream media is helping them with the positive spin. But a massive problem still exists for those on the Left who now want the drug issue to go away: those on the further Left want to keep bringing it up until they get their way and hard drugs are legalized. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61828847:sMuPa3DoN:m:1:2610672541:BCF2C672C35CB30927572AC223262B82:r). ** ** **This week 's wind-down...** Please enjoy a photo of a wheat field in Palouse, Washington, courtesy of former U.S. Rep. Rod Chandler. | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61828848:sMuPa3DoN:m:1:2610672541:BCF2C672C35CB30927572AC223262B82:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14205859&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osMuPa3DoN).
---

name: Gov. Roy Cooper
subject: An update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
What’s happening in North Carolina is another reminder of why we need to elect Democrats at every level of government who will fight to restore fundamental reproductive rights. | | |
---
I want to give you a quick update on what’s happening in North Carolina, Peter, and why this is so important not only for the future of my state -- but for our country. Earlier this month, our state’s Republicans passed an extreme, dangerous abortion ban that dramatically reduces health care freedoms in our state. I vetoed it -- but then, the Republicans voted to override my veto and enact the radical ban anyway. Now, they think they’ve won this fight, and they’re banking on all of us throwing up our hands and giving in. **But we’re not giving up, Peter. This is another powerful reminder of why we need to elect Democrats at every level of government who will fight to restore fundamental reproductive rights.** **That starts at the very top. We cannot allow extremist Republicans to win back the White House. That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you make a $25 donation to President Biden’s reelection campaign?**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63609379/407393581/-1397751745?code=wtene547&ms=wtene547&sourceid=wtene547&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmY1ZTZjNC1mNGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lPjwbbRGaEOEBE7GdIXQWFpaWpYswTIpMCIluhqqFsA=&emci=adf5e6c4-f4f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=aff5e6c4-f4f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

**EMILYs List is honoring Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, and you've been selected to take this exclusive legacy survey.**
_We're compiling responses tomorrow, so please respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight._

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63609380/407393582/-1397751745?code=wtene547&ms=wtene547&sourceid=wtene547&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmY1ZTZjNC1mNGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lPjwbbRGaEOEBE7GdIXQWFpaWpYswTIpMCIluhqqFsA=&emci=adf5e6c4-f4f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=aff5e6c4-f4f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Peter, we are SO GRATEFUL for Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi.

As Speaker of the House, Pelosi passed the Affordable Care Act, fought for pro-choice legislation, advanced LGBTQ+ equality, and so much more.

She has made it clear throughout her career: she will NEVER back down from fighting for women's rights. "Extreme Republicans waging a war on women's rights need to know one thing — we're NOT going back. We don't agonize — we organize!" **Nancy Pelosi changed the face of power in this country for the better, and as a result she's become a target for the GOP. As Republicans attempt to rewrite history and destroy her legacy, we're fighting back.**

We're launching our Speaker Pelosi Legacy Survey to show that EMILYs List supporters have her back — and to make sure she's forever recognized for her incredible service to this country. ****We're compiling responses tomorrow morning, and we are hoping to receive 10,000 more completed surveys before midnight, including yours. Please, tell us now: Will you take 60 seconds to complete our Nancy Pelosi Legacy Survey?****
****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63609381/407393583/-1397751745?code=wtene547&ms=wtene547&sourceid=wtene547&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmY1ZTZjNC1mNGY3LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lPjwbbRGaEOEBE7GdIXQWFpaWpYswTIpMCIluhqqFsA=&emci=adf5e6c4-f4f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=aff5e6c4-f4f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** ** Thank you for supporting Democratic pro-choice women like Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi.

\- the EMILYs List team

clean_body: | | | Speaker Emerita Pelosi has done so much for our country. EMILYs LIST NANCY PELOSI LEGACY SURVEY Issued May 21, 2023 EMILYs List is honoring Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, and you've been selected to take this exclusive legacy survey. We're compiling responses tomorrow, so please respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Peter, we are SO GRATEFUL for Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi. As Speaker of the House, Pelosi passed the Affordable Care Act, fought for pro-choice legislation, advanced LGBTQ+ equality, and so much more. She has made it clear throughout her career: she will NEVER back down from fighting for women's rights. "Extreme Republicans waging a war on women's rights need to know one thing — we're NOT going back. We don't agonize — we organize!" Nancy Pelosi changed the face of power in this country for the better, and as a result she's become a target for the GOP. As Republicans attempt to rewrite history and destroy her legacy, we're fighting back. We're launching our Speaker Pelosi Legacy Survey to show that EMILYs List supporters have her back — and to make sure she's forever recognized for her incredible service to this country. **We're compiling responses tomorrow morning, and we are hoping to receive 10,000 more completed surveys before midnight, including yours. Please, tell us now: Will you take 60 seconds to complete our Nancy Pelosi Legacy Survey? ** Thank you for supporting Democratic pro-choice women like Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi. \- the EMILYs List team | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: Your 2023 Second Amendment Survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW4RcP3DiN

The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's
history and undermine our Constitution....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW4RcP3DiN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend of the Constitution,

The far Left in America is attempting to
rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution-with
a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.

Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's
Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands
that education is essential to the defense of liberty.

We are reaching and teaching millions of
Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this
without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding.

Could you take a few minutes to complete our
Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below?
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61821961:W4RcP3DiN:m:3:2532013465:FE4E3FB3165AD68110B6013EFCEE74D9:r

Your timely survey answers will help us reach
and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year
about the importance of liberty-which includes the rights
protected by the Second Amendment.

There is no question that one of the Left's
most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our
liberty is ignorance.

Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing
truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in
1844.

Today our educational outreach efforts
include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty,
such as the Second Amendment.

As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler
observed in Imprimis, our digest of liberty that reaches millions
of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first
principles."

This means the Second Amendment is essential
for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of
defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom.

This kind of thinking is foreign to most
college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are
now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an
example…

Not long ago, the University of Virginia
canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day.

Why?

The administration was concerned that firing
guns in honor of those who served their country and did their
part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student
body.

Unfortunately, there are many more such
examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the
ongoing decline in civics education in America.

But instead of just TALKING, it's more
important to DO something about it.

That's why we have been working to expand our
educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

And this work continues today.

That's why I would like your answers to our
brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today
at this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61821961:W4RcP3DiN:m:3:2532013465:FE4E3FB3165AD68110B6013EFCEE74D9:r

We believe that an educated citizenry is
essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan
said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from
extinction."

Do you agree? I hope so.

This is why we reach and teach millions of
Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution.
It's also why we need your help today.

As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept
ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form
of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from
much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

Our independence from the government means
that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of
citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to
liberty.

It also means your gift really matters.

Today, you have a great opportunity to help
preserve liberty-including the Second Amendment-for future
generations.

After completing your Second Amendment
Survey, please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous
tax-deductible gift today.

And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll
send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our
thank you.

This hat commemorates our partnership with
USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best
American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and
Paralympics. But hurry-supplies are limited!

Thank you for your time and attention. I look
forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since
1844

P.S. Our Constitution-including the Second
Amendment-is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take
our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will
only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve
liberty for future generations. Thank you!
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61821961:W4RcP3DiN:m:3:2532013465:FE4E3FB3165AD68110B6013EFCEE74D9:r

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW4RcP3DiN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW4RcP3DiN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Team Casey
subject: A humble request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
If we start building now, we can win.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=67%2E552475%2EqpkWa1)
Peter,
We’ll say it again: Bob Casey’s re-election is going to be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country in 2024.
**CNN even put us on their “The 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2024” list.**
But we’ll let you in on a big truth about this race: **early investments will make ALL the difference.** If we start building our campaign’s resources now, we can get ahead of Republican attack ads and organize PA voters from Erie County to Bucks County.
**[The road ahead will be tough, so we’re humbly asking for an early investment in Bob Casey’s campaign: Will you donate now to defend this seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230521-1?refcode=em20230521-1&refcode2=67_552475_qpkWa1&akid=67%2E552475%2EqpkWa1)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230521-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230521-1&refcode2=67_552475_qpkWa1&akid=67%2E552475%2EqpkWa1)**
Bob is not in this fight to win the favor of ultra-wealthy or powerful special interests. Instead, we’re reaching out to hardworking Americans — just like you, Peter — to chip in what they can, when they can.
It won’t happen overnight, but we’re ensuring our future success in PA by building a strong, well-resourced campaign, day by day. That way, Bob can keep fighting for our families in the U.S. Senate as part of a Democratic majority.
**[Peter, please donate now to defend this must-hold seat in PA and keep Bob in the Senate. Your gift will go incredibly far if you chip in today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230521-1?refcode=em20230521-1&refcode2=67_552475_qpkWa1&akid=67%2E552475%2EqpkWa1)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230521-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230521-1&refcode2=67_552475_qpkWa1&akid=67%2E552475%2EqpkWa1)**
Thank you,
Team Casey

Bob Casey for Senate

clean_body: If we start building now, we can win. Peter, We’ll say it again: Bob Casey’s re-election is going to be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country in 2024. CNN even put us on their “The 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2024” list. But we’ll let you in on a big truth about this race: early investments will make ALL the difference. If we start building our campaign’s resources now, we can get ahead of Republican attack ads and organize PA voters from Erie County to Bucks County. Bob is not in this fight to win the favor of ultra-wealthy or powerful special interests. Instead, we’re reaching out to hardworking Americans — just like you, Peter — to chip in what they can, when they can. It won’t happen overnight, but we’re ensuring our future success in PA by building a strong, well-resourced campaign, day by day. That way, Bob can keep fighting for our families in the U.S. Senate as part of a Democratic majority. Thank you, Team Casey

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Tax cuts for yacht owners?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
If Kevin McCarthy and Republicans in Congress are so worried about the nation’s debt, then why in 2017 did they give tax breaks to yacht owners and people with private jets? 🤔
Now, in order to balance the budget, Republicans are demanding cuts to SNAP to take food out of babies’ mouths — instead of re-examining the Trump tax cuts that added millions to our national debt.
Alexandria isn’t accepting this hypocrisy from Speaker Kevin McCarthy:

[Alexandria is in Congress to represent and fight for working families like hers. Will you support our movement and help fight back against Kevin McCarthy’s hypocrisy with a $3 contribution today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230521.3OPHWO&refcode=em20230521-4360-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4360%2E2526796%2Ef1Ur-H)

Team AOC

name: Katie Porter
subject: Not wavering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Medicare for All
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23318%2E3422442%2EYwG3ok)
Last week I was proud to reintroduce Medicare for All.
I ran on Medicare for All in 2017—a policy choice some advised me not to take at the time. I was running to flip an Orange County district that had been held by Republicans for decades, and conventional wisdom said only “moderates” could win in these purple seats.
**But I knew that Medicare for All is the most effective way to provide ALL Americans quality healthcare.** It will improve care, lower costs, and expand choices. Even though we haven’t passed it into law yet, I’m not giving up the fight.
**I’ve never wavered in my support for Medicare for All (even when I’ve had tough re-election campaigns!) because it’s time to stand up to Big Insurance companies and provide care for all Americans.**
**[Please sign on to show your support for Medicare for All. ⬇️](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/20230521-em-medicare-for-all/?source=EMAH21_1_M4A_20230521_V1_F&akid=23318%2E3422442%2EYwG3ok)**
**[Sign your name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/20230521-em-medicare-for-all/?source=EMAH21_1_M4A_20230521_V1_F&akid=23318%2E3422442%2EYwG3ok)**
Thanks for being in this fight,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH21_1_M4A_20230521_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=23318_3422442_YwG3ok&akid=23318%2E3422442%2EYwG3ok)**

Friend,

**I have a shocking fact to share with you today.**

You may already be aware, but in case you didn't know .... we're in a crisis.

**China owns roughly _384,000 acres of agricultural land in the U.S._ of that 384,000, 195,000 are owned by 85 Chinese investors. ** **Why is China investing in U.S. farmland?**
**Why do the Chinese need 384,000 acres of U.S. property?**
Friend, we need to take back our country--**[and we need your help.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=4e17bb14f45a45c9abb7e69a0a3025a2&_e=y-KcCWuNq2EPaUZFbuAEYrrmLf6b0XX32RvzVVTe8s4T49kwZ3jx4qtvMIyolPh_xP-I6JwKHi0ZFyiyotcP72LVzbUvPNwygg3XkprwWoiKngQFL7npGCNWm4_ok5BJUmYqp85Zs9tufl5fJ0rEqWfr20RHXsxb2qJ1n7RZc9LRvXau4zMZoTkTqLSLOpWwNfBAkDTcYvDWXmo4VI4xwyuid67LReX_y0Qg5qo7L4jQOlnrvGWDKV-LReNB1nPKNlBzMvPW7sxQ59rKhiFSPJCQORHs2Mo5bl-fXbJJ4AU10nG1Dwz7P9SppmQoh0GaabsgR4X-CRGs63XYedut0xEWoq0Q2Sqpne8iA11er4df-vDV477wURkuAXzWUAvrOLHlp_M80xSzbIv4QTF7qooPvpD9cdmvHRVS5B7JzO8ZkkuHoVaL4rzbYskZJAKPNvf0mxkU8G_-H90vYZuzWs1WAWgRaP5Z8P8nYiwXgLbcNuZWCr7SPGcyzv8iZ2QdH-J896DMd0X8VnVpxDsvs6iN7CRnchutcBfg34O7B1Od1zgYQTdJhlGpEPV5Rop-)** We've been working with patriots across the country to find ways to fight back against China's ownership of U.S. farmland, and we need you to understand how crucial this is to our national security.

**Grassroots donors are the lifeblood of our movement, and without them, we cannot succeed.** With your help, we'll be able to take the fight right to the heart of the **CCP 's OBSESSION** with the U.S., and **STOP CHINA.**

**[Rush a donation here today.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=4e17bb14f45a45c9abb7e69a0a3025a2&_e=y-KcCWuNq2EPaUZFbuAEYrrmLf6b0XX32RvzVVTe8s4T49kwZ3jx4qtvMIyolPh_xP-I6JwKHi0ZFyiyotcP72LVzbUvPNwygg3XkprwWoiKngQFL7npGCNWm4_ok5BJUmYqp85Zs9tufl5fJ0rEqWfr20RHXsxb2qJ1n7RZc9LRvXau4zMZoTkTqLSLOpWwNfBAkDTcYvDWXmo4VI4xwyuid67LReX_y0Qg5qo7L4jQOlnrvGWDKV-LReNB1nPKNlBzMvPW7sxQ59rKhiFSPJCQORHs2Mo5bl-fXbJJ4AU10nG1Dwz7P9SppmQoh0GaabsgR4X-CRGs63XYedut0xEWoq0Q2Sqpne8iA11er4df-vDV477wURkuAXzWUAvrOLHlp_M80xSzbIv4QTF7qooPvpD9cdmvHRVS5B7JzO_nCk7tuBt7mJI1LRk0eI9CGP2ut7SzjOuePnZRSOoOVRqKzL7jXS25E_1AqgJgDP9Z_4cKUAckihvC2IKurMZPbnleZUypYfCC9Rf_L_evLnSsfjOlImrEYLN7D-vv92b4_eISWU_j6yH4HSQl2zei)**

clean_body: | Friend, I have a shocking fact to share with you today. You may already be aware, but in case you didn't know .... we're in a crisis. China owns roughly 384,000 acres of agricultural land in the U.S. of that 384,000, 195,000 are owned by 85 Chinese investors. Why is China investing in U.S. farmland? Why do the Chinese need 384,000 acres of U.S. property? Friend, we need to take back our country--- We've been working with patriots across the country to find ways to fight back against China's ownership of U.S. farmland, and we need you to understand how crucial this is to our national security. Grassroots donors are the lifeblood of our movement, and without them, we cannot succeed. With your help, we'll be able to take the fight right to the heart of the CCP 's OBSESSION with the U.S., and STOP CHINA. Thank you, Team Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. name: NEWS:
subject: TERRORISTS at our Border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
It’s clear as day: **_our border is out of control, and Joe Biden and the Democrats are to blame._ **

Since Title 42 expired, more and more illegals are POURING into America - and the Democrats don’t care who they are or what they’ve done.

_**In fact, FIVE migrants on the terrorist watch list were found near the Arizona border!**_

_Luckily, our border patrol agents were able to apprehend them - but with the Democrats refusing to give the resources and backup they need, there’s no knowing who else or what else slipped through._

**Countries have borders. And it’s not because we hate the people on the outside - it’s to protect the people on the inside.**

[**It’s time to secure our border. Join me today to BUILD THE WALL and keep America safe.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=d6643fc6e6cd4d1ca0c157359338b7a5&_e=kqWQUVa4GKABP3YNmGn30c225ZZw3kxPvjL7SEih535SjN6kUXU5MadrwmAOD03pBGMKc6XUFukf_gATJR--KVKAx_CPnDUM10Wb2RStu5abnnNT7IRF-ibY7_79wia1K24g_PRc0tFe_VdorV-GBYqnkES3ZrYPLgC-mcd3Ao2sf6aH7i5dld5K9rIG41bEDVBWFw-V-ppNG8D0Q4mcuUl0exlJ0h5Etd0A8ytULYrvdDK9jSsi9-l4SunSsMg-59BZx6afZpJUDjn87fQoO1f-EfR-qUvx9G0sNkNd8iQEaDqIRBtIgrX40hT2lgeU2ntuZVZ95fyGx6vacMatPpnbhRyynm52uulIrQUK09eDJFyJKnvoR5FXPmyjWJX8)

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: heading to Wegmans, need anything?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/88?t=1&akid=74%2E52803%2E86qk5Q)

| | [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1384?t=9&amount=25&akid=74%2E52803%2E86qk5Q) Hey team! My daughter laughs at me every time I say I’m about to do a “quick” grocery run, because she knows I’ll end up spending a few hours chatting it up with folks before I actually get to checking things off my list! It’s true – the grocery store is a buy-one-get-one deal for me, because it’s one of the best spots to connect directly with people and _check out_ the issues on their minds. It’s also a chance for me to get real honest feedback about the work I’m doing to tackle those issues. I cherish those talks – they keep me informed and grounded in faithful and compassionate service for our community. **It doesn’t matter what office I hold or what aisle I’m in, I’ll _never_ turn down the chance to listen to and learn from you.** So first, if you ever see me on one of my “quick” grocery trips, come up and say hi! (But be warned, I’m pretty chatty.) **And secondly, we just launched my campaign for the U.S. Senate, and we need all the support we can get from folks like you![Will you become a founding member of our team by chipping in $25 (or more!)?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1384?t=10&amount=25&akid=74%2E52803%2E86qk5Q)** | | | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1384?t=11&amount=25&akid=74%2E52803%2E86qk5Q)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Glenn Youngkin could have the votes to ban abortion in Virginia next year, based on this June 20th primary contest.
body:
Protect abortion in Virginia
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T317294e3-d88b-4530-a269-cb1283a7d113/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**We need to stop Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin's sick, right-wing agenda RIGHT NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7704fed3-31f5-45db-983a-ea6080075945/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Youngkin just released a one-minute ad to announce his intention to run for President. It's great stuff, ya know, if you can get past how he fawns over Ronald Reagan, a man who's been dead nearly 20 years and not President since 1989 (pssst, you've had 3 GOP Presidents since, the most recent guy's name rhymes with "rump"), and the fact he quotes Reagan on standing up to Russia, while his party has lined up at Vladimir Putin's bedside._ **_THE KEY_ :_Youngkin's pushing a crazy right-wing agenda in a state he tricked into thinking he was a moderate. We certainly can't let any Dems enable Youngkin, as he goes full authoritarian on abortion. Yet, a Democrat, Joe Morissey, who was twice disbarred as state prosecutor and charged with "delinquincy of a minor" for a relationship with a seventeen year old receptionist at his law firm, is supporting Youngkin._** **Morissey's the only "pro-life" (read: anti-choice) Democratic state senator who supports Youngkin's anti-abortion bill. In addition to Youngkin, Republicans control the state house and we only have a one-seat, pro-choice margin in the state house, at risk in November. ****But we can fix it. ****June 20th, Virginia has its primaries, and we have an outstanding Democratic candidate challenging Morissey, former State Delegate Lashrecse Aird. ** **This AP piece describes how just about every elected Democrat in VA is supporting Aird:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf889021-0346-4846-b826-11b2b2dbd6c6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**We don't know how the November general election will go, we could lose pro-choice seats, and we only have that one seat margin.**_ **_So why not double that margin, one month from today, to a 2 vote pro-choice VA State Senate majority, by removing so-called Democrat Morrissey and replacing him with Aird? She's made abortion rights the centerpiece of her campaign with a "Roe Not Joe" tour around the district._** **_Youngkin's greedy for power, so he'll fight harder for a profane, full abortion ban in Virginia to boost his presidential run. Yet, he can't do it without the votes. _** [**_Again, the primary is June 20th, but early voting has already begun! __Will you join Blue Amp's "Roe Not Joe," effort by supporting former Delegate Lashrecse Aird with $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to protect abortion in Virginia and the country from Youngkin?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea9b8d33-6c28-4f2b-bbce-938f9b413d86/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We must stop anti-abortion extremists, be they "Democrats" like Morrissey or Republicans like Youngkin._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Al Franken
subject: a big announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45936?t=6&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3) Hey, it’s Al Franken.

[**I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Voter Protection Project and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45936?t=7&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3)

Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too!

Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence.

In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. **And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law.**

Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that _funded the police!_ Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations.

**_Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them._**

Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know.

And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation.

[**So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Voter Protection Project and Josh’s campaign today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45936?t=8&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45937?t=9&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45938?t=10&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45939?t=11&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45940?t=12&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45936?t=13&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3)
This is important to me. And to our nation.

Thanks,

Al

**P.S.** I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. It’s a cheap tactic but for some reason it works! [**DONATE HERE.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45936?t=14&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=7901%2E878179%2EU67lk3)

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63623185/407410077/-53242616?refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230521_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzYyNTQ4Zi0wOWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZvvlviT75EXPtb9o3RX7Kq-ybFlEEaWxhTnKjaR1QZY=)
---
Peter — I wanted to make sure you got yesterday’s message about our flash goal. I truly mean it, your contribution is critical to ensuring our success statewide. While the GOP can rely on endless dollars tied to special interests — we are a party powered by people from Memphis to Mountain City and everywhere in between. **Can I count on you to be one of the 378 people we need to pitch in to reach our goal before midnight?** **Here’s a personal link for you: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndp-em-may2023=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63623186/407410079/-53242616?refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230521_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzYyNTQ4Zi0wOWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZvvlviT75EXPtb9o3RX7Kq-ybFlEEaWxhTnKjaR1QZY=)** Thanks for stepping up today, Peter. Hendrell \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **TNDP Finance Team** <info@tndp.org>
Date: Sat, May 20, 2023
Subject: 2100 |
---
We won’t lie — building our team to win three special election races this summer is going to be tough. Things normally slow down at this time of year as folks head off to enjoy the summer, plus, this election wasn’t planned in our regular fundraising cycle.
**We mention this, Peter, because we have to ask today: can we count on you to pitch in your first $3 contribution right now? We can’t afford to slow down at all this summer.**
[PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63623193/407410080/-53242616?refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230521_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzYyNTQ4Zi0wOWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZvvlviT75EXPtb9o3RX7Kq-ybFlEEaWxhTnKjaR1QZY=)
---
We’re setting a flash goal of bringing in 2,100 contributions before tomorrow at midnight to help build our infrastructure as we fight for Democrats up and down the ballot this summer. We’ll have to do twice as much work to turn out voters across the state, and it’s vital that we lay the foundation of our GOTV strategy right now.
Peter, it’s not about how much you can give, but about how many folks reading this email will step up to the plate today. With this goal, every single contribution counts. whether it’s $3 or $30, we could use your support.
**If you can spare a couple bucks today, we’d really appreciate the support. Help fuel our work by chipping in right now.**
[PITCH IN $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63623194/407410086/-53242616?amount=3&refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230521_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzYyNTQ4Zi0wOWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZvvlviT75EXPtb9o3RX7Kq-ybFlEEaWxhTnKjaR1QZY=)
---

clean_body: | = Peter — I wanted to make sure you got yesterday’s message about our flash goal. I truly mean it, your contribution is critical to ensuring our success statewide. While the GOP can rely on endless dollars tied to special interests — we are a party powered by people from Memphis to Mountain City and everywhere in between. Can I count on you to be one of the 378 people we need to pitch in to reach our goal before midnight? Here’s a personal link for you: = Thanks for stepping up today, Peter. Hendrell \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: TNDP Finance Team <info@tndp.org> Date: Sat, May 20, 2023 Subject: 2100 | We won’t lie — building our team to win three special election races this summer is going to be tough. Things normally slow down at this time of year as folks head off to enjoy the summer, plus, this election wasn’t planned in our regular fundraising cycle. We mention this, Peter, because we have to ask today: can we count on you to pitch in your first $3 contribution right now? We can’t afford to slow down at all this summer. = We’re setting a flash goal of bringing in 2,100 contributions before tomorrow at midnight to help build our infrastructure as we fight for Democrats up and down the ballot this summer. We’ll have to do twice as much work to turn out voters across the state, and it’s vital that we lay the foundation of our GOTV strategy right now. Peter, it’s not about how much you can give, but about how many folks reading this email will step up to the plate today. With this goal, every single contribution counts. whether it’s $3 or $30, we could use your support. If you can spare a couple bucks today, we’d really appreciate the support. Help fuel our work by chipping in right now. = = Thanks in advance for your contribution, Team TNDP Tennessee Democratic Party 4900 Centennial Blvd Suite 300 Nashville, TN 37209 United States | mailto:info@tndp.org | CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

subject: Upcoming Events

body:
We hope to see you soon
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ExNRsxwNzbDO9uYF-2JiyJGloHs6CpdwFdMDrX9X4d8ClboMbwonHg0F49Bbeur1bEcJ0VbGfeaWkB5kD2M_pQV_K-57tLOhxHrmJbVc0RN8sCcxbw161HPKvlRZgelQpCbRLPvsfEbnbepaMdT6TtA7n6fvoQFHKQED5jsTHko=&c=5hqBhH--FxPW_46M2IJYUwChkXYWxF5rt1x1yPA9_8zzg1KDO06S4g==&ch=dX91SvN--o6G6mkp17DM2evQcoNS69m2RmiPrSIDbKxsd7mQ2AkhMw==)

| Upcoming Events
---
| COME JOIN US
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

This week our focus is to hit as many doors as we possibly can. I'll be out walking every day this week and I need volunteers to join me. Sign up today for an afternoon shift, [chris@chaseforva.com](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com).

On Monday night we have two Republican meetings at the same time. I'll be speaking at the Colonial Heights Republican Committee meeting at Life Christian Academy, located at 1221 Boulevard, Colonial Heights, VA 23834. My staff will be at the Chesterfield Republican Committee on Monday night at Swift Creek Middle School, located at 3700 Old Hundred Rd S., Midlothian, VA 23112. Both meetings begin at 7pm. We would really appreciate if supporters could attend either meeting.

We are having a Special Event on June 1st with Bishop E.W. Jackson. More information to follow.

Come visit our office this week to help with mail projects, phone calls, or door-to-door.

We look forward to seeing you this week.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase
|

# DON'T MISS Monday May 22nd, 6:30PM El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
---
## The current mission
---
|
---
Monday evening the May 22nd, we are excited to show a movie for our CRA meeting. Nena and I had the privilege of being invited to the Red Carpet premiere of the Documentary Grid Down Power up. This is an Amazing film narrated by Dennis Quaid. We were able to spend time with the writers, director and the producers. We also talked with former Congressmen, defense department personnel, and special forces. It was an amazing, but alarming time. You must see this film Monday evening.
Door opens at 6:30 we get started shortly after.
Monday May 22nd, El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
Give me Liberty or Give me death!
Derrick Gates
|
---
# Dennis Quaid hosts an alarming look into the potential of life without power.
A dynamic legion of energy, economic, national security, and infrastructure experts fearlessly expose our most critical global threat: the vulnerability of our nation’s power grids. Together they inform the public of imminent threats and the infinite horrors in store from prolonged power loss. Buckle down and power up with this series of shocking scenarios. Grid failure is a real and imminent threat, a devastatingly deadly occurrence leading to life-threatening shortages of heat, food, and water. If protective measures are not taken, we will experience catastrophic failures leaving citizens in states of starvation, death, destruction, and darkness for months. Reports released from Texas’ 3-day “snowmageddon” indicate a minimum death toll of 246, with some estimates climbing as high as 702. An outage of 1-2 years would lead to 10,000,000+ deaths. One thing is evident: the clock is ticking, and if nothing changes, the power may go out for good.
---
---

If protective measures are not taken, we will experience catastrophic failures leaving citizens in states of starvation, death, destruction, and darkness for months. Reports released from Texas’ 3-day “snowmageddon” indicate a minimum death toll of 246, with some estimates climbing as high as 702. An outage of 1-2 years would lead to 10,000,000+ deaths. One thing is evident: the clock is ticking, and if nothing changes, the power may go out for good. | JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link! | | STOP FEEDING THE RINOS!! | ©2023 South Bay CRA | South Bay CRA | "Web Version" "Preferences" "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

body:
Seth is running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=9EDl62vF53Uw%2FxbQ8U6%2FGkluYXz2tkTHI8FHvXvCkeVK3S0SOvIXOFOr7ARfbJW2c5V9q2TYTcp5PiWFwOl1upoTybo53E78TV3PPoDWrTxzNXIfpPTWhwVEplUXDpWJpS6YQ7f3ziiceXW2UJqoQBSm7dQ7KGqAJ4JYdnWH2oRJitlyWe4jSUSciXfSGLuuaz3midYdkrKJYDtpuhbYjB89fNtsWGWjbm3AlJja9NU%2FOrVEjQmF7cDKvvH5R19KGuqo6WjtELKDBekPxfTmsR9faIkBBNWjnhnayJyc9WpnZBGBPSGJUx1B7Wzs2Uu0ptQLaIf1zfI6nCS7MB57s9iZNDwY9i%2BJordoS8UkBc11wXhxQljH5KQZ4X0n2qO40RagBIg4AwNgW9W6ohqKQ3FI6hIx5DF6hoC%2FccHzgT9pd1%2FQaM97m9orIasAgcNR)

Peter,

Throughout May, we’re celebrating Jewish American Heritage Month.

This is an opportunity to honor the heritage of Jewish Americans, to celebrate the contributions that Jewish Americans have made to communities here in Rhode Island and across the nation, and to recommit to the fight against antisemitism here at home and around the world.

It is our shared responsibility to fight back against antisemitism, bigotry, and hate in all its forms and whenever it rears its ugly head, especially as acts of antisemitism are on the rise in communities across America.

Just last weekend, a far-right, antisemitic group of extremists marched along the National Mall in Washington, DC. The group, Patriot Front, is one of the largest distributors of antisemitic propaganda in America. Their actions are despicable and we must rise up against them at every opportunity.

This must be a reminder that our work to create a more perfect union where every American, regardless of background or religious views, can live equally, openly, and without fear of retribution is still unfinished — _but is always possible._

[If you are with me, will you join us in standing against antisemitism by adding your name to our petition today? Let this be a moment to recommit to the fight against bigotry and hate in all its forms across America.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63623709/407412232/-689236917?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230521_PT_1.1_0_6MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_antisemitism&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGVkMTUxOS0wYmY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CtJrBy1TvbWnWZ8bt828p7_0K9XiGBBfNcXG4qjhu8E=&emci=bc84e3aa-e6f7-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f0ed1519-0bf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

body:
| | | Fellow conservative, My parents risked their lives coming to America to escape communism in Cuba. _But now, socialist Democrats are trying to bring the SAME agenda to America._ _Let me be clear: I will NEVER let America become a socialist country._
**I can’t defend our country from socialism alone.**[**Sign our “Stop Socialism” petition today and take a stand against the socialist, Democrat agenda!**](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=7c3ce12818ae4c548b2a8ad79659b1d4&_e=Z_Bj6hEZ4ZXwo_AqJ7AEsbprYZk0xDSS97cqOAqJvOzUv3qiZeD64_Zco6SLverngPYDQg3eP5XW0xatP3Edsk8U_MX8lNsOVoP2IswnT4MddvuD87GBayHrXjCaKyDbFGnVlr0FfWNov0utg4IXT74RELNjSXRrY3cAUO4YMfOeoYeFNFn2g_8m4FEfvRIkm6PKL3GJcf6Pt36MZif9-4XxC1hQaLKqE0QHhb-Na6Ya__jX4hO7YuzHogz1hhkIE1FgpwJGdN24WU3HQRalJj-F11oQkQ4iOL0HYbzBv4EmuLFAPcDphgwlFM7CDlc015N4lVQpHSzRfA2ronurD_sYliu6LIcluBCqbvKWTac_-qNFbJACbZaPdAxDcVLd)

Socialism only leads to hunger, violence and chaos. But the Democrats want to paint a picture of a false utopia and poison our children with their lives. name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: stand with me against antisemitism
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | This month is Jewish American Heritage Month.

While this month is a time to celebrate and recognize the contributions of the Jewish community, we cannot ignore the fact that antisemitism and anti-Jewish crimes remain sadly on the rise in our nation and around the world.

According to data released by the ADL, **antisemitic incidents rose 36% in New Jersey in 2022** , reaching 408 total incidents — the most ever recorded in the state and the third–highest number recorded in any state across the country last year.

As the only Jewish member of the New Jersey congressional delegation, the spike in antisemitism, and anti-Israel sentiment, hits me and my family particularly hard — like I know it does for so many of you.

[Will you join me in honoring this month by adding your name to my petition and pledging to call out antisemitism, no matter who or where it comes from?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63623863/407413044/-550302083?refcode2=d2c109e4-0df8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230520_PT_antisemitism_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_antisemitism&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmMxMDllNC0wZGY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSMkZ5THbhL2vnPvsvkP3ky0dqDBqIZ8lycEGf6hznY=&emci=acc12db1-97f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d2c109e4-0df8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=37438246)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63623864/407413045/-550302083?refcode2=d2c109e4-0df8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230520_PT_antisemitism_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_antisemitism&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmMxMDllNC0wZGY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSMkZ5THbhL2vnPvsvkP3ky0dqDBqIZ8lycEGf6hznY=&emci=acc12db1-97f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d2c109e4-0df8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=37438246)
---

**The continued, despicable surge in antisemitism across New Jersey and our country should sound an alarm for every single American.** The magnitude of the crisis we are facing calls for concerted action, at every level, to ensure that there truly is no place for hate in our state, in our local communities, or anywhere in our nation.

I’ve been at the forefront of combating antisemitism for years now — even before coming to Congress. Speaking up and out — **_even against those in my own party_** — whenever and wherever we see it.

[Will you stand with me this month, and every day by adding your name and pledging to do your part to end antisemitism, and fight for a future without hate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63623865/407413046/-550302083?refcode2=d2c109e4-0df8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230520_PT_antisemitism_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_antisemitism&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmMxMDllNC0wZGY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSMkZ5THbhL2vnPvsvkP3ky0dqDBqIZ8lycEGf6hznY=&emci=acc12db1-97f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d2c109e4-0df8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=37438246)
[STAND WITH ME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63623866/407413047/-550302083?refcode2=d2c109e4-0df8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230520_PT_antisemitism_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_antisemitism&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmMxMDllNC0wZGY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSMkZ5THbhL2vnPvsvkP3ky0dqDBqIZ8lycEGf6hznY=&emci=acc12db1-97f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d2c109e4-0df8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=37438246)

Thank you,

Josh

* * *

clean_body: | | This month is Jewish American Heritage Month. While this month is a time to celebrate and recognize the contributions of the Jewish community, we cannot ignore the fact that antisemitism and anti-Jewish crimes remain sadly on the rise in our nation and around the world. According to data released by the ADL, antisemitic incidents rose 36% in New Jersey in 2022 , reaching 408 total incidents — the most ever recorded in the state and the third–highest number recorded in any state across the country last year. As the only Jewish member of the New Jersey congressional delegation, the spike in antisemitism, and anti-Israel sentiment, hits me and my family particularly hard — like I know it does for so many of you. | The continued, despicable surge in antisemitism across New Jersey and our country should sound an alarm for every single American. The magnitude of the crisis we are facing calls for concerted action, at every level, to ensure that there truly is no place for hate in our state, in our local communities, or anywhere in our nation. I’ve been at the forefront of combating antisemitism for years now — even before coming to Congress. Speaking up and out — even against those in my own party — whenever and wherever we see it. Thank you, Josh | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Adam Schiff
subject: solidarity 👊
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2276%2E5257348%2EQiQctW ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, on Friday I joined the picket line with striking Writers
Guild of America West members in Los Angeles.

The turnout and community support for the writers on strike was
tremendous.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC30_20230521_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2276%2E5257348%2EQiQctW ]Adam Schiff speaking through bullhorn with Writers Guild of America workers
on strike

The message we sent across Los Angeles and beyond was clear — we’re in a
new era of streaming, and it’s imperative that workers are compensated and
treated fairly.

The WGA fight for better pay and wage protections will shape this industry
for decades. Their fight is vital to ensuring a decent livelihood for
those who make the entertainment industry such a creative powerhouse. And
jobs in California.

I’ve represented many of these writers in my district for decades. But
this is also personal to me — picketing alongside my brother David and
leaders like WGAW President Meredith Stiehm and former president Chris
Keyser, all of us standing in solidarity to fight for a fair deal.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC30_20230521_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2276%2E5257348%2EQiQctW ]Adam Schiff and David holding picket signs

The bottom line is that workers need a deal that includes good salaries
and keeps our favorite TV and movie productions afloat. Film, TV, and
music all depend on human creativity and imagination, and without the
writers, there would be no heroes, no villains, no stories to make us
laugh or cry. Nothing but static on the TV or big screen.

We turned out on the picket line to say that as technologies change, and
AI becomes a more dominant force, that workers need to be protected. And
that on Star Trek Day, we want everyone in this industry to be able to
live long and prosper.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC30_20230521_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2276%2E5257348%2EQiQctW ]Adam Schiff lifts hand in Vulcan greeting as he speaks through a bullhorn on
the WGA picket line

This isn’t the end of the writers’ strike. They are going to need our
support from here on out to collectively bargain for a fair deal. But I
know they can get it done. I saw their determination on Friday. And I
believe that with folks like this leading the way, we can create a better
future for all workers across the country.

Because this isn’t just about writers, or the entertainment industry. This
is really about the changing workplace all across the nation, and the need
to make sure that as technologies change, workers are not left behind. And
that the economy needs to work for everyone.

Thanks for taking the time to catch up on this important issue and
campaign update. I’ll send you more from the road soon.

All the best,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=may2023_abs_em.FKV_Cj&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC30_20230521_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2276%2E5257348%2EQiQctW ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2023_abs_em.tUimEk&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC30_20230521_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2276%2E5257348%2EQiQctW ]DONATE

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=2276%2E5257348%2EQiQctW ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=2276%2E5257348%2EQiQctW ]Privacy Policy

name: Amanda Nichols
subject: Keith Ellison is offering you a special deal on a signed copy of his new book!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, Did you see
our message about Keith Ellison offering Our Revolution members a signed
copy of his new book: Breaking the Wheel: Ending the Cycle of Police
Violence?

The book has a forward from George Floyd’s brother Philonise and is a
detailed account of Keith’s work to convict Floyd’s police officer killer
and what social justice organizers can learn from it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8671?t=1011&akid=4297%2E5885482%2EB3wTNN ]Keith Ellison is so grateful for Our Revolution helping him win
multiple tough races that he’s offering you an incredible deal: for a
donation of $35 or more, we’ll send you a signed copy of his new book!
Pitch in here:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

—Begin Forwarded Message—

Peter Willis,

Thanks to your support, Our Revolution
helped Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison fend off multiple extreme
challengers bankrolled by police unions. In that role, he overcame
systemic barriers to convict police officer Derek Chauvin for brutally
murdering George Floyd.

While on the case, Keith kept a diary which he is now releasing as a book
with a forward from George Floyd's brother Philonise called Breaking the
Wheel: Ending the Cycle of Police Violence.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8671?t=1012&akid=4297%2E5885482%2EB3wTNN ]Since Our Revolution was so critical to helping Keith overcome police
unions and win re-election, Keith is offering Our Revolution supporters a
special deal! Donate $35 or more, and we'll send you a signed copy of
Keith Ellison's new book!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8671?t=1013&akid=4297%2E5885482%2EB3wTNN ][IMG]

Keith said he wrote this book to make sure that future organizers fighting
for change had "a historical account and a guide to officials when faced
with a case of police misconduct."

Without Our Revolution helping Keith Ellison win elections for attorney
general (last fall by less than 21,000 votes), he wouldn't be doing this
incredibly important work to expose systemic bias and model how to
overcome it.

America needs a clear dialogue around true public safety and police
reform. That’s why Keith will be joining us for a deep dive into this
critical topic on our LIVE Call Monday Night.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8671?t=1014&akid=4297%2E5885482%2EB3wTNN ]Click here to reserve your signed copy of Keith Ellison's new book with
a donation of $35 or more!

When we organize, we win.
Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Juliana at United We Dream Action
subject: No time to celebrate
body:
Our elected officials are giving into anti-immigrant fear mongering with proposals to deter and expel asylum seekers. | | | Peter — Even though Title 42 _finally_ ended after countless months of advocacy, there’s no time to celebrate: **There are already plans to replace it with even more inhumane policies.** From Republicans in Congress to the Biden administration, our elected officials are giving into anti-immigrant fear mongering with proposals to deter and expel asylum seekers.
* House Republicans proposed legislation that will result in expedited removals, family detention, and the deportation of unaccompanied children 💔

* Conservative Senators want to codify Title 42’s harmful legacy of expelling asylum seekers and denying the right to asylum ⛔️

* President Biden introduced a rule that will make it harder to obtain asylum ❌

We need to reject these cruel policies that will lead to more militarization, incarceration, and deportation. United We Dream Action is leading the charge to reject division and welcome all immigrants — but we need you with us in this fight. **Donate $10 now to fight back against anti-immigrant policies. clean_body: Our elected officials are giving into anti-immigrant fear mongering with proposals to deter and expel asylum seekers. | | | Peter — Even though Title 42 finally ended after countless months of advocacy, there’s no time to celebrate: There are already plans to replace it with even more inhumane policies. From Republicans in Congress to the Biden administration, our elected officials are giving into anti-immigrant fear mongering with proposals to deter and expel asylum seekers. House Republicans proposed legislation that will result in expedited removals, family detention, and the deportation of unaccompanied children 💔 Conservative Senators want to codify Title 42’s harmful legacy of expelling asylum seekers and denying the right to asylum ⛔️ President Biden introduced a rule that will make it harder to obtain asylum ❌ We need to reject these cruel policies that will lead to more militarization, incarceration, and deportation. United We Dream Action is leading the charge to reject division and welcome all immigrants — but we need you with us in this fight. Donate $10 now to fight back against anti-immigrant policies. We can’t move backwards after securing an end to the harmful Title 42 policy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for stepping up, Juliana, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters contribute monthly to help us push back against policies that endanger immigrants. Join them by setting up a recurring donation today so we can prepare for the fights ahead:** | |

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Debt limit disaster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen warns of “widespread suffering” if we don’t raise the debt limit, allowing the government to borrow and spend money that it’s already mandated to do by Congress.

Rep. Jay Obernolte and his Republican colleagues in the House are holding the global economy hostage, using it as leverage to [extract devastating cuts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63624090/407415546/205584606?link_id=3&can_id=1009ba16a2c131469c5f5aa5414b99b4&source=email-sign-the-petition-subpoena-chief-justice-john-roberts&email_referrer=email_1924009&email_subject=republicans-crashing-our-economy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzcyZTYxNC0xMmY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=toJ7qKaM1I01iwTZAITlHen22tuWwkh-zuGp40giAwQ=&emci=89b6e5f9-74f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1772e614-12f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)

**I’m running for Congress because California’s 23rd District deserves a representative who will govern, not threaten global economic catastrophe.

[Unlike my opponent, I’m not taking corporate PAC money, which means I need your help. Join our campaign to flip CA-23 and donate today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63624091/407415547/-727517715?amount=10&refcode=pl_20230519_09&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzcyZTYxNC0xMmY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=toJ7qKaM1I01iwTZAITlHen22tuWwkh-zuGp40giAwQ=)**

Obernolte voted for a plan that would furlough over 2,000 wildland firefighters, putting Californians in harm’s way as climate change makes fires worse.

1.2 million would lose nutrition assistance from WIC. 1 million senior citizens would lose Meals on Wheels. 640,000 families would lose rental assistance.

As someone that’s lived during hard times, struggling to afford food and shelter, I’m appalled.

**That’s not leadership. That’s not compromise. That’s recklessness.**

In Congress, I will refuse to use the full faith and credit of the United States as a political pawn.

**[Stop debt-limit brinksmanship and donate to my campaign to flip CA-23, take back the House, and defeat Rep. Jay Obernolte today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63624092/407415548/-727517715?amount=10&refcode=pl_20230519_09&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzcyZTYxNC0xMmY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=toJ7qKaM1I01iwTZAITlHen22tuWwkh-zuGp40giAwQ=)**

Thanks for your support,
Derek Marshall

clean_body: Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen warns of “widespread suffering” if we don’t raise the debt limit, allowing the government to borrow and spend money that it’s already mandated to do by Congress. Rep. Jay Obernolte and his Republican colleagues in the House are holding the global economy hostage, using it as leverage to I’m running for Congress because California’s 23rd District deserves a representative who will govern, not threaten global economic catastrophe. = Obernolte voted for a plan that would furlough over 2,000 wildland firefighters, putting Californians in harm’s way as climate change makes fires worse. 1.2 million would lose nutrition assistance from WIC. 1 million senior citizens would lose Meals on Wheels. 640,000 families would lose rental assistance. As someone that’s lived during hard times, struggling to afford food and shelter, I’m appalled. That’s not leadership. That’s not compromise. That’s recklessness. In Congress, I will refuse to use the full faith and credit of the United States as a political pawn. = Thanks for your support, Derek Marshall = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. subject: Protecting our democracy means defending voting rights for ALL Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
It's time to act.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63624637/407419288/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjJhYTc2MmItMTRmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R3Tw4YjnZ8ol_AtkwLc3BLCDuaLnFBHv3tsepYg_LHk=&emci=aa1859db-63f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f2aa762b-14f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

Today marks the 104th anniversary of the House passing the 19th Amendment, which granted women the right to vote. But it wasn't until half a century later that Congress guaranteed the voting rights of Black, brown, and Indigenous Americans.

As we take the time to reflect on how far we've come, it's important we also recognize how much further we have to go. Since the Supreme Court's 2013 decision to gut the Voting Rights Act of 1965, we've seen relentless attacks on voting rights and our elections across the country.

**[Derek is fighting to pass federal legislation that will restore and expand the protections of the Voting Rights Act of 1965. If you agree we need to defend the right to vote for all Americans, add your name.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63624638/407419289/1991301359?ms=em23_230521_19th_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&refcode=em23_230521_19th_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&source=em23_230521_19th_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230521_19th_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=jBvfhSDYXPMkcTSwlPs2OPGlL7jO/x8fHkN1mokpKMdH73fKAtVHKCnqgwfT4k4YF6jgQSAcbF4pY3C/jTc7CYeTflz8L84z+FTtdJxnk+ro7edfiTHn2ocoQ6w+nTo/u6GaNz470/ad9QtuHD4wE4psiMzfzTS1yLASYTaivSA=&refcode2=f2aa762b-14f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjJhYTc2MmItMTRmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R3Tw4YjnZ8ol_AtkwLc3BLCDuaLnFBHv3tsepYg_LHk=&emci=aa1859db-63f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f2aa762b-14f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**

Thanks to the sacrifice and dedication of generations of civil rights activists, our nation has made progress in the fight for women's equality and voting rights, too. But in 2023 alone, extreme lawmakers across the country have filed dozens of anti-voter, anti-democracy, and anti-American bills to make it harder for Americans to make their voices heard at the ballot box.

Let's be clear: Voter suppression of any kind is a threat to our democracy. And it disproportionately harms voters of color, seniors, and young people. It's imperative we defend voting rights for every American.

**[We can't let extreme politicians roll back voter protections and rights to further their own dangerous, self-serving agendas. On today's anniversary, add your name if you agree we need to protect and expand voting rights for every American.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63624640/407419290/1991301359?ms=em23_230521_19th_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&refcode=em23_230521_19th_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&source=em23_230521_19th_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230521_19th_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=jBvfhSDYXPMkcTSwlPs2OPGlL7jO/x8fHkN1mokpKMdH73fKAtVHKCnqgwfT4k4YF6jgQSAcbF4pY3C/jTc7CYeTflz8L84z+FTtdJxnk+ro7edfiTHn2ocoQ6w+nTo/u6GaNz470/ad9QtuHD4wE4psiMzfzTS1yLASYTaivSA=&refcode2=f2aa762b-14f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjJhYTc2MmItMTRmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R3Tw4YjnZ8ol_AtkwLc3BLCDuaLnFBHv3tsepYg_LHk=&emci=aa1859db-63f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f2aa762b-14f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63624643/407419292/1071353790?refcode=em23_230521_19th_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230521_19th_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=f2aa762b-14f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjJhYTc2MmItMTRmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R3Tw4YjnZ8ol_AtkwLc3BLCDuaLnFBHv3tsepYg_LHk=)

subject: To Joe Biden: I stand with you.

body:
just when we thought it couldn’t get any worse...
| | President Biden is under full MAGA ATTACK — **Marjorie Taylor Greene just filed IMPEACHMENT articles against him!**

[50,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Sign our EMERGENCY petition to show President Biden we stand with him »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230521_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=7848%2E878179%2EB9nN9d) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden?refcode=VPP_20230521_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=7848%2E878179%2EB9nN9d) | [**SIGN NOW: STAND WITH PRESIDENT BIDEN AGAINST BASELESS REPUBLICAN ATTACKS »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230521_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=7848%2E878179%2EB9nN9d)
---
Marjorie Taylor Greene is a traitor, far-right extremist, and total DISGRACE.

And now, she’s doing everything she can to TANK Biden’s approval rating... _right as the presidential race is heating up!_

**Don’t abandon President Biden when he needs us most.**

[We need 50,000 signatures by tomorrow to show Democrats EVERYWHERE stand with President Biden »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230521_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=7848%2E878179%2EB9nN9d)
[**SIGN NOW: STAND WITH PRESIDENT BIDEN AGAINST BASELESS REPUBLICAN ATTACKS »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230521_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=7848%2E878179%2EB9nN9d)
---
This is too urgent to ignore,

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7848%2E878179%2EB9nN9d). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7848%2E878179%2EB9nN9d).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7848%2E878179%2EB9nN9d) to request fewer emails. [**May 21, 1819:** The first bicycle in the U.S. was seen in New York City. Alternately called “velocipedes,” “swift walkers,” “hobby horses,” or “dandy horses,” they had been imported from London that same year. This development revolutionized transportation, providing a new means of mobility for individuals. Despite their uncomfortable ride due to the lack of suspension, these bicycles gained popularity and set the foundation for the subsequent advancements in bicycle technology that would follow.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=bb44a682bd0a404f8dbcd324093974fa&_e=NvYSCNEgGvDNozg7qSTGdKEUhwZFVtj6M-BmwuG9VWYzN5Mc6ufGgkdr1gMPVavE-ggBbZJy8MAL1Lf3h0kptfapI4UebA1BCsDgfcLtt-1ToOhXTvG5oQLZBBpZJblAeFDQ53I8X6eLHV-vZnIVAaDkIq6CEb82DNiyO3cOv0wTESpMHLqvNPreXwBVeQTdglUxnMXtOLpskgSFNQn8_GQxkH4b_wgpNsDVx0cBfO7rkMdgVTntB6Wr2_tvCGc6xeQau3RKWQCgznNwq94UFw%3D%3D) **Source -[famousdaily.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=bb44a682bd0a404f8dbcd324093974fa&_e=NvYSCNEgGvDNozg7qSTGdKEUhwZFVtj6M-BmwuG9VWYzN5Mc6ufGgkdr1gMPVavE-ggBbZJy8MAL1Lf3h0kptfapI4UebA1BCsDgfcLtt-1ToOhXTvG5oQLZBBpZJblAaB_rzxkaQ64N45NreOMfB2OaJDqGlpYy16AkIwYA3jJQueGu8bwTy0GjClGtwAPlTWaa4_ITVpBpgPhs2HKV5AkzWv_N38TmJeal7FxsfXu9XNVSo0iS10RamkJMVQHPlDkQFkrbak8NF9QrFOAjnQ%3D%3D)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=bb44a682bd0a404f8dbcd324093974fa&_e=nYPKvAOxiWWSC-O_jZAJ5CwnCyiIL0EzWaRZWgSdfu93jb855CAJ-gPmycBz23SH1Mj6_aZ0WcCbaE01qSZ0CmzCPPi3qbHeN33vz9NL3Urbx26-8qUqhuzkCAhzHk5E2mbjtHofM69wkTKrEbSHCU7S4OPntdeS5HyyvtVChuxoRwfHLO2O_7bekcXgMnyPTIvnqew-xCs_btCCGs8HlWo0H5QnUqGezrpiPV2IlZ2zRXEPXrn8RtfFVbt3I46R)**
