[**May 21, 1881:** The American Red Cross was founded by Clara Barton and Adolphus Solomons as a humanitarian organization with the aim of providing relief to those in need. This non-profit organization has played a significant role in responding to disasters, offering support to military personnel and their families, and promoting blood donation. With its widespread presence and dedicated volunteers, the American Red Cross continues to make a positive impact on communities across the United States, embodying the spirit of compassion and assistance.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=bb44a682bd0a404f8dbcd324093974fa&_e=nYPKvAOxiWWSC-O_jZAJ5EWzYfUoeuQU_FINZqGc9oAjmh1PelFJGtdWShMv0g550_EGTwaqESG_GaIixjWQhr7tG0q8EtZ0IUZAEjh0dMXt77bRJNsTtCk1sQDrzCPu01CnHBB2pjwhdQCJk-8Hud9gcjfqHNMOEtLXoMK0oqomVQHLQfXi9c5aQqYYxHKyWJFzHfCKAUii0NfEerxMAMcBjmkbM7MiRE_MF1P7uHTcQJny305s69OtnQAuAC0SeYhPpvky_-IGZdmFx6ZtnQ%3D%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=bb44a682bd0a404f8dbcd324093974fa&_e=nYPKvAOxiWWSC-O_jZAJ5EWzYfUoeuQU_FINZqGc9oAjmh1PelFJGtdWShMv0g550_EGTwaqESG_GaIixjWQhr7tG0q8EtZ0IUZAEjh0dMX3vgK3dLlMr0UKnexUBblox_EwOODbrKS19dUUbj9X-Qq01ikY3t7plfVKEAXA5o-6o_k5NvlQiukfnOnDRCW0QfMg48TFrpRZBIWOn-AyZTA9kPf9UoT3Uq2pZ0-zH_uE0e2EK8sWNGGEJbWK24QB8euik7uwbBN2Bw9MdfgsNw%3D%3D)**

[**May 21, 1932:** Exactly five years after Charles Lindbergh's groundbreaking solo flight across the Atlantic, Amelia Earhart made history by becoming the first female pilot to achieve the same remarkable feat. She successfully landed her plane in Ireland, completing a nonstop journey across the North Atlantic. Covering a distance of over 2,000 miles from Newfoundland, Earhart accomplished this incredible feat in under 15 hours, solidifying her place in aviation history as a trailblazing aviator.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=bb44a682bd0a404f8dbcd324093974fa&_e=nYPKvAOxiWWSC-O_jZAJ5EWzYfUoeuQU_FINZqGc9oAjmh1PelFJGtdWShMv0g55KNC9jOO-C3uVI31b-T3govvsLfXw2JK9ZGOOl7mwLt4hWP0mWzqPytvKH0QGNX5Un5C_uU2vl76aVKiptSwnTddLliCAeJ44E5UAAwIbiu0y890K4UER0lMZh-QQ1N6Tp2zlnrX5JsQj2hF3-E2sqTFBi3MhXi1YYltNd6dyRLkqL7w4o7yUOkf8vNl3tfAeHkSgrPgbVo_LQGS1U3anlw%3D%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=bb44a682bd0a404f8dbcd324093974fa&_e=nYPKvAOxiWWSC-O_jZAJ5EWzYfUoeuQU_FINZqGc9oAjmh1PelFJGtdWShMv0g55KNC9jOO-C3uVI31b-T3govvsLfXw2JK9ZGOOl7mwLt4hWP0mWzqPytvKH0QGNX5UIlusoHKCZAn6Cwv6JM4HNZbBJgFtnO2hRTmQc5A9hS-8v0BJLHzPlCfeYMge4u_mmLZ5btGJ61e_OVJTFpaCvVAf70rpa_O0_6n7EG8hyKjhZpQVoNb2qcKr7MHfM9RVD_a4nM5-rgoEPv35Q9p_NA%3D%3D)**

name: Team Beshear
subject: We have a winning strategy moving forward.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Peter, Andy officially has an opponent for November.

Daniel Cameron is a Mitch McConnell protégé who's endorsed by Trump, so we expect millions of dollars to flow into Kentucky to attack Andy. **We have a tough fight ahead of us, but we're sticking to a formula we know will give Andy an edge. Here's how we win, Peter:** **TALK TO EVERY VOTER.** In 2019, with the help of folks like you who believed in Andy's vision for our Commonwealth, we knocked on over a million doors and spoke to countless Kentuckians. Now Andy's on the road, kicking off his statewide bus tour where he'll talk to voters about what he's doing to keep pushing Kentucky forward!
**BUILD A GRASSROOTS CAMPAIGN**. It's the thousands of supporters like you who keep Andy's campaign going strong. We need a strong and committed team of grassroots donors and volunteers to help Andy stand up to his opponent and his dark money allies. Over the coming months, we'll rely on you to keep this campaign moving forward.
**SHARE ANDY'S VISION.** Andy knows this election isn't about left or right — it's about moving Kentucky forward. It's about putting our political differences aside and working to improve our infrastructure, invest in public schools, raise teachers' wages, and build an economy that works for _everyone._ And we need your help to share his vision far and wide.

We have the plan to win and continue moving Kentucky forward, but this is the most competitive race in the entire country. Millions will be spent to defeat Andy, so we need your help to ensure we have the resources to fight back and put our plan into action. name: Colin Allred via Blue Amp Action
subject: I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter.
body:
My story
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6924e24-2d32-4bc2-85eb-b2c39e09dd21/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8d228ea-5f97-4d46-b034-ad306ef233cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I'd love to take a moment to explain why. I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8458a4b6-51cc-492c-9824-960e958d178c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92890036-e560-4534-a3cd-9ccbea8872f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4c6eae0b-e212-4c2a-84b9-a053d7173438/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House.[Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help. That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f2bd808-a975-4550-9ea5-8408f30f6e21/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate. Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me. [**So please, will you split a donation of $5, $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20dfbe33-c062-41e4-a34c-c5ee286b811f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning. Colin Allred

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

Friend, we have a critical update on the state of our race, so we'll get right to it.
**_FIRST:_** Democrats lost our critical majority in the House – making the Senate our last line of defense on everything from reproductive freedom to voting rights.
**_THEN:_** Analysts at _FiveThirtyEight_ __ confirmed that Mitch McConnell and the GOP have "a clear path" to retaking the Senate majority next year.
_NOW:_ That path could run straight through Ohio, and national Republicans have already launched their first attack ad to defeat Sherrod and flip this seat red.

body:
three reasons

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63625545/407423297/-1166863400?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230521-1-EM&amount=30.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlYmRhMTNiLTFmZjgtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9Sn0N81gs2hCxrS6PLEL9KejOIoEVhKIrp5Uvh4Wf50=)
---
Hi, Peter, I wanted to tell you why I'm running for Senate, but I know you're busy, so I'll keep this short.
1. As a father, I'm running to build a better world for my kids and yours, to create more opportunities for them and their peers to succeed, and to ensure our country lives up to its promises for the next generation.
2. As a Texan, I've watched Ted Cruz fail our state for more than a decade, doing what's best for Ted Cruz and not for Texas families. I'm running to be a voice for Texans in the Senate, and I promise to always put you first.
3. As a civil rights attorney, I'm running to defend our fundamental rights. Ted Cruz and his allies are waging an all-out war on our right to vote, which is the basis for all other rights. Expanding our Democratic Senate majority is our best hope of stopping them.

[_**If you're with me in this fight, I'm humbly asking: Will you please split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Fight for Progress to raise $50,000 before midnight? Every dollar helps as we work to unseat Ted Cruz, protect the Senate, and build a better future for our families. →**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63625546/407423298/-1166863400?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230521-1-EM&amount=5.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlYmRhMTNiLTFmZjgtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9Sn0N81gs2hCxrS6PLEL9KejOIoEVhKIrp5Uvh4Wf50=)

clean_body: three reasons | = Hi, Peter, I wanted to tell you why I'm running for Senate, but I know you're busy, so I'll keep this short. 1. As a father, I'm running to build a better world for my kids and yours, to create more opportunities for them and their peers to succeed, and to ensure our country lives up to its promises for the next generation. 2. As a Texan, I've watched Ted Cruz fail our state for more than a decade, doing what's best for Ted Cruz and not for Texas families. I'm running to be a voice for Texans in the Senate, and I promise to always put you first. 3. As a civil rights attorney, I'm running to defend our fundamental rights. Ted Cruz and his allies are waging an all-out war on our right to vote, which is the basis for all other rights. Expanding our Democratic Senate majority is our best hope of stopping them. = | | | = Thank you so much, I'm glad to have you on this team. Colin Allred * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | There are people that say a Democrat winning in Texas is impossible , but here’s the truth Peter: 2018: Ted Cruz won by only TWO points , the closest a Texas Democrat has come to winning statewide office in DECADES 2020: Joe Biden became the closest Democratic Presidential nominee to flipping Texas in over FORTY(yes 40!) years 2022: The “Red Wave” failed miserably, showing Texans are rejecting the extremist trajectory that Texas Republicans are taking And the plan for 2024? Rallying behind two of the most divisive figures: Ted Cruz and Donald Trump 🤮 | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Ted Cruz has been a force of pure villainy in the Senate for far too long. From claiming election fraud in the 2020 presidential election, to taking a vacation to Cancùn when millions of Texans were left without power or drinking water, to stating that it was “clearly wrong” for the Supreme Court to legalize gay marriage, it’s high time we took this guy down. Texas can’t afford another 6 years of Ted Cruz, Peter. Together, we can send Colin Allred to the U.S. Senate, but if we know one thing about Ted Cruz, it’s that he is going to have MILLIONS in dark MAGA money flooding into this race. | WEEKLY NEWSLETTER

| Issue 12
---
| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)** Last week, I joined Nick Minock with [WJLA-TV](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=a9ea4ad79570468aa2b311615870a72d&_e=QQZKM50GHl1Z64OynYkqWBzcrZnDKw3JGCkg2lS2t9mEFax21sb_SNMmZ46e_bGvVKoeI1Hba0cNsPN7lHwgZRfhQ__y3npftfX7oOurQR0AidtWIDDuwnLJcXGOGgfmPxvzpTokj04CWESputJHiPPa62F-rWyPX_0Uh3f8U8N9VoFDB173puVK-xwH7dwviJqfrB0S-zDKZgqxsY9jJrv-zp4mErkHS8R67hzJv5WQDFzQq8rfYpMnXBP-HQtV80x_ufijmUqYb53R28ncx058wPF1rrG9kOIkgHtaEukFXG68iIT-C-H4P6NozNmGLb-Qkj1NihD3fXrKNczvkw%3D%3D) in Leesburg to discuss the Loudoun Love Warriors Facebook group and their "hit list" of private citizens and conservative public figures. Members of this private chat room threatened the use of violence or to kill citizens on the list. Some on the list were fired from their jobs and had their lives turned upside down. My name was on the list, and so was my church. It's appalling. My family and I have been on hit lists before when we escaped communist Vietnam, and never once did I think this would happen in the United States. The intolerable Left demands absolute alignment with their ideology and makes threats of social ostracization or, in this case, violence if you do not comply, but I have been a fighter all my life, whether in a ring, battlefield, or political arena. I must fight because I don’t want my children to wake up one day without a flag to stand under or a country to call their own. I don’t want them to fear the knock on the door – not on my watch. **[Join the fight >>>](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=a9ea4ad79570468aa2b311615870a72d&_e=QQZKM50GHl1Z64OynYkqWPSVxnaOuVTfgdg1ySSW25snhnLTT_YSU8WSqCOjW7gX7NKXHc_fFXtycetiCVf7wszVAWVvZwin7aIWorBwUIvggEkgdDwoJCjtPJPBk3VcB39E3obg7xPcW32HtJfELbdJxaEIWKbOIFbLoKy-4xD1lsPv2Y9tlfqPcX5KElhJoiz3lZcFkJ5FocQEYxsTGdcXh_l6yiLHlTI_gq-r3u_4JcRz9RcEaYqyi_BqFC-uY_EXDqZhqr-6pqNDln0unFQhv_wPau949esCtOZ7mX0s1BFT5DqQzhwc3JqQzq25ef498mx7MufcPsVfS6TS5g%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | | | May 21, 2023 | WEEKLY NEWSLETTER | Issue 12 | | A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) Last week, I joined Nick Minock with in Leesburg to discuss the Loudoun Love Warriors Facebook group and their "hit list" of private citizens and conservative public figures. Members of this private chat room threatened the use of violence or to kill citizens on the list. Some on the list were fired from their jobs and had their lives turned upside down. My name was on the list, and so was my church. It's appalling. My family and I have been on hit lists before when we escaped communist Vietnam, and never once did I think this would happen in the United States. The intolerable Left demands absolute alignment with their ideology and makes threats of social ostracization or, in this case, violence if you do not comply, but I have been a fighter all my life, whether in a ring, battlefield, or political arena. I must fight because I don’t want my children to wake up one day without a flag to stand under or a country to call their own. I don’t want them to fear the knock on the door – not on my watch. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of | | | Durham report: Refugees of communism discuss 'chilling' parallels between the US and countries they fled Hung Cao joined Fox and Friends FIRST to discuss the Durhand report, revealing that the Russian Collusion theory was a lie and Democrats like Adam Schiff were complicit in perpetuating that lie across the airwaves. Cao noted that this happens in failed states and how he’s seen those countries firsthand, and the United States does not want to turn into a banana republic. | Social Media to Share Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. It's hard for me to see, Peter. After fighting for our right to compete, and the decades that it took to build a strong foundation for women's sports, it's on the precipice of all crumbling down. Transgender women (biological men) have infiltrated our sports and are taking away opportunities from passionate and devoted young women who have worked their entire lives to be successful. To prevent this, House Republicans recently passed a bill protecting the integrity of women's sports, but Joe Biden said he intends to veto it. _**As a woman, and the mother of a young girl who competes in track & field, I know where I stand on this issue and I know it's important to her.**__**⬇️**_

name: Charles Booker
subject: FWD: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

As we approach another fundraising deadline, I’m hoping you’ll help us
reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our
campaign debt.

I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the
campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure
those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight
together. First, I need your help.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18962?t=1001&akid=3252%2E346206%2EvUdIpf ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a
contribution before midnight.

Thank you!

Charles

--- Forwarded message ---

Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18962?t=1002&akid=3252%2E346206%2EvUdIpf ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230521-3252-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3252_346206_vUdIpf&akid=3252%2E346206%2EvUdIpf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3252%2E346206%2EvUdIpf

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: [URGENT] NPR in danger! >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
We need to know where you stand on this!
| | | **URGENT UPDATE: Republicans are trying to __DEFUND__ NPR!**

Republicans are attacking one of our most important news sources, and we need to know where Democrats stand -- **but we have NO RESPONSE from you on file:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12802?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230521-ResponseNeeded-DefendNPRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230521-ResponseNeeded-DefendNPRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10800%2E9716520%2ECayhD2)
**Do you support National Public Radio?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/12802?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230521-ResponseNeeded-DefendNPRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230521-ResponseNeeded-DefendNPRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10800%2E9716520%2ECayhD2)

| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/12802?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230521-ResponseNeeded-DefendNPRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230521-ResponseNeeded-DefendNPRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10800%2E9716520%2ECayhD2)
---

**Team, the GOP is going on the _attack_ against one of our most trusted news sources -- National Public Radio (NPR)!**

Now that they have a House majority, some far-right Republicans want to BAN any federal dollars from going to NPR -- threatening a news organization that has brought quality, non-profit journalism to Americans for _decades._

Republicans are trying to tear down, defund, or delegitimize EVERY trusted news organization that threatens ultra-conservative outlets like Fox News -- and that's why we URGENTLY need Democrats like you to speak up.

**_We set a goal of gathering 10,000 responses by midnight, but we still haven’t heard from you! _**

**Do you support National Public Radio?**

name: David Horowitz
subject: Biden's Abuse of Power
body:
He's weaponized the federal government to attack his political enemies

| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Joe Biden may be coming after you next... He's weaponized the federal government to attack his political enemies and I need your help to stop him. [**That 's****why I 'm asking you to sign the SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN'S ABUSES OF POWER Petition right now.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65d009f9fc8e46ab889daf29a85a35ed&_e=O4zrJv3oD5uwYatOxGwnBAcPh_X4GpAFpFc38M5tOzNKmwOjti2m0xMHf4BixxYd59jAs0ly-rGfb56bitxCZwqy-Kdsj66kaPJskqgmfO9G_3LoVOd7e5xvUooyOU04e4aDn9AV7KcLiJ5dFp9uQ-Q9t07M0YqZMUQK4C15nN6-mcDee4A-xsnk8HgsVTxuFKbe_ZB3tqTlcHMqeBJlakh2IJ0ri24FROcqoUTqvRdlpfE9uTjaVx5uIL3wO3JGg9O5ojHcK2BYqYp1eOoQFONS-_jzCO3-Xf6cw7OXcAvmB4tINGHxG0Y5gEQs21EZSt7DcAKFy-TROAAX_B9yjzDqmaPj_ax98ny3AbClxT1GALSnviX1uQ-w0hLiE8K9ti5LfnfeOj5sbUxT3V7UDw%3D%3D) Just look at what's happened in the past few months:
---
* Biden's FBI used the Counterterrorism Division to conduct investigations into innocent parents protesting at school board meetings.
* Biden's IRS is continuing to target and attack conservatives while allowing liberal groups like BLM to break the law.
* Biden's Attorney General "personally approved" the unprecedented raid on President Trump's home. And now he's been indicted and arrested on bogus charges in New York City.
* Biden's full-armed SWAT units are being used to arrest peaceful pro-life supporters.

---
These kinds of abuses of power are usually only seen in third-world dictatorships... But this is an organized effort across the government to intimidate Biden's political opponents and silence anyone who disagrees with them. And we have to stop it. [**That 's why I'm asking you to sign the SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN'S ABUSES OF POWER Petition.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65d009f9fc8e46ab889daf29a85a35ed&_e=O4zrJv3oD5uwYatOxGwnBAcPh_X4GpAFpFc38M5tOzNKmwOjti2m0xMHf4BixxYd59jAs0ly-rGfb56bitxCZwqy-Kdsj66kaPJskqgmfO9G_3LoVOd7e5xvUooyOU04e4aDn9AV7KcLiJ5dFp9uQ-Q9t07M0YqZMUQK4C15nN6-mcDee4A-xsnk8HgsVTxuFKbe_ZB3tqTlcHMqeBJlakh2IJ0ri24FROcqoUTqvRdlpfE9uTjaVx5uIL3wO3JGrUP24JL2sttuWnMJcrHsXAoS2PD0jiXAZZvAkr5JbDZn2MGyvkcdnufYG2uaQ2gm1uen4lz7_hZk6xDwzf9Lr358dJ_7PPlSgFP4F8N_WkRufkhJT5ZRWuNbDE0fNxN_qN2_pEP459FNC5SayKtcyQ%3D%3D) Biden has declared war on America's conservatives. He's taken neutral law enforcement organizations and turned them into weapons of partisan politics. Only in Biden's America can people who burn down police stations, attack courthouses and destroy statues walk free... ... While elderly pro-life activists are surrounded and arrested by dozens of fully-armed FBI agents. It's insanity. I never thought I'd see something like that here in America... But this is where we are. Biden is weaponizing the government and if we don't fight back NOW, it's only going to get worse - [**so****please follow this link to sign the Petition right now.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65d009f9fc8e46ab889daf29a85a35ed&_e=O4zrJv3oD5uwYatOxGwnBAcPh_X4GpAFpFc38M5tOzNKmwOjti2m0xMHf4BixxYd59jAs0ly-rGfb56bitxCZwqy-Kdsj66kaPJskqgmfO9G_3LoVOd7e5xvUooyOU04e4aDn9AV7KcLiJ5dFp9uQ-Q9t07M0YqZMUQK4C15nN6-mcDee4A-xsnk8HgsVTxuFKbe_ZB3tqTlcHMqeBJlakh2IJ0ri24FROcqoUTqvRdlpfE9uTjaVx5uIL3wO3JGw8_OKQSiTsBzh9d465UaqDu2dwEyvc_XqaKFxDAOwzq3NK6d6a7qTnuVSMhB_0a-tMk3-V_RgYsq2SIhVOJMRMQ9pzSK2JBjUWciOgZ_114P9Zj_F0qE7M8dPF8y8CgHiXo8Fe5AjqHJLaaGMMhjmw%3D%3D) My friend, the Left will not stop. If they can't win debating the message - they destroy the messenger. So, they attack. And attack. And attack. We must force Biden to answer for his crimes -- and a House Select Committee investigation is the best way for his abuses to see the light of day and hold him accountable. [**So****please sign the SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN 'S ABUSES OF POWER Petition right now.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65d009f9fc8e46ab889daf29a85a35ed&_e=O4zrJv3oD5uwYatOxGwnBAcPh_X4GpAFpFc38M5tOzNKmwOjti2m0xMHf4BixxYd59jAs0ly-rGfb56bitxCZwqy-Kdsj66kaPJskqgmfO9G_3LoVOd7e5xvUooyOU04e4aDn9AV7KcLiJ5dFp9uQ-Q9t07M0YqZMUQK4C15nN6-mcDee4A-xsnk8HgsVTxuFKbe_ZB3tqTlcHMqeBJlakh2IJ0ri24FROcqoUTqvRdlpfE9uTjaVx5uIL3wO3JG6akKABdFjmMdi1ZkaGIHlQbD3SWV6pAzcpPDD7N052mnGkasMupIr6zSxWy-HONRNxO5rdwEiRE7soSaJmChlcZwJ5gz-A98yytJGJoG9ypWSOtmQj9rNTOnwZ5kDBLcLRoFpa4vXWajvNGkMoLKoA%3D%3D) There isn't a better group than the Freedom Center to lead this fight. You see, I was a leader in the radical Left movement in the 1960's and 1970's. I know their playbook - because I helped write it. Now I'm working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left's tactics against them - we fight fire with fire - and we win. And because of our success, they hate us. Like President Trump, we've faced countless attacks from the Left:
---
* They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on).
* We had to find a new bank after the local bank we've been at for years suddenly closed our accounts.
* The hotel we've held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly decided not to renew our contract.

---
No other group has faced these kinds of attacks because the radical Left fears us and our work. You see, we NEVER back down and we hit them where it hurts... but to stop Biden's abuses of power I need your help. That's why I'm asking you to do two things for me. [**The****first is to sign the SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN 'S ABUSES OF POWER Petition.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65d009f9fc8e46ab889daf29a85a35ed&_e=O4zrJv3oD5uwYatOxGwnBAcPh_X4GpAFpFc38M5tOzNKmwOjti2m0xMHf4BixxYd59jAs0ly-rGfb56bitxCZwqy-Kdsj66kaPJskqgmfO9G_3LoVOd7e5xvUooyOU04e4aDn9AV7KcLiJ5dFp9uQ-Q9t07M0YqZMUQK4C15nN6-mcDee4A-xsnk8HgsVTxuFKbe_ZB3tqTlcHMqeBJlakh2IJ0ri24FROcqoUTqvRdlpfE9uTjaVx5uIL3wO3JGml8a36gegbP2_dcivMNLDqOpw-mG--un8OAG10oPEpxUuVQP5d1qhe2NlcImPoE4ykeqIKmH-T4j2rJ1ShHVjT8NPfAPFgTYMHnYg9_2B488LUsZK0cDZQIF1sBnD2PKUYB9Hy4z4PkyetiOxIvamw%3D%3D) Your name will be sent along with one million others and sent to Republican Caucus leader Kevin McCarthy demanding he creates a Select Committee to Investigate Biden's abuses of power. [**The****second favor I 'm asking of you today is to make an urgent one-time donation of $23 with your signed Petition.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65d009f9fc8e46ab889daf29a85a35ed&_e=O4zrJv3oD5uwYatOxGwnBAcPh_X4GpAFpFc38M5tOzNKmwOjti2m0xMHf4BixxYd59jAs0ly-rGfb56bitxCZwqy-Kdsj66kaPJskqgmfO9G_3LoVOd7e5xvUooyOU04e4aDn9AV7KcLiJ5dFp9uQ-Q9t07M0YqZMUQK4C15nN6-mcDee4A-xsnk8HgsVTxuFKbe_ZB3tqTlcHMqeBJlakh2IJ0ri24FROcqoUTqvRdlpfE9uTjaVx5uIL3wO3JG1hExaEmgVSLY78QHXlFFsMCXb6wxYaX4Y4sTyWmN23uaA2-XuBkZSzqI0qgOgsiaB8QXEBoajv5G0izSJVp4XCksW3LiuzV4JzCYb0xzRVRzsrX-otTP9W7vKmU3kKcLh9UEUzeTtUHvwtNFQznU7g%3D%3D) Your $23 one-time donation will be used to send an additional 44 **SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN 'S ABUSES OF POWER **Petitions to like-minded patriots across the country. The only way we're going to stop Joe Biden is with an overwhelming campaign across America. That's why your $23 donation is so critical. We must bring more people to our cause and get them to join our fight. And I'm sorry, but we cannot wait or delay -- we must act now. [**That 's****why if you 're blessed enough to make a larger donation of $35, $50, $100 or more I would be eternally grateful.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65d009f9fc8e46ab889daf29a85a35ed&_e=O4zrJv3oD5uwYatOxGwnBAcPh_X4GpAFpFc38M5tOzNKmwOjti2m0xMHf4BixxYd59jAs0ly-rGfb56bitxCZwqy-Kdsj66kaPJskqgmfO9G_3LoVOd7e5xvUooyOU04e4aDn9AV7KcLiJ5dFp9uQ-Q9t07M0YqZMUQK4C15nN6-mcDee4A-xsnk8HgsVTxuFKbe_ZB3tqTlcHMqeBJlakh2IJ0ri24FROcqoUTqvRdlpfE9uTjaVx5uIL3wO3JGTE9tNmbMm_yLdiuZneBkFYGFkx_bhQo_TfPl5-D2xP2x9rRdq4GGijM-Uz-g2YoGmzN9xOYE50LRklHDSCRxoyls7iG20jK_qMOQawCq1EnvRX8KeSxZ1xtqEYEm-XlBw6fipF7ESEfZ0in0DLI88A%3D%3D) Just know that your one-time donation of $23, $50, $100 or more will be put to immediate use stopping Joe Biden's abuses of power, because nothing is more important... If they can go after a former President and a peaceful pro-life father who have done nothing wrong - you could be next, so please rush back your signed Petition right away.
---
| | For America,

David Horowitz

clean_body: He's weaponized the federal government to attack his political enemies | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Joe Biden may be coming after you next... He's weaponized the federal government to attack his political enemies and I need your help to stop him. Just look at what's happened in the past few months: Biden's FBI used the Counterterrorism Division to conduct investigations into innocent parents protesting at school board meetings. Biden's IRS is continuing to target and attack conservatives while allowing liberal groups like BLM to break the law. Biden's Attorney General "personally approved" the unprecedented raid on President Trump's home. And now he's been indicted and arrested on bogus charges in New York City. Biden's full-armed SWAT units are being used to arrest peaceful pro-life supporters. These kinds of abuses of power are usually only seen in third-world dictatorships... But this is an organized effort across the government to intimidate Biden's political opponents and silence anyone who disagrees with them. And we have to stop it. Biden has declared war on America's conservatives. He's taken neutral law enforcement organizations and turned them into weapons of partisan politics. Only in Biden's America can people who burn down police stations, attack courthouses and destroy statues walk free... ... While elderly pro-life activists are surrounded and arrested by dozens of fully-armed FBI agents. It's insanity. I never thought I'd see something like that here in America... But this is where we are. Biden is weaponizing the government and if we don't fight back NOW, it's only going to get worse - My friend, the Left will not stop. If they can't win debating the message - they destroy the messenger. So, they attack. And attack. And attack. We must force Biden to answer for his crimes -- and a House Select Committee investigation is the best way for his abuses to see the light of day and hold him accountable. There isn't a better group than the Freedom Center to lead this fight. You see, I was a leader in the radical Left movement in the 1960's and 1970's. I know their playbook - because I helped write it. Now I'm working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left's tactics against them - we fight fire with fire - and we win. And because of our success, they hate us. Like President Trump, we've faced countless attacks from the Left: They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on). We had to find a new bank after the local bank we've been at for years suddenly closed our accounts. The hotel we've held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly decided not to renew our contract. No other group has faced these kinds of attacks because the radical Left fears us and our work. You see, we NEVER back down and we hit them where it hurts... but to stop Biden's abuses of power I need your help. That's why I'm asking you to do two things for me. Your name will be sent along with one million others and sent to Republican Caucus leader Kevin McCarthy demanding he creates a Select Committee to Investigate Biden's abuses of power. Your $23 one-time donation will be used to send an additional 44 SELECT COMMITTEE TO INVESTIGATE BIDEN 'S ABUSES OF POWER Petitions to like-minded patriots across the country. The only way we're going to stop Joe Biden is with an overwhelming campaign across America. That's why your $23 donation is so critical. We must bring more people to our cause and get them to join our fight. And I'm sorry, but we cannot wait or delay -- we must act now. Just know that your one-time donation of $23, $50, $100 or more will be put to immediate use stopping Joe Biden's abuses of power, because nothing is more important... If they can go after a former President and a peaceful pro-life father who have done nothing wrong - you could be next, so please rush back your signed Petition right away. | | For America, David Horowitz | | P.S. Joe Biden has weaponized our government and is using it as a tool to attack and destroy his political enemies. With your support today we can use Congress to make him pay for his constant abuses of power. After signing the Petition, hold Biden accountable for his blatant abuses of power. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. (C) David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.org P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Kirsten Gillibrand

body:
| | |

Friend, did you know that for the price of a cup of coffee — $3 — you can help us defend our Senate majority and roll back the GOP's gains in New York? Let me explain:
**As far-right megadonors pour more and more money into their far-right candidates, running a winning campaign is getting more expensive every single year.** The easy way out is to accept a huge check from corporate megadonors — and trust me, that's exactly what the GOP candidates we run against will do.
But I've spent my career in Washington fighting against the corruption bred by _that_ kind of campaigning. That's why I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs. Instead, I count on the generous donations of grassroots Americans like you. **[And that's why, today, I'm asking you to chip in $3 — just the price of a cup of coffee — to help me fight back against the GOP's megadonors and save our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63626295/407426247/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=3&refcode=jtk4151-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjViMjBiYy0yN2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sj8lbCyKSUzyk1-cNqypvStQY6FhfqSLilAPA9-07LI=)**
I know that a grassroots donation of $3, or even $15 or $20, might not seem like much on its own. **But when we all stand as one, we can build the resources to take on even the GOP's biggest megadonors._And trust me — those megadonors have their eyes on New York_.**
Last year, New York Republicans had their best election cycle in decades, winning enough House seats to help make Kevin McCarthy speaker. **Now, they're targeting my seat to take back Senate control — and they'll spend everything they have to defeat me. **

_[**In a race like this one, every single dollar makes a difference. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Friend,
As a “core” member of this team, I want you to be the first to know: Today, I reintroduced the CORE Act.
Last year, we successfully protected the Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument, setting aside more than 53,000 acres of public lands that will now be protected for our children and grandchildren.
Now, we’re working to pass the CORE Act to protect more than 420,000 additional acres of public lands.
Colorado’s public lands are critical to curbing the effects of climate change, growing our economy, and our way of life as Coloradans. I won’t stop working to protect them.
[**Will you join me and help us pass the CORE Act and protect Colorado’s public lands? name: Sen. John Fetterman
subject: You can take the guy outta Scranton, but you can’ttake the Scranton outta the guy:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
If Joe is gonna build a campaign that can compete for the long haul, he needs ALL of yinz + youse to pitch in now. | | |
---
Hey Peter -- it’s Senator John Fetterman, or as Joe Biden likes to call me “that big ol' boy.” (He really said that 😂) While he might have represented Delaware in the U.S. Senate, Joe is Pennsylvania through and through. You can take the guy outta Scranton, but you can’t take the Scranton outta the guy. Joe’s hometown taught him the importance of hard work, treating others with dignity and respect, and leaving no one behind -- values he’s taken all the way from his childhood home to the White House. **Joe has spent his entire career fighting for folks like me and you. Now, he needs *our* help to get a second term in office to finish the job. ✅** **Will you join me in supporting Joe Biden’s reelection campaign today? Anything you can give -- truly any amount -- will make a huge difference early on in this race.** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

[**May 21, 1819:** The first bicycle in the U.S. was seen in New York City. Alternately called “velocipedes,” “swift walkers,” “hobby horses,” or “dandy horses,” they had been imported from London that same year. This development revolutionized transportation, providing a new means of mobility for individuals. Despite their uncomfortable ride due to the lack of suspension, these bicycles gained popularity and set the foundation for the subsequent advancements in bicycle technology that would follow.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=9c4ba4d2d0c84333a95fdf03e85d48d0&_e=g8yoSmhZTbVFDju_QgFs8BongwuRphVcpxzCcDp3Ft-huShJGn51kdu_V-POcZRuMj8COTxYUSpghhBIoaj3C9gIrOYl6JNOCXLJ3R0WHYWfsG9Zz_yPoHkSRb52eefU8rspPsf5gJuLxZTiHwxLU6SHsbVNwCRgo3cRRY_QjkjBNjW10-yHkS78r5aD7fJ17qMz2bp4UoTOr6ArscnL5gtnLF59FPQ1HnQJkbxi21-gMw-ffUKZPeWX4XOhHFmFenct3Z6Nxrrm9AYJinfkNA%3D%3D) **Source -[famousdaily.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=9c4ba4d2d0c84333a95fdf03e85d48d0&_e=g8yoSmhZTbVFDju_QgFs8BongwuRphVcpxzCcDp3Ft-huShJGn51kdu_V-POcZRuMj8COTxYUSpghhBIoaj3C9gIrOYl6JNOCXLJ3R0WHYWfsG9Zz_yPoHkSRb52eefUt0U2A9ausQavQGobdpsjqbArWpj-InaZKSG9GZUwEHQkSq21-9c638gj3c61VHwYb6WdTVcJtMQxXO9rbCsR5MyWosOgw81D4iqNye3Paehg_5zB5vlT_oVsIfTcaL_4hpzhuJOyyWPVcJYF0abzyg%3D%3D)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=9c4ba4d2d0c84333a95fdf03e85d48d0&_e=c-NpQfETSrBMIqh_fu0WuQvBKzV5tOgs4Dze09x3tSdEIX-oErK-719sOGTSX4HkbF2A6DA4Tu8itmY4BsMDiuAVWeQqXYWW-kCiJH5IUaNgU8ZpnkIGehVuxsbWC6ZRdX2tp02jvwD7_L9XcjWBGQJFurHjqYxwDITBTM576VMgvpSR63UxRotr3tLtFk7INIANDKsj3VtRsawk-fvpBy1HWslzCMVM5S_cRtZhsZDIQPjIbsc2BnxbhW49jwNB)**

[**May 21, 1881:** The American Red Cross was founded by Clara Barton and Adolphus Solomons as a humanitarian organization with the aim of providing relief to those in need. This non-profit organization has played a significant role in responding to disasters, offering support to military personnel and their families, and promoting blood donation. With its widespread presence and dedicated volunteers, the American Red Cross continues to make a positive impact on communities across the United States, embodying the spirit of compassion and assistance.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=9c4ba4d2d0c84333a95fdf03e85d48d0&_e=c-NpQfETSrBMIqh_fu0WuWqeomlcN-CwNsy5QJShG01fvp0SDIQqv1WvKornqptVhS88ovyMQ6TgtMAxWF8PDUkhNKV7mDBul67YqNJ9TJfAk7N0B34JfA00ecUp63DGNTN-geV0IqesizpmSp6TwpMPHB6VSqNEpnppmCmTzZNCT8dVWAKl_bGB6T4f4x3Q5XKrqSddqjb7_IkHLHo_GgHcq-Yxm9biGnTWtDAYcYMg6Smlwldf1az1XyMPxFQLZCQwm9nwWHujNw5EXAYNrg%3D%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=9c4ba4d2d0c84333a95fdf03e85d48d0&_e=c-NpQfETSrBMIqh_fu0WuWqeomlcN-CwNsy5QJShG01fvp0SDIQqv1WvKornqptVhS88ovyMQ6TgtMAxWF8PDUkhNKV7mDBul67YqNJ9TJdnVi7P0Ae_gPtuV2RwiDBB6AkDgUVG83qpyOAyZt0cCRScZ27evvvSFAuqxKqzh_Dwnj5IlIgh87xe8RwMywgpQZHMar_j_clxaFUMipzUJD5sHAky04Crx3gH1tnFQkZ3LPaEzYbihX4hy7rvUNsIt_sISnb0Yqd7PVVwYF0GKw%3D%3D)**

[**May 21, 1932:** Exactly five years after Charles Lindbergh's groundbreaking solo flight across the Atlantic, Amelia Earhart made history by becoming the first female pilot to achieve the same remarkable feat. She successfully landed her plane in Ireland, completing a nonstop journey across the North Atlantic. Covering a distance of over 2,000 miles from Newfoundland, Earhart accomplished this incredible feat in under 15 hours, solidifying her place in aviation history as a trailblazing aviator.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=9c4ba4d2d0c84333a95fdf03e85d48d0&_e=c-NpQfETSrBMIqh_fu0WuWqeomlcN-CwNsy5QJShG01fvp0SDIQqv1WvKornqptVF95iMwFe_PF6RiNnMA4kumdWwlTBQ6yHM8SGnZ0ngbnmQP7gZGINCICb_1SIjd0tkP4DnszwNH_3SEvEtdb047VIG_71lloagTYNxPStRXQ0UEivMCLmnH5YiqjPSPrOMHQcnEcWn0U0FHNRiSG0SiaaNxT69-6r4MGxDCiahJ1KRWVTCw9ocExDMMJzpQjSuM0MDc3Trm6wfxHn-r4WYA%3D%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=9c4ba4d2d0c84333a95fdf03e85d48d0&_e=c-NpQfETSrBMIqh_fu0WuWqeomlcN-CwNsy5QJShG01fvp0SDIQqv1WvKornqptVF95iMwFe_PF6RiNnMA4kumdWwlTBQ6yHM8SGnZ0ngbnmQP7gZGINCICb_1SIjd0tLkraHQvLdNG39_C6rwSQ47fvtQT27nfwvJQUuJXtCce9Irn4eDN4MlS7_besDZA8qa0qtGJK7OG52iIbj9m6nBLIpSQOLZkZAPuqKHpjLOtBFVfHC3xcdI0092_1IbhSZFbKrIJPDhULULQyRjB1bw%3D%3D)**

| | If you can,
I want to talk about how important it is to have access to mental health care. I don't want a Congressman making it harder on people's mental health. [That's why I am supporting Dr. Bob Lorinser](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/ccOX0WQ2f/c?w=7a_Sm7JdydygsNpQDbx2JF_JAMsUpEPd65VLd-bWS6c.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL2JpdC5seS9GdW5kRHJCb2I_ZW1jaT0xZGY2YmQ1Yy0xYWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMmZW1kaT1lYTAwMDAwMC0wMDAwLTAwMDAtMDAwMC0wMDAwMDAwMDAwMDEmY2VpZD0lN2IlN2JDb250YWN0c0VtYWlsSUQlN2QlN2QiLCJyIjoiMzZjODNiYWYtOTgxYy00ZWNhLTljMGEtZjk3NGE1MDg2YWFhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0). When he asked me to work on his campaign, I told him, "You know I'm autistic, right? You're aware?"

He knows, and is eager for me to be a lead volunteer!
It says a lot about his character. I have something to contribute, and he knows that. That's the type of person we need fighting for our mental health access because he understands we bring something to the table.

Dr. Bob has always said that mental health is just as important as physical health. We need somebody like that in Washington fighting for us -- those of us who struggle. We need more help from the federal level. Bob Lorinser will fight for that. Having somebody be your voice, or amplify your voice; that's what I want in a Representative.

Mental healthcare is connected to politics. Our services are state and federally funded, and you must know who's fighting for you to get the care you need.

Our current congressman, Jack Bergman, voted against expanding rural broadband, which means less Internet access. Our mental health services are so limited that sometimes telehealth is the only way people who live off the beaten path can access a therapist, and the nearest therapist might be 100 miles away or 50 miles away.

Michigan's former GOP Senate leader tried to pass legislation making it impossible for Medicaid and Medicare recipients to receive mental healthcare. Very frustrating!

A lot of people don't think someone who is autistic, or ADHD or has depression has anything to contribute. And that's not true. We do have a lot to contribute, and Bob Lorinser sees that.

If you can, I hope you will support him. Send someone to Congress who values your mental health as much as your physical health. There are only a few people that do right now. If you have mental health issues, Dr. Bob Lorinser is fighting for you. [Can you please make a contribution today?](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/ccOX0WQ2f/c?w=7a_Sm7JdydygsNpQDbx2JF_JAMsUpEPd65VLd-bWS6c.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL2JpdC5seS9GdW5kRHJCb2I_ZW1jaT0xZGY2YmQ1Yy0xYWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMmZW1kaT1lYTAwMDAwMC0wMDAwLTAwMDAtMDAwMC0wMDAwMDAwMDAwMDEmY2VpZD0lN2IlN2JDb250YWN0c0VtYWlsSUQlN2QlN2QiLCJyIjoiMzZjODNiYWYtOTgxYy00ZWNhLTljMGEtZjk3NGE1MDg2YWFhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) Thanks! Adios. -Sarah Sarah MorrisCampaign LiaisonDr. Bob Lorinser for Congress, MarquetteAdvocate for Autism and Mental Health Awareness

| | | Peter,
---
_The more we learn about the weaponization of the FBI against conservatives, the more I’m alarmed._

_**First,** they labeled parents concerned about the woke indoctrination of schools as a _terrorism risk_._
_**Then,** they admitted to putting FBI informants in _churches_._
_**Now,** we’re finding out that they had practically N _O evidence_ to open their Russia hoax investigation into President Trump._
_**This is the kind of behavior you expect in a communist dictatorship, not a free democracy like the United States. **_

name: Staff @ ShariceForCongress.com
subject: a special celebration for Sharice→
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| It’s Sharice’s birthday tomorrow! We are reaching out to ask if you will sign your name to her birthday card — _we know it would mean the world to Sharice._

**[Click here to sign the card before her birthday tomorrow!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63626835/407428207/-32681213?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230521_PT_1.2_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_birthdaycard&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQ2MTAzNy0yZWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iNYvDUEHpgwzMKYI4JRr36n08DTcxw42vrDBYIWQFxc=&emci=c1461037-2ef8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c5461037-2ef8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**

Sharice has consistently fought for us: From introducing the law to protect marriage equality last year, to passing landmark climate and prescription drug cost legislation into law, to her recent work to help moms, farm workers, and manufacturers in Kansas.

name: Our Revolution
subject: Keith Ellison is offering signed books to Our Revolution supporters!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter Willis,

Thanks to your support, Our Revolution
helped Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison fend off multiple extreme
challengers bankrolled by police unions. In that role, he overcame
systemic barriers to convict police officer Derek Chauvin for brutally
murdering George Floyd.

While on the case, Keith kept a diary which he is now releasing as a book
with a forward from George Floyd's brother Philonise called Breaking the
Wheel: Ending the Cycle of Police Violence.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8670?t=1009&akid=4301%2E5885482%2Eqz8SHk ]Since Our Revolution was so critical to helping Keith overcome police
unions and win re-election, Keith is offering Our Revolution supporters a
special deal! Donate $35 or more, and we'll send you a signed copy of
Keith Ellison's new book!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8670?t=1010&akid=4301%2E5885482%2Eqz8SHk ][IMG]

Keith said he wrote this book to make sure that future organizers fighting
for change had "a historical account and a guide to officials when faced
with a case of police misconduct."

Without Our Revolution helping Keith Ellison win elections for attorney
general (last fall by less than 21,000 votes), he wouldn't be doing this
incredibly important work to expose systemic bias and model how to
overcome it.

America needs a clear dialogue around true public safety and police
reform. That’s why Keith will be joining us for a deep dive into this
critical topic on our LIVE Call Monday Night.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8670?t=1011&akid=4301%2E5885482%2Eqz8SHk ]Click here to reserve your signed copy of Keith Ellison's new book with
a donation of $35 or more!

When we organize, we win.
Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230521_FR_BreakTheWheel_2_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_BreakTheWheel.lH7JuJ&t=1001&akid=4301%2E5885482%2Eqz8SHk ]Our membership card

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230521_FR_BreakTheWheel_2_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_BreakTheWheel.hFct1h&t=1002&akid=4301%2E5885482%2Eqz8SHk ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing as a 2023 Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $10 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230521_FR_BreakTheWheel_2_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_BreakTheWheel.DgcenY&t=1003&akid=4301%2E5885482%2Eqz8SHk ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230521_FR_BreakTheWheel_2_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_BreakTheWheel.qJuIxC&t=1004&akid=4301%2E5885482%2Eqz8SHk ]GIVE ONCE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1005&akid=4301%2E5885482%2Eqz8SHk ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1006&akid=4301%2E5885482%2Eqz8SHk ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1007&akid=4301%2E5885482%2Eqz8SHk ][IMG]

Don't live in Pennsylvania? [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Update_Information?t=1008&akid=4301%2E5885482%2Eqz8SHk ]Click here to update your address so
that we only send you the most relevant organizing opportunities.
